name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: Majorie Taylor Greene’s racist rhetoric
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Folks, I’m appalled.**

This morning, Marjorie Taylor Greene went on live television attacking me as _“aggressive and intimidating”_ for calling out her reckless behavior. She even went as far as ridiculously equating being called a “white supremacist” to being called the n-word.

This isn’t just a dogwhistle, it's a bullhorn that far-right extremists use time and time again to characterize Black men as violent and threatening.

We’ve seen the impact of this kind of rhetoric throughout the entirety of our nation’s history. It’s why Emmett Till, George Floyd, and countless other Black men have been murdered in our streets in cold blood.

**So let me be clear: Marjorie Taylor Greene knows _exactly_ what she’s doing when she calls me a threat. It’s dangerous and unacceptable — and I refuse to stand for it.**

[**It’s up to all of us to speak truth to power, team. Please: Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project today so I can keep fighting for racial justice in Congress and defend our democracy from MAGA extremists? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45674?t=6&akid=7821%2E878179%2EumIVsq) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jamaal Bowman and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45675?t=7&akid=7821%2E878179%2EumIVsq)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45676?t=8&akid=7821%2E878179%2EumIVsq)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45674?t=11&akid=7821%2E878179%2EumIVsq)
Thank you so much for standing with me in this fight.

Rep. Jamaal Bowman
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7821%2E878179%2EumIVsq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7821%2E878179%2EumIVsq).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7821%2E878179%2EumIVsq) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=7821%2E878179%2EumIVsq). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7821%2E878179%2EumIVsq)

name: FWD Message from Ted Cruz
subject: Want to be sure you see this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, it’s Rick Scott. [**I wanted to share this message from my friend Senator Cruz.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=005b40865a1b4dd0a36d8e633827e7f3&_e=hwCUbHHl1qHvvVNITbT6DISI8idyjS2ckIoMBM-ZyP1sZr7g-BTsAshmRQdfp-9YrQmhfmS9tLp5VkHvRH-bRd5SGS4F-kHf60HVSDeJSbFdukqXMz42rsrfKDJdKeq6rOURr1WfvLjV13b5Zi7aIoVka17XhPRsZb1xRHzw8qq3DTKHwEwzOhYb7EeJUOUVB4kHMaEnqh9Xb-NRf8nN5ZZ62-Qxe8fy96RYW60vSHBxiGfA9pFZPE7J48PbTPjAc6qXRenFVLY8qaVGjhzVLf_nRUP7bdSFfuDnRsHi-BeU1UDFHxvCvLqFimHHp__VOZX5lK1xUAr2eA9iMXPsMZAVi_N9n3vgdKoeqYbr5JU%3D) Ted is a conservative leader, and we need to make sure he wins his Senate reelection campaign in Texas, please read his message below. Thank you! Rick Scott
---
|
---
| | It’s Senator Ted Cruz and this is urgent. **The left is pouring MILLIONS into Texas to try to take me down. ** It’s only been a few days since far-left Dem Colin Allred announced he’s running against me in 2024. But the massive Democrat fundraising machine is already churning out millions. **_There is a massive wave of cash flooding into his campaign since he announced his run. He's raised over $2 million in a day and a half. That is indicative of the tidal wave of cash that is going to come in - and we’re just getting started._****_ _** The message is clear – Democrat donors are hellbent on [**flipping Texas** **Blue**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=005b40865a1b4dd0a36d8e633827e7f3&_e=hwCUbHHl1qHvvVNITbT6DISI8idyjS2ckIoMBM-ZyP1sZr7g-BTsAshmRQdfp-9YrQmhfmS9tLp5VkHvRH-bRd5SGS4F-kHf60HVSDeJSbFdukqXMz42rsrfKDJdKeq6rOURr1WfvLjV13b5Zi7aIoVka17XhPRsZb1xRHzw8qq3DTKHwEwzOhYb7EeJUOUVB4kHMaEnqh9Xb-NRf8nN5fmlOeu3XFN8zWTYgFQPZV72a1QJ0uFhz7lirAAxbUq990D0SK_Yk2Z3kJwZIR-A8e2K5xHD44qbCR6WTWU8oAlz8hNGvRIQhkD3mbvs4jg9j0SI6avvlreeXFOA0DpMV6cUIpMg0zDHtD8Yh7sc6Tg%3D) next year, and they’ll spend whatever it takes to make it happen. **Please send an emergency donation today to help me FIGHT BACK and Keep Texas Red!**

body:
To step up.
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7bcc149985b84819a7720d7499f55a15&_e=vABs19zKojh0z2oBKgjFHTRju883h2K3S1ED5Jx7s9PY1oUy6o5W28X5uyq9XuixTUL0b3wOT67DwCc-Gbt8Ohp23ztIGdo7RAvVGVhn4Ic5dGI33A94D3YWR4BliYHljibq0Jhtc2F8Iirm_Fe4wQVJtzoZyYYoL9i-gULA-hQ7oZHb_PK-DDEta1prdiN4N1uV8RtbKejRfWVJFFbSREMBGBi9dmut5SnNJGSGHnhPQvHTzAXDnnO-QIUULMuPNugpCO1hyUYSDvVG8wuGLg9dItURFneMfG3i82EH-CalprSduR9BU0zBIqFtDF33ZiExJCHUEoxxN-AYFupHKU5Dx5c7L0JmZZ2lYZAao9RwnQxsFFAm1dCw6FhN4w-hFlRLiXnd8LTnb5t_DldUk84PjbCLHS7kfYRvL7SkA0Ilia1g-F1fiMpVcEoF1l7FLRCjusfn6WScEgv6_i4IOA%3D%3D)

This is getting SAD, Fellow American.

**FIRST,** the Republican Party entrusted YOU to complete our BRAND-NEW [**May Republican Platform Audit.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7bcc149985b84819a7720d7499f55a15&_e=vABs19zKojh0z2oBKgjFHTRju883h2K3S1ED5Jx7s9PY1oUy6o5W28X5uyq9XuixTUL0b3wOT67DwCc-Gbt8Ohp23ztIGdo7RAvVGVhn4Ic5dGI33A94D3YWR4BliYHljibq0Jhtc2F8Iirm_Fe4wQVJtzoZyYYoL9i-gULA-hQ7oZHb_PK-DDEta1prdiN4N1uV8RtbKejRfWVJFFbSREMBGBi9dmut5SnNJGSGHnhPQvHTzAXDnnO-QIUULMuPNugpCO1hyUYSDvVG8wuGLg9dItURFneMfG3i82EH-CalprSduR9BU0zBIqFtDF33f57us5Jz0LZd-F7UI9XXcNqz0KO-jdT6KEBFpTtfktErlm8293dX7EG_hS-B7Flkx4guooGzqlBAv_YmfZlMCZgYfJMjIaCcmzohzMalDpIXZzcYZOwyfQ_q9jwMQ7_6J07t4bNPhLCCAxQDs3KPmQ%3D%3D)

**THEN,** Josh Hawley reached out AGAIN to remind you of the importance of this historic undertaking.

**NOW,** we’re reaching out ONE MORE TIME to ask for your completed [**audit**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7bcc149985b84819a7720d7499f55a15&_e=vABs19zKojh0z2oBKgjFHTRju883h2K3S1ED5Jx7s9PY1oUy6o5W28X5uyq9XuixTUL0b3wOT67DwCc-Gbt8Ohp23ztIGdo7RAvVGVhn4Ic5dGI33A94D3YWR4BliYHljibq0Jhtc2F8Iirm_Fe4wQVJtzoZyYYoL9i-gULA-hQ7oZHb_PK-DDEta1prdiN4N1uV8RtbKejRfWVJFFbSREMBGBi9dmut5SnNJGSGHnhPQvHTzAXDnnO-QIUULMuPNugpCO1hyUYSDvVG8wuGLg9dItURFneMfG3i82EH-CalprSduR9BU0zBIqFtDF33ulcBVWk3HjWBW6UH8v2L9GpRXyfm3Quqfon8r4Cix3i_9gkZVpjy4E_0_Bf-UZ4dSINbT0Apph9MqXqZD7kBRmwHupTLUyUST2PgKku8s2NgCx88LXob4y-io9H40zXgWNjrRoU7ZO6of7MOfsbqdw%3D%3D) before the opportunity is GONE.

**OFFICIAL MAY REPUBLICAN PLATFORM AUDIT**
**DO YOU THINK IT’S OK FOR CREDIT CARD COMPANIES TO TRACK GUN PURCHASES?**

[**YES**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7bcc149985b84819a7720d7499f55a15&_e=vABs19zKojh0z2oBKgjFHTRju883h2K3S1ED5Jx7s9PY1oUy6o5W28X5uyq9XuixTUL0b3wOT67DwCc-Gbt8Ohp23ztIGdo7RAvVGVhn4Ic5dGI33A94D3YWR4BliYHljibq0Jhtc2F8Iirm_Fe4wQVJtzoZyYYoL9i-gULA-hQ7oZHb_PK-DDEta1prdiN4N1uV8RtbKejRfWVJFFbSREMBGBi9dmut5SnNJGSGHnhPQvHTzAXDnnO-QIUULMuPNugpCO1hyUYSDvVG8wuGLg9dItURFneMfG3i82EH-CalprSduR9BU0zBIqFtDF338sf1eb8SBuNNSAFBwk6piKQSYl0lFXvp3ak0cXS_q7sPJ5lvwVHQ_EWqkDx02GpNtfvoXQDNcNnmQoZrLMP2wkOLqR1kqMjjx6W5u8EGIN55HlOVCOalkPv489w7LwFczopcggfF8XyvA88oiqTwWg%3D%3D)

TO BAN GAS STOVES? **

[**YES**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7bcc149985b84819a7720d7499f55a15&_e=vABs19zKojh0z2oBKgjFHTRju883h2K3S1ED5Jx7s9PY1oUy6o5W28X5uyq9XuixTUL0b3wOT67DwCc-Gbt8Ohp23ztIGdo7RAvVGVhn4Ic5dGI33A94D3YWR4BliYHljibq0Jhtc2F8Iirm_Fe4wQVJtzoZyYYoL9i-gULA-hQ7oZHb_PK-DDEta1prdiN4N1uV8RtbKejRfWVJFFbSREMBGBi9dmut5SnNJGSGHnhPQvHTzAXDnnO-QIUULMuPNugpCO1hyUYSDvVG8wuGLg9dItURFneMfG3i82EH-CalprSduR9BU0zBIqFtDF33iY2Pebbl4BJoIt5tTh-KWQikpsqSwyAJRbinES9nArT3AlM5Uc5rO67_d087VbfqDgsmxUfBmWHBRJhBvS7XVOGJOFHtQ_UtiapTKNLggJQKKUxsuCbiWvXq95C4asfl_v6wD0xIkEUAKLgdi87UvQ%3D%3D)

| | Peter,

| **After five hours of debate on Tuesday,** LB 574 passed Select File and advanced with Senator Hansen’s amendment to ban abortion after 12 weeks! In addition, LB 574 continues on a path to limit the sex change industry from pursuing our kids before the age of 19!

_This happened despite the loud chanting and disruption of Radical Left attendees._

**The Final Reading of the bill will happen on Friday, and we encourage you to join us as an active and present show of support at the Capitol Rotunda. **

Together, we can make a resounding statement to our elected officials about our determination to uphold Conservative values together!

Your presence will send a powerful message of unity and determination. **[If you’re not able to join us, you can opt to support our stand with a contribution.](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=2e5e4c7972&e=25844e23a8)**

body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=52d9d165d45c41c1acdc4ad53ac9eccd&_e=WigSiL12t_0WV_iboa7sy0DScVlyMnxUS-JyTpSCjDIaK_iyj_IRsy2IkCic-Y8SHP3RarudbgnAmPdvmmOL-8D31VNNAlsGO8fiFDAbL4i9dpoeL_mPGt5SN7MPcQZvLZwbmGXtl44kKr8UdnCzYuxaUY6XtBoWeWw8LZqCjg0bpQFkYr_sGU_v7flTzsvrNJjLpaUq1B1cosDSndwcUD7DLc9Mu_La7b5KTQ_TDNI%3D)

| | You won't believe this, my friend... Joe Biden allowed Title 42 to expire last week, and within a few days of that disastrous decision, _**SIX men on the FBI terror watchlist were caught trying to cross our border illegally!**_
---
[**Keep Terrorists _OUT_ >> $6**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=52d9d165d45c41c1acdc4ad53ac9eccd&_e=WigSiL12t_0WV_iboa7sy0DScVlyMnxUS-JyTpSCjDIaK_iyj_IRsy2IkCic-Y8SHP3RarudbgnAmPdvmmOL-6g1i-ASvk08uALhZgDDFekYlapjbvcewjChmeurrrESQu3J010xPDMfrRpw9X_v5hrVcHK9rQEkrbMo0TktxfDN23Kz0Us0KEYOr2Ks8PhTfr_A6nTp-51TXeskZncVaCV5PbRv4Nd0F_tJEfJPQu0%3D)
---
Our national security is put at risk when weak Democrats allow our borders to remain open so they can appease their radical donors. How can we expect them to keep us safe if we can't even expect them to keep terrorists from entering our country illegally? The situation has gotten so bad that national guard troops from other Republican states are now coming in to assist Texas in managing this crisis. **If Biden won't step up and do his job, we're going to have to do it for him, my friend!** The national security of our country is one of my top priorities, and that starts with ending the crisis on our southern border. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Has Colorado Gone Bat Sh*t Crazy?
body:
Episode #9 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi Peter, Research has consequences, sometimes good, sometimes bad. National Institutes of Health, yes Andrew Fauci's organization, recently awarded Colorado State University [$6.7 million](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-y/) to build a 14,000 square foot [bat research lab](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-j/) in Fort Collins in order to conduct "gain-of-function" research on bat-borne and bat-associated diseases. A group of concerned citizens here in Colorado is asking for more time, more information, and for transparency around CSU's proposal to build this bat vivarium in our backyard, requesting a moratorium be placed on the project until more is known about how COVID-19 originated, as we've seen several new documents released in the past several months. **In this week's episode of Unleashed, we consider important questions like:**
_Is the risk worth the reward? What actually is "gain-of-function" research and should we be doing it here in Colorado? Is CSU equipped to handle this, especially after past leaks that led to chronic wasting disease? Why NOT put a pause on all of this, Larimer County? Governor Polis? CSU? What's the harm in more time for community discussions? To earn our trust back following COVID?_Tune into today's episode where I interview the head of Covid Bat Research Moratorium of Colorado (CBRMC), Christine Bowman.
### **Episode #9 - HAS COLORADO GONE BAT S**T CRAZY?**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-t/) [WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-i/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-d/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-h/) _Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack.[You can subscribe here!](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-k/)_
## **ICYMI: Here's what you missed on social this week!**
### **1\. Happy Mother's Day to all the MAD MOMS out there. I will never stop fighting for our kids!**
To all my beautiful friends raising kids or helping with grandkids in this crazy world right now, my heart goes out to you. Keep fighting the fight. While they may not appreciate the fight now, they certainly will in 5, 10, 20 years when their quality of life is better because of YOU. I know it feels hard right now when there are SO many battles for us parents to fight, but there's too much on the line. Our kids' and grandkids' future is on the line.I'm so grateful for [this beautiful post](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-b/) my daughter wrote for me this Mother's Day, a reflection of the last several years fighting this fight. On a lighter note, listen to some of my kiddos' favorite moments from the campaign trail in [Episode 7 of Unleashed](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-n/)!
### **2\. The Ganahl kiddos take a trip down memory lane, reminiscing on their favorite parts of the campaign.**
Last week, I attended the Colorado Prayer Luncheon. Jared Polis, one of the keynote speakers, asked us to welcome in the thousands of migrants being bussed into Colorado... even to welcome them into our homes. This was BEFORE Title 42 expired. Funny how he can ask 500+ faith leaders in the state to fix the problem HE created, yet he hasn't made a PEEP on the issue via social media and I haven't seen one call to action. Meanwhile, 3,500 illegals have crossed the southern border of Colorado since December 9th...Instead of waiting on the feds like he wants us to, how about take some action to protect our citizens? Like canceling our status as a sanctuary state, supporting our law enforcement on the frontlines, or cracking down on crime and drug dealers?! All things our governor is fully capable of doing. [See the full thread on Twitter.](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-p/) [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-x/)
### **3\. Denver plummets to the bottom of the 'Best Places to Live' rankings while also being named #15 most dangerous places.**
Just three years ago, Denver was rated #1 on the U.S. News & World Report for 'Best Places to Live' -- but we've now [plummeted to the #99 spot](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-m/). While they say the biggest reason is housing costs, it may also have something to do with our capital city being named #15 Most Dangerous Place in their [real estate report](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-c/). Congratulations to our governor, the Democrat-run Colorado legislature, the Democrats running Denver, and Denver/Colorado voters who voted for Democrats. This is what you wanted, right? [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-q/) If you've been liking the podcast so far, [here are the ways you can help us grow](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alyhhdt-ttjjilthht-a/)!See you next week! clean_body: Episode #9 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE! Hi Peter, Research has consequences, sometimes good, sometimes bad. National Institutes of Health, yes Andrew Fauci's organization, recently awarded Colorado State University to build a 14,000 square foot in Fort Collins in order to conduct "gain-of-function" research on bat-borne and bat-associated diseases. A group of concerned citizens here in Colorado is asking for more time, more information, and for transparency around CSU's proposal to build this bat vivarium in our backyard, requesting a moratorium be placed on the project until more is known about how COVID-19 originated, as we've seen several new documents released in the past several months. In this week's episode of Unleashed, we consider important questions like: Is the risk worth the reward? What actually is "gain-of-function" research and should we be doing it here in Colorado? Is CSU equipped to handle this, especially after past leaks that led to chronic wasting disease? Why NOT put a pause on all of this, Larimer County? Governor Polis? CSU? What's the harm in more time for community discussions? To earn our trust back following COVID?Tune into today's episode where I interview the head of Covid Bat Research Moratorium of Colorado (CBRMC), Christine Bowman. Episode #9 - HAS COLORADO GONE BAT ST CRAZY? Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack. ICYMI: Here's what you missed on social this week! 1\. Happy Mother's Day to all the MAD MOMS out there. I will never stop fighting for our kids! To all my beautiful friends raising kids or helping with grandkids in this crazy world right now, my heart goes out to you. Keep fighting the fight. While they may not appreciate the fight now, they certainly will in 5, 10, 20 years when their quality of life is better because of YOU. I know it feels hard right now when there are SO many battles for us parents to fight, but there's too much on the line. Our kids' and grandkids' future is on the line.I'm so grateful for my daughter wrote for me this Mother's Day, a reflection of the last several years fighting this fight. On a lighter note, listen to some of my kiddos' favorite moments from the campaign trail in ! 2\. The Ganahl kiddos take a trip down memory lane, reminiscing on their favorite parts of the campaign. Last week, I attended the Colorado Prayer Luncheon. Jared Polis, one of the keynote speakers, asked us to welcome in the thousands of migrants being bussed into Colorado... even to welcome them into our homes. This was BEFORE Title 42 expired. Funny how he can ask 500+ faith leaders in the state to fix the problem HE created, yet he hasn't made a PEEP on the issue via social media and I haven't seen one call to action. Meanwhile, 3,500 illegals have crossed the southern border of Colorado since December 9th...Instead of waiting on the feds like he wants us to, how about take some action to protect our citizens? Like canceling our status as a sanctuary state, supporting our law enforcement on the frontlines, or cracking down on crime and drug dealers?! All things our governor is fully capable of doing. 3\. Denver plummets to the bottom of the 'Best Places to Live' rankings while also being named #15 most dangerous places.** Just three years ago, Denver was rated #1 on the U.S. News & World Report for 'Best Places to Live' -- but we've now . While they say the biggest reason is housing costs, it may also have something to do with our capital city being named #15 Most Dangerous Place in their . Congratulations to our governor, the Democrat-run Colorado legislature, the Democrats running Denver, and Denver/Colorado voters who voted for Democrats. This is what you wanted, right? If you've been liking the podcast so far, you next week! Enjoy that Colorado sunshine, friends.Heidi | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO |

subject: Should teachers unions be in charge of education?

body:

| | Friend, **_In 2021,_** Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation for Teachers, said this... **“**** _Parents claim they have the right to shape their kids’ school curriculum. They don’t.”_** Since then, Weingarten has continued to signal that teachers unions should have the ultimate say on education decisions, **not parents.**
That’s why we’re reaching out to get your opinion on this issue. **Who should have the final say over children’s education: parents or teachers unions?**

name: American Defense News
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zns9bfru2ismveontp4jfg83dk4jairj6qbv5140_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5ie0ob1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0b4j5jnrvkvpept666gah0m5e8jflsvqv3vsdao_rp22sh2s8i66o71c5ie0ob1c1h2bs)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Defense News
---

name: Cherise Trump; Mrs. Trump; C. Trump; Trump
subject: Trinity University Censors My Free Speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Speech
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vshP3m3DNs

Trinity University in Texas labeled me "an elevated risk" and
forced me to pay "special liability insurance" because my last
name is Trump.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oshP3m3DNs

Friend,

Trinity
University in Texas labeled me "an elevated risk" and forced me
to pay "special liability insurance" because my last name is
Trump. Will you stand with me now and demand the university
reverse this?

That's
right... before I could step foot on campus for my event
promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, was
forced to pay for special liability insurance.

The Young
Conservatives of Texas, who sponsored my speech, told me they
have NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before.

Will you
join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they
should overturn this outrageous decision? Add your name to our
open letter right now.

Stand
with Speech First

Friend,
even if I were related to President Trump (I'm not related),
Trinity University would still be making a gross misstep and
setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent.

Not only
is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous
political conservative … but it also caters to the "Woke"
student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone whom
far-left students might find objectionable.

Put
simply, when school administrators let "Woke" student protestors
hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation -
and our educational system - ends up: A small number of far-left
student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and
free thinking suffer!

After
all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were
Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?

I don't
think so!

Friend,
add your name to Speech First's open letter right now to tell
Trinity University to overturn their outrageous decision …
and show their support for free thinking and free speech instead.

They want
you to think that the issue is over, but their decision sets a
dangerous precedent of discrimination on campus. I urgently need
you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the
Leftist administrators at Trinity University.

Thank you
for your support!

Cherise
Trump
Executive
Director
Speech
First

Stand
with Speech First

Paid for by Speech
First.

1300 I St
NW Suite 400E

Washington, DC 20005

You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

name: Friends of Yesli Vega
subject: Final Reminder: Yesli Vega Campaign Kickoff Tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF YESLI VEGA
body:
Saturday May 20th @ Lake Jackson VFD
| | |
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,
Please join me for my campaign kickoff tomorrow morning at 11am the Lake Jackson Volunteer Fire Department in Manassas!
Over the last four years, you've joined me as we've fought for lower property taxes, a safer community, and sensible, citizen-first development. name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: Rudy Glocker and Vikram Mansharamani - NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | |
---
# Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor
---
In this week's episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Rudy Glocker, founder of Burgeon Outdoor. The episode will be aired on The Pulse of New Hampshire this weekend and is available on demand wherever you get your podcasts (links to several sites are at the end of this email).
---
---
EPISODE 10: BURGEON OUTDOOR FOUNDER RUDY GLOCKER
In the latest episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Rudy Glocker, founder of Burgeon Outdoor, about his path from a Penn State football player to a small business owner. He shares lessons learned during his time at Harvard Business School as well as a decade on Wall Street and how those lessons led him to found a clothing business in Lincoln, NH. Rudy also reflects on challenges facing the country, New Hampshire, and small business owners trying to navgiate today's political and economic uncertainty.
---

EPISODE 9: FORMER US SENATOR KELLY AYOTTE
Former US Senator Kelly Ayotte joined Dr. Mansharamani in last week's episode of Navigating Uncertainty to share insights learned along her journey from Nashua to Washington DC and back to New Hampshire. They discuss her time in the courtroom (both as a litigator at McLane Middleton and later as NH's attorney general) and her path to elected politics. She also reveals her love of ice cream (particularly chocolate chip) and her thinking about the greatest challenges facing the United States and New Hampshire.
---
EPISODE 8: NCUA VICE CHAIR KYLE HAUPTMAN
Last week, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Kyle Hauptman, Vice Chair of the National Credit Union Administration. Kyle discusses his time growing up as a "townie" in a place where people use "summer" as a verb, the perspective he gained from his front-row seat at the implosion of Lehman Brothers, his more recent entrance into the world of politics and policy, and his love of movies.
---
EPISODE 7: MAYOR FRANCIS SUAREZ
In the seventh episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Miami Mayor Francis Suarez. Mayor Suarez shares what it was like growing up as the oldest of four children and his path to being elected with 86% of the vote. They discuss how the Mayor navigated his career decisions, his approach to governance, his vision for America, and his love of New Hampshire (yes, New Hampshire!) barbecue.
---
EPISODE 6: GOVERNOR CHRIS SUNUNU
In the sixth episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Chris Sununu, Governor of the State of New Hampshire. Governor Sununu shares what it was like growing up as the seventh of eight children as well as a bit about his time at MIT. They discuss how the Governor navigated his early career decisions, the three ingredients he believes are responsible for New Hampshire's successes, and why he now prefers french toast to pancakes.
---
EPISODE 5: COMMISSIONER FRANK EDELBLUT
In the fifth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Education for the State of New Hampshire. An accountant turned successful businessman, Commissioner Edelblut shared how he has navigated uncertainty in his personal life as well as his thinking around several important education topics. Topics addressed include charter schools, education financing, parental rights, and the increasing importance of lifelong learning.
---

EPISODE 4: COMMISSIONER TAYLOR CASWELL
In the fourth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Commissioner Taylor Caswell, head of the Department of Business and Economic Affairs for the State of New Hampshire. A native of Littleton, Commissioner Caswell shared his philosophy around navigating a career in the public and private sectors, his hopes for a restoration of civil civic engagement, and his love of the outdoors (and cookies)!
---

EPISODE 3: VIVEK RAMASWAMY
In episode three, Dr. Mansahramani speaks with entrepreneur, one-time stand up comic, and prolific author Vivek Ramaswamy about the American dream and what it was like growing up in Ohio. In addition to exploring the power of annoyance, they discuss the key decisions that took Vivek from the Ivy League to a very successful biotech company (with a stint as a comedian along the way)...and his recent announcement to enter the US Presidential contest as part of his quest to help restore an American identity.
---
EPISODE 2: GENERAL LORI ROBINSON
In the second episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with General Lori Robinson, USAF (Ret), a New Hampshire native who served as the Commander of North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD). General Robinson was also America's first female Combatant Commander and served as head of Northern Command. She is an awesome leader, dedicated America who has served the United States for decades, and all around amazing person. She has also faced (and successfully navigated) many forms of uncertainty on her path to becoming a four-star general.
---
EPISODE 1: MIKE ROGERS
In the first episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mike Rogers, former chair of the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, and former multi-term Congressman from Michigan. Mike served in the military and also fought organized crime as a member of the Federal Bureau of Investigation. He's a class act, a first-rate thinker, and a patriotic American who cares deeply about the United States and its future.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iM6r4NVwfM6MjS051ty1wlm_nu8-TgGmTNDf93oBeS9BXcWODdXiz-5oC3RwyAwfyaDkQOXptr-Z0-x67MN4aJ7o0LGN8FO8np6TxLc-xEqGBspTI-f6ccnqhvNZSztzGpq7XzJeQ35UanKx3uC-PA==&c=SEAvy-zzN-hOaNcRHzdTtsgPdTPu2EDFlBAwN6wsNtNaRZnOFn6XGw==&ch=_iS1I_rCSYQtxQ1SNYalQGIxnl4jL4PtlHo6O_QbJIZhSYFnmkq00w==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!
To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at [www.mansharamani.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iM6r4NVwfM6MjS051ty1wlm_nu8-TgGmTNDf93oBeS9BXcWODdXiz-5oC3RwyAwfyaDkQOXptr-Z0-x67MN4aJ7o0LGN8FO8np6TxLc-xEqGBspTI-f6ccnqhvNZSztzGpq7XzJeQ35UanKx3uC-PA==&c=SEAvy-zzN-hOaNcRHzdTtsgPdTPu2EDFlBAwN6wsNtNaRZnOFn6XGw==&ch=_iS1I_rCSYQtxQ1SNYalQGIxnl4jL4PtlHo6O_QbJIZhSYFnmkq00w==).

EPISODE 1: MIKE ROGERS In the first episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mike Rogers, former chair of the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, and former multi-term Congressman from Michigan. Mike served in the military and also fought organized crime as a member of the Federal Bureau of Investigation. He's a class act, a first-rate thinker, and a patriotic American who cares deeply about the United States and its future. | | | | Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist == dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available! To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at ==. LINKS TO THE SHOW | | == | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | Vikram Mansharamani | P.O. Box 1376, Concord, NH 03302 | | Sent by mailto:vikram@mansharamani.com in collaboration with

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Her son ran for his life during a school shooting, and luckily he survived. She wasn't going to just go on with her life, feeling lucky. She wept for the families whose kids didn't come home, and decided to do something about it. She’s running for office against an NRA lackey … and she could win.
body:
Top House pickup opportunity
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ec3dfcb-dd6b-48df-a128-1f0c5dfec54c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[_This Horrible GOP Extremist Won By Only 1600 Votes Last Time And Must Lose!_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb41ca8b1-638b-416e-89d5-2da7c67de3a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_The extremist Congressman--in one of our top opportunities to give Democrats a House Majority--is NRA backed John James, from Michigan’s 10th District, who wants to let every terrorist and criminal have a gun._** **_Meanwhile, an incredible Democrat has jumped in the race. Emily Busch went through hell and back on Nov. 30th, 2021, when her son was at Oxford High School as a mass shooter--a terrorist armed by GOP policy--murdered four and injured seven with a weapon he NEVER should have had._** _Her son Andrew had to run for his life, and luckily he survived. But in the long tradition of Mothers Against Drunk Driving and Moms Demand Action, she wasn't going to just go on with her life, feeling lucky. __**She wept for the four sets of parents whose kids didn't come home, and decided to do something about it.**_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1e8565f-538f-4924-b8b4-7598551362d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We need public servants like Busch who care about their community and run not for power, but what's right. For these very same reasons, Rep. James, who won by the skin of his teeth last time, MUST become an ex-Congressman._ [**_Busch just kicked off her campaign. Will you join us in helping her gear up immediately by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to this brave, empathetic mother & congressional candidate, so we can take the House and pass the gun safety measures we so desperately need?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T979c9dc3-7931-48bd-985b-12796f5a7b4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for trying to put an end to our country's gun madness._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5556bbf6-2b4a-4f05-baeb-bf83877f9e6f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dc3db9e436c146f19e51f98f52a2bb9c&_e=4KpF6o8QkfWBaWMap3dmon8DUfq3exZknvfubyY-ODrrwyLhG8bYOdzde3yEvv9ER_9aMEOYqnDBWWUDS_gf7EH8iZgUxFnnsu0T0PWu2-vV8_glKj9VzWmwCn2Q1yQ2LLtNNkiFPUOC3T384ZghsY5Sn9OJZEGmxnaMshR70WOyqXyMbrcOfzZBKpnCnYB9GtdO89Sg-Ey2UMNKbNB36XhwA07BGHS__4GaTfjQ0wCCug6mMWj3wcR59UxosfxykdqqzZGEQjNALKm-WIDciK4-YwKASZKo6GP8-ImWGPuCmKQKX5KwKa_f2Lt8FGUAHLyGTXoR53fgKaiOBoe3TAwcKplXisnsxF4qdMEizypTrpWyd8CdUDWv2-E6JK6bRW6GdZCj3xkB1cZ5N6G8JEpJ5PGXVt3U4Y8Da7qEuj8Xq2y4bLiLKkmVlW_nVIiD)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dc3db9e436c146f19e51f98f52a2bb9c&_e=4KpF6o8QkfWBaWMap3dmon8DUfq3exZknvfubyY-ODrrwyLhG8bYOdzde3yEvv9ER_9aMEOYqnDBWWUDS_gf7EH8iZgUxFnnsu0T0PWu2-vV8_glKj9VzWmwCn2Q1yQ2LLtNNkiFPUOC3T384ZghsY5Sn9OJZEGmxnaMshR70WOyqXyMbrcOfzZBKpnCnYB9GtdO89Sg-Ey2UMNKbNB36XhwA07BGHS__4GaTfjQ0wCCug6mMWj3wcR59UxosfxykdqqzZGEQjNALKm-WIDciOfI1qGI8buoQy7rA5LaPs8qdnMxjaLjWyh4eHLehQWEdKAxtGS0GkrxnrIlSri5VJJ8HjxaUPlDyPhvHPWemh45nd5YB51sBl6SU9Nbid3uPdhvP-rNDOIUKR5vQ376uzqfPnR-_5n1zKGWF5HPnsXqVRuFzdSHg0ttKd4rKwnZ)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dc3db9e436c146f19e51f98f52a2bb9c&_e=4KpF6o8QkfWBaWMap3dmon8DUfq3exZknvfubyY-ODrrwyLhG8bYOdzde3yEvv9ER_9aMEOYqnDBWWUDS_gf7EH8iZgUxFnnsu0T0PWu2-vV8_glKj9VzWmwCn2Q1yQ2LLtNNkiFPUOC3T384ZghsY5Sn9OJZEGmxnaMshR70WOyqXyMbrcOfzZBKpnCnYB9GtdO89Sg-Ey2UMNKbNB36XhwA07BGHS__4GaTfjQ0wCCug6mMWj3wcR59UxosfxykdqqzZGEQjNALKm-WIDciOOQQFHZOKcubKgBezmP6_W7dS3tsh4mb4b2nxoA2qywtUGNuZFZhvfSvn8saMrxj51BAY2B1YTUvkGje_SKf9aIkxnQZ0BWhQyIdhLd8DaYYsvu81VClP8JkBOXrxyEvQS_-O-kdnKmrerOtHUbSr20ZKj9DNh5eDdmaiWVLiiK)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: JAMES JUDGE
subject: Reminder: WATCH: We’re Helping to Defund Left-Wing PBS
body:
Taxpayer-funded PBS is trying to indoctrinate our children with its “LGBTQ+ toolkit.”
| | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
Taxpayer-funded PBS is trying to indoctrinate our children with its "LGBTQ+ toolkit."
Thankfully, Citizens Defending Freedom is leading the charge to defund PBS.
In case you missed it, Fox News wrote about our efforts [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ytTALyQiA0D3ksmNYI-f8WPoAfS0olR8fyGsTo4krH6INdde6wTBUswu0NztnAH_Fd8SD7jRxuxyNkG4NHrZ4eoiul0i9S8CNvm8AOxqcP413uyF1JDDzwfsy6HA4R_BkCoaPP-0q0qzWAAxyhnMJu3wyPexzjGgTNdQjqG3HGbPE4Su_9Qn25nc4EncEXDYDsy-wTkR2tFxvs4L6DfN04kOd4yPTuKtsoxGvJcE-pI2xXEeWWCuIhaZhL9a9kxNeNRq1Q9bJQJ5NmmSJd_6lA==&c=aeOp4ZkytT9zUBUEP82xOxPVUXYiqSAqgSSFIL_DVUTXzeHgBhL_Zw==&ch=AZrm4-_dQhaU6Qv-9SCh93kh9b01865jWWLCB8of3t1FHVwFFCOsLA==).
Two days after we called PBS out for indoctrinating children, Oklahoma Gov. Kevin Stitt vetoed a bill that would use tax dollars to fund PBS.
Check out a highlight of our recent podcast segment where we explain more here:

---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ytTALyQiA0D3ksmNYI-f8WPoAfS0olR8fyGsTo4krH6INdde6wTBUswu0NztnAH_yHjpjWdTu5GgDpew1PjcpMqz-k_kWNUhFKuoU2wfJjCnxd1ytlp5UO0jn9vrWc0SgxcQaTd1H7Iqr4o4wZITjxnEA5oGySq_VZlXxoQ362uZU5O5zP3oSqiz2brfiZ0FgL1yPITYFvHMo3S-AbYqJMBLCUnKBp0iutCVIHioT2k=&c=aeOp4ZkytT9zUBUEP82xOxPVUXYiqSAqgSSFIL_DVUTXzeHgBhL_Zw==&ch=AZrm4-_dQhaU6Qv-9SCh93kh9b01865jWWLCB8of3t1FHVwFFCOsLA==)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ytTALyQiA0D3ksmNYI-f8WPoAfS0olR8fyGsTo4krH6INdde6wTBUswu0NztnAH_yHjpjWdTu5GgDpew1PjcpMqz-k_kWNUhFKuoU2wfJjCnxd1ytlp5UO0jn9vrWc0SgxcQaTd1H7Iqr4o4wZITjxnEA5oGySq_VZlXxoQ362uZU5O5zP3oSqiz2brfiZ0FgL1yPITYFvHMo3S-AbYqJMBLCUnKBp0iutCVIHioT2k=&c=aeOp4ZkytT9zUBUEP82xOxPVUXYiqSAqgSSFIL_DVUTXzeHgBhL_Zw==&ch=AZrm4-_dQhaU6Qv-9SCh93kh9b01865jWWLCB8of3t1FHVwFFCOsLA==)
---

[But, here's the bottom line. We need your support to continue fighting to stop our tax dollars from going to fund LGBTQ+ propaganda. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ytTALyQiA0D3ksmNYI-f8WPoAfS0olR8fyGsTo4krH6INdde6wTBUswu0NztnAH_yHjpjWdTu5GgDpew1PjcpMqz-k_kWNUhFKuoU2wfJjCnxd1ytlp5UO0jn9vrWc0SgxcQaTd1H7Iqr4o4wZITjxnEA5oGySq_VZlXxoQ362uZU5O5zP3oSqiz2brfiZ0FgL1yPITYFvHMo3S-AbYqJMBLCUnKBp0iutCVIHioT2k=&c=aeOp4ZkytT9zUBUEP82xOxPVUXYiqSAqgSSFIL_DVUTXzeHgBhL_Zw==&ch=AZrm4-_dQhaU6Qv-9SCh93kh9b01865jWWLCB8of3t1FHVwFFCOsLA==)
[Chip in $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more to join the fight to take back our nation today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ytTALyQiA0D3ksmNYI-f8WPoAfS0olR8fyGsTo4krH6INdde6wTBUswu0NztnAH_yHjpjWdTu5GgDpew1PjcpMqz-k_kWNUhFKuoU2wfJjCnxd1ytlp5UO0jn9vrWc0SgxcQaTd1H7Iqr4o4wZITjxnEA5oGySq_VZlXxoQ362uZU5O5zP3oSqiz2brfiZ0FgL1yPITYFvHMo3S-AbYqJMBLCUnKBp0iutCVIHioT2k=&c=aeOp4ZkytT9zUBUEP82xOxPVUXYiqSAqgSSFIL_DVUTXzeHgBhL_Zw==&ch=AZrm4-_dQhaU6Qv-9SCh93kh9b01865jWWLCB8of3t1FHVwFFCOsLA==)

subject: - My plea, please read
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR BOB**](https://www
body:
If you've already donated this month, thank you! With you by my side, I will never give up. I will never quit. I will never stop fighting fo
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/70OWpIeQo/c?w=P15PlN553YlJ-jJXEiE_8zUF9_0SiYWgiESaNCyqdQQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9zby83ME9XcEllUW8_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/70OWpIeQo/c?w=qdcHC67NKFdhSrFFqpXNQhcQPfSP1NWwygdL3IYuSrg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImQ2YmE2ZmJiLTYyOTYtNDAyMC1jMzAyLTJiZjM5YzE0Y2I2MyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)
---
| | , Money in politics disgusts me. I genuinely despise our political campaign system, and I loathe asking for donations, especially 445 days out from an election. We need campaign finance reform. The sad truth is, for me to compete against my corporate-backed opponent to my right, my campaign requires resources. Early contributions help me build the necessary infrastructure to energize my team, equip our volunteers, and ramp up our voter outreach.
---
| | If you've already donated this month, thank you!With you by my side, I will never give up. I will never quit. I will never stop fighting for you.
---
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/70OWpIeQo/c?w=A_7d7Y02CAJgjVYEIgj-T6uiNnN4zMCf_V87bGt7eY0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjMyOWZhYjFmLTQ1Y2ItNGFmMC05ZTlhLThlZDllOWIyZWE3ZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)
---
| | , I need your help starting the second half of this fundraising quarter with a boost. Can you donate $25, $50, or even $100 to my campaign? Like I said, I really hate to ask, but... Your support is critical to progress and advancing Democratic principles across the rural heartland. We must ensure our party puts up the strongest, most viable Democratic candidate against extremist Trumper, Rep. Bergman. I am confident in our strategy and our two-cycle approach. I've never been more energized, organized, and motivated to take on big money and radical right-wing policies. Rural Michigan yearns for progress, and the opportunity next year is ripe. We have to open up eyes and minds, but with your help, I'm eager to be the candidate to do it.
Grassroots support means everything to me. My opponent may have a couple-hundred big money and dark money backers, but so far this year alone, we have 1,200 dedicated, loyal donors like you and counting, making candidates like me possible.
I grew up in a rural working-class home. My mother raised six kids by herself. During hard times, my family relied on government assistance, but I was blessed with opportunities to thrive, opportunities I want to pass on to our grandchildren and the entire constituency of #MI01. Hardworking rural families are the heart of the Nation, and we deserve nothing less. Our current representative isn't getting the job done. His atrocious voting record makes it more difficult for us to succeed, socially and economically. Jack Bergman is failing Northern Michigan and the UP. We must replace him. We tried like hell in 2022, but a first-time candidate can rarely unseat an incumbent, so after two years on the campaign trail, I'm continuing the battle dauntless with a round two. MI01 hasn't had a repeat candidate in decades, and I'm honored to be the one to build momentum, because with you, it's possible. , will you please join this movement?
I appreciate your consideration.
Best regards,
—Bob
---
| | | [**MAKE A CONTRIBUTION**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/70OWpIeQo/c?w=TnrGDjOSKNzlym5t76-SreciHOumWniYtRTmR6MtOYA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3ZhYmQiLCJyIjoiMjkxM2E4NGEtZGEwYi00ZWM5LWJjNWItNjg4YmE1NTA2NTEzIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)
---
| | If you have recently contributed, thank you. Your donation does not go unnoticed and I appreciate your generosity. Disregard my finance ask, and consider this message a campaign update. It means a lot to have you in my corner.
---
| | | [**PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR BOB**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/70OWpIeQo/c?w=xjh4E8pi_1jH5SmpLXjtcRDlXza-NVr0eKsAPBu7vUs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImM5ZGI2MTgxLTYyODItNDYyZS1hYzdkLTkyNTdiNmE2NGQwYiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)
---
|
---
| | **You've received this email because you are a subscriber of _[this site](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/70OWpIeQo/c?w=WMyi2bAOGIs9HRJ6bbrzUd3qEUoc5T8ybN4wcFqXvGc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS8iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)_.**
---

body:
The Supreme Court gave a big victory to social media giants Google, Twitter, and Facebook in two related cases Thursday, ruling that they couldn’t be held liable for the algorithms they use to filter content for users.

The Supreme Court gave a big victory to social media giants Google, Twitter, and Facebook in two related cases Thursday, ruling that they couldn’t be held liable for the algorithms they use to filter content for users.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# Friday, May 19, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today we’re covering Disney’s latest salvo in its war with Florida, a young boy saving his sister with deadly slingshot aim, and Wendy’s latest project: Robot delivery of pick-up food through underground tunnels. Today is National Nascar Day 🏁. You and I aren't Nascar drivers, so be sure and drive carefully! Is this your first time reading The Flyover? [Sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FqwzAQgOGnkbaY0-msyIOGQvGWrh3N2TrHV-QoOGpK377Qtd1_fvjeL9OFtejt-sa7pLbWiZemT5mgP7nhhH5Cm9MqguKtJBci0RAxRLuliNDHs3Myz0yun1EyU3CZ5wVA1t5qQkAPvRscUMShIyaIIZOPOTIvaAgka6tH91H11jZZy3d9ytEtdbclba3dH8a_GBwNjn8T48fPthv_SmCPlO9fWoo-wtkQXHfW8rtp_6t-AgAA__8wjE2x) and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? [ Drop us a line](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover) and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? [Follow us on Facebook](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FugzAQgOGnsbeg4zDmGDx0YUu6VOqIDHcEtyaOwMLK21ft3P3XL32f1_HqQwyP-81v4vKSRj_ncMoI7aXuL9iMqNktIiiNFldbMqYntKRX5yc21Fqw08LcMYIl4H6akVuD1IEODgEbaOu-BkPYV8YbIMumISbvZ1QGhENOe_WVwiOvssRXOmWv5rTp6Nacn4dq3hQOCodSSrX4WaaUvn8DhcPHKkN8vZ-y36QcCge9O36WEGM4bKcM3Dcf4t8t_4_7CQAA__9B91AL) and stay in touch.
|

## Supreme Court Sides With Google, Twitter
The Supreme Court gave a [big victory](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PozAQQH8NdEbGH8QUFNfQ5dorkWOPw5wMRp4hbP79Kltv__T09P7dl7vHjPvzr99g4lQWHxhfsEgr-lEovag2TglAgW5h6gdnzOjU4Np1SmNSMfl-cHYYtDXWgnnY28Ml77SztsVJSaWl7cdeGqfGzngj3RCNdtF5H1RjJETkUrv_BXdeIeV3eUHtQtnaPK3MBzX6T6PmRs3XdXWpfD1Owh2IPkyj5qNkZAzUqJnOo8IGIpSzsqhnBhJUAvosNojoxRP9ziSCJyDBK9YoDl_5LULZGXYWEUL-yIWPsQKRIAiMZRdKy7ZO8bgwZ6Th1hj53Dzmn1D-_dt3AAAA___7XHLX) to social media giants Google, Twitter, and Facebook in two related cases Thursday, ruling that they couldn't be held liable for the algorithms they use to filter content for users. The two Court decisions were narrowly tailored, determining only that the content at issue, involving terrorist videos, didn't rise to the level of liability. Left undecided for now was the much bigger issue of determining the [reach of Section 230](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u8yAUQJ_G3ojg8mMYGL4lW761o4Xh2qHFwYKbWH37Kp07Hp3l6Hzc5lvIJT-2_2FHT2udQ6T8wplrJhwDOcOY_IoIKEf0wlilnAVjx7sHqYSJyQirhAOLclmkkEnAkqSdFB-zBw6Sa-EEVxbcRQXFrUlK2mRDiDAojilTbZfPmh90x7V81xe2S6z7WPyd6OiD_DfAdYBrOB549rd6Q6McCw5w7c-j4Y4s1mcjRthabbnvrISzPzN1ttW6FWR0ZiJsbA0Rl1q_mOHKaQSpuHaW6ymKadVaR6c5LNqZsfl0nLmU3M00KL7tIZffMvp71E8AAAD__4UiaHU), the law that currently shields social media platforms from responsibility for their content.
## Disney Cancels $1 Billion Project in Florida
Disney has canceled its [$1 billion plan](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSpCAQgOGn0QwLGlQICC4xm0svtHqkmekrFAvYceftt3bjzf_gr-_fbb0hJz4ef3En32JecWv8olWOQjkBeoU--EgEpHvyarLGOAuT7Z8e7_M8Sie1VTSPKkaanB6dRRhBzkr17EGClqNyShoLbjBopJ2C0TZYxA06Iylwy2X4n_loT4rpnV9Uhi3vffLP1s7a6T8dLB0s13UNMX_ePyofVOt308Fy5sSNt9rBErge9BZ1K3hWoe4iplw4oAj0opTPnY4mLiwiUMWjcRUFH1T74sN5cUpcp7kz8rEjp5-D9jvIVwAAAP__i_hjpQ) to move 2,000 California employees to a new campus outside Orlando, Fla., in an escalation of its battle with Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis. The company cited "changing business conditions" for its reversal, [but DeSantis said](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D1uhDAQQOHTQGdk_ENM4SIN3aZNiQZ7zE5kPCtjLdnbR0md_hVP3-dtvQFlKvsHHOhb4hVCoyeu0opxFkqvqo8-ISrUPfpxcsbMTk2uv_tk5Yh22yYVkk1usiCtmTdnDBhtt9STV1Jpacd5lMapeTBgpJui0S46gKA6IzFS4zp8MZV2x5Rf_MQ6BD767O-tPc5Ov3dq6dRyXdeQ-FtbrhlK5N-oU0vB6-zUEuks-BIBSsB8CiiNAj2gYRQBMiWuhUDQATsVxEplFxUzB2jERTQWKXOlCH318XFRznROb52R-wGU_37a_zw_AQAA__8EOWnQ) Disney had already dithered on the project for two years. Disney and DeSantis have been at war in the courts over governance of Disney's property outside Orlando, a battle sparked when Disney took a strong stand against a Florida law setting age restrictions on sex-and-gender education in public schools.
## Young Boy Saves Sister With Slingshot
A Michigan boy used a slingshot to [save his 8-year-old sister](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuhDAQBNCvMZ2RWWzOFC7S0F3alGgPL7CJsRH2Hbq_j0idboqRZvS-7uMdOXBcPnEjV-Y04lT4RaMysukltCNU3s1EQG1Frums1r2Fzlar07Yz-jGZW_-YPdGtUTMa6-0MYACMrtiBglaZpm-UttDXGrWyndet9RZxAqEVeS7pqL8Tx7LSHN7pRUc9pa0Kbi1lz6L9EDAIGM7zrMtKyxMPzxivjoDhmWWkMwsYri0Bw4ZvAUOjr8jTygtG-UhvmfFFWWbOhQ65p0KxMAb5wz7ivtMh88WQ11Sqw_n95BA4dzeh1bIhh79L5X-h3wAAAP__ILNojw) from a potential kidnapper while the young girl was foraging for mushrooms in the woods outside their home. Police say the boy, 13, heard his sister scream and saw an older teenage boy dragging her away. He leaned out his window and fired rocks at the assailant from his slingshot. When police caught the attacker, he had visible injuries. ["I was just lucky,"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O6yAQRp_G7hwNw_BXUNwmXW67pYVhiFmREBmUKG-_ytZbfvqKo3O-LusllFru1__hxn7ktoY4ypNXUItwC8oV5-QzM7Kc2QttiZxFbefdJ9TALCg71Ia37EhSiomM0tFAVHPxCChBCSeALLoTBQKrE0mbbAgRJwJOZbTj9N3Kfeyc67s9-TjFdpur38d49En-m_A84Tk87vzqn-szjlFi5QnPW3sv_WPQ9zaWHp7cl1764GNhoYWJUgMamSSoJCygyptm2py0cj58erxKraVrMxFcb6HUX_b4O8VPAAAA___FRl3I) the brother said.
➤ **Florida** Gov. Ron DeSantis is expected to officially launch his 2024 presidential campaign next week. Sources say the announcement will come at an event in Miami for his longtime donors and supporters. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQBb_GdEZmMZwpKNLQXdqUaLEX2MTYyPYdyd9Hlzrdk14xo_m4z3dkz2F7x4PGssYZbeEnzaqTzSChnaFy40oE1FY0Nr3RejDQm2ofV9XopV_A3lZAahW4pTNqUKu2ZG6uq3gEBa3qmqFR2sBQa9TK9E63xhlEC0Irclxiqj8jh7LT6n_ik1Jt41H5cS_lzKJ9EzAJmK7rqu2SA1359QuYXlPAlGKQjjKGwlmWKD0-gt0lKNDyTJTZUSiMXlo8TuQtyEDfRV5EXzLHR7KU5epjYodye-FDTAKmKo3uvNh7zv1NaLUdyP7PrPwf6jcAAP__C_JsiQ)) ➤ **Rep. Marjorie Taylor** Greene announced she was filing impeachment articles against President Biden. This was "impeachment week" for Greene: She also filed impeachment papers against FBI director Christopher Wray, Atty. Gen. Merrick Garland, and DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas.([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4yAQRb_G7rBgIF5cUGzjLttuaY1hHE-EwQI23vz9U179qivd0xydv_fljhw5Pf7gQa5teUHf-EWLvAk1CdAL9MFtREC6J6dGa8xkYbT97tQkVzKEegOD63QLo94krHK1XqEk1bMDCVre1KSksTANBo20YzDaBovooTOSArdchmfm1Hba4ju_qAw-H310e2tn7fTvDuYO5uu6hi3_T3TVD-9gPnPkxr52MB9YnrkwiYbvmIt4FKJEAlPK_5KnKvg4Cf1-UGoCS2MfqYqzUOXwudbP9MWF8-IYuY6_OiMfB3L8dmk_p_kKAAD__96IaSQ)) ➤ **Warner Bros** Discovery's CEO defended CNN chief Chris Licht against criticism for putting Donald Trump on CNN last week. He said that the struggling news network had to broaden its appeal and is looking to put more Republicans on-air. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFzhCAQBeBfgx0OLmiwsEhjd2lTOhtYvU0QHODOuX-fMXXa95rvvc_bckMOHLcP3Gmqa1rQVX7SonrZjRL0Ao2fViIg3dDUDdaY0cJgm_uEvR1WNxgERN055Yztte1Hp2l0DseGJ1CgVd-NnTIWxtagUXbwRltvER0Io8hzTbn9ThzrndbwSk_KrUt7E6Z7rUcR-l3ALGA-z7PN9KiUy9VfScrBC5gfRcDsYpQb1cpxk3vKJDMdj6_ADmORKUrkLLnKQvRT5JECV3YYpOcn5cL1JS-rvGZbAXOTJ3-cHAKX4U0Yte3I4Y9V_3_pNwAA__95NWm1)) ➤ **Montana** banned TikTok within the state’s borders starting next January, the first state to do so despite technology and free speech concerns. No one seems to know how the new law can or will be enforced, and legal challenges are expected. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL_GdEZmbYxduEhDd2lTog1ewDmwT77Nofx9ROqUI41mnt7Hbbph2lNe3_GgwEuZcOb0okn1svMS9ARNDAsRkG4odNYZ4x1Y12zBWttZH7WHhYahV6icVd3gAeMcvYYmBVCgVd_5ThkHvjVolLPRaBcd4gzCKIqJS22_Ssq80bL_lBfVdi5Hs4eN-fEU-k3AKGA8z7PljV5UV7oKAsZrXsDYCxi74craOgveCBiPkhkzSk53Lnf5iVk-05opyvV6yKXKNWFeSmWSc_mu3NQQH2fa9_S0gzBqPTDtfyT8v5jfAAAA___jq2Jx))

* * *
_Flying together with:_ [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQANCvgS0WHIcDA0MXb-na0aJwjq_GxrKRo_59pc75gSe9r8f4iFx4e37GlUKb6hhT44tGZW_a38CMIHOYiICMpKB7h-gd9E7OIVuLlNyEd_ttJgW9h6TRWspWJ-NJcgAFRlnttUIHvsOIyvUZjcsuxgQCFWVu9eh-Km9tpqn81ouOLtVVljC3tp_CfAgYBAyFt-XszlfczxbT0qUqYFiSveQR8v7iUvjs7wLVc41c_on2fvQXAAD__8CbTCI) Feel like going on a last-minute trip this weekend? Need a vacation in a far-flung location but don't want to pay for expensive flights? [FareDrop](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQANCvgS0WHIcDA0MXb-na0aJwjq_GxrKRo_59pc75gSe9r8f4iFx4e37GlUKb6hhT44tGZW_a38CMIHOYiICMpKB7h-gd9E7OIVuLlNyEd_ttJgW9h6TRWspWJ-NJcgAFRlnttUIHvsOIyvUZjcsuxgQCFWVu9eh-Km9tpqn81ouOLtVVljC3tp_CfAgYBAyFt-XszlfczxbT0qUqYFiSveQR8v7iUvjs7wLVc41c_on2fvQXAAD__8CbTCI) can help. It's a service that finds outrageous deals on flights from your local airport. Just [enter your zip code](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQANCvgS0WHIcDA0MXb-na0aJwjq_GxrKRo_59pc75gSe9r8f4iFx4e37GlUKb6hhT44tGZW_a38CMIHOYiICMpKB7h-gd9E7OIVuLlNyEd_ttJgW9h6TRWspWJ-NJcgAFRlnttUIHvsOIyvUZjcsuxgQCFWVu9eh-Km9tpqn81ouOLtVVljC3tp_CfAgYBAyFt-XszlfczxbT0qUqYFiSveQR8v7iUvjs7wLVc41c_on2fvQXAAD__8CbTCI), then see the list of all the cheap flights you could grab. (For example: as The Flyover was taxiing to the runway last night, FareDrop had flights available from Tulsa to Athens, Greece for $300 or Costa Rica for $241) Even if you don't book a flight today, it's a [lot of fun](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQANCvgS0WHIcDA0MXb-na0aJwjq_GxrKRo_59pc75gSe9r8f4iFx4e37GlUKb6hhT44tGZW_a38CMIHOYiICMpKB7h-gd9E7OIVuLlNyEd_ttJgW9h6TRWspWJ-NJcgAFRlnttUIHvsOIyvUZjcsuxgQCFWVu9eh-Km9tpqn81ouOLtVVljC3tp_CfAgYBAyFt-XszlfczxbT0qUqYFiSveQR8v7iUvjs7wLVc41c_on2fvQXAAD__8CbTCI) to see the possibilities. Just throw your local airport in the search bar and see what's available. You might be surprised! [Click to try it out](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQANCvgS0WHIcDA0MXb-na0aJwjq_GxrKRo_59pc75gSe9r8f4iFx4e37GlUKb6hhT44tGZW_a38CMIHOYiICMpKB7h-gd9E7OIVuLlNyEd_ttJgW9h6TRWspWJ-NJcgAFRlnttUIHvsOIyvUZjcsuxgQCFWVu9eh-Km9tpqn81ouOLtVVljC3tp_CfAgYBAyFt-XszlfczxbT0qUqYFiSveQR8v7iUvjs7wLVc41c_on2fvQXAAD__8CbTCI) for free today. If you find a deal you can't resist, send us a postcard 🙂
➤ **Tiger Woods** won in court against his ex-girlfriend who wanted a release from her non-disclosure agreement as well as $30 million for alleged sexual harassment. A judge ruled that the NDA was valid and that any other financial negotiations had to go to arbitration. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQgOGnwQ4HF1QsKNLQXdqUDieL7g2Cg9yZe_tMUqf-m3--r9t8cxQprZ9uR1NDnt1S6YWz6Hk3cZAzNN4EREDZoOkGrdSkYdDNZvr7OIIWSmMQSqi7BljQ93LEaerFdG_IgAAp-m7qhNIwtcopoQevpPbauQWYEuip5tI-MqW6YYjv_MLSLnlvotlqPU4mPxhYBva6rhbPI_1GBnbNMTCwZ83lzcDODCx5BlaOwyi17hnYx9OvyAs-cKknd7XiflReacXCr5z9yfGbr1RiKITJcyy0OL5h2V3i6RkjhTdP3jXF-OOiGOkcRqbEujuKf4_1f7KfAAAA__98ym12)) ➤ **The Preakness Stakes** takes place Saturday. clean_body: The Supreme Court gave a big victory to social media giants Google, Twitter, and Facebook in two related cases Thursday, ruling that they couldn’t be held liable for the algorithms they use to filter content for users. The Supreme Court gave a big victory to social media giants Google, Twitter, and Facebook in two related cases Thursday, ruling that they couldn’t be held liable for the algorithms they use to filter content for users. | | | | | | Friday, May 19, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering Disney’s latest salvo in its war with Florida, a young boy saving his sister with deadly slingshot aim, and Wendy’s latest project: Robot delivery of pick-up food through underground tunnels. Today is National Nascar Day 🏁. You and I aren't Nascar drivers, so be sure and drive carefully! Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. | Supreme Court Sides With Google, Twitter The Supreme Court gave a to social media giants Google, Twitter, and Facebook in two related cases Thursday, ruling that they couldn't be held liable for the algorithms they use to filter content for users. The two Court decisions were narrowly tailored, determining only that the content at issue, involving terrorist videos, didn't rise to the level of liability. Left undecided for now was the much bigger issue of determining the , the law that currently shields social media platforms from responsibility for their content. Disney Cancels $1 Billion Project in Florida Disney has canceled its to move 2,000 California employees to a new campus outside Orlando, Fla., in an escalation of its battle with Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis. The company cited "changing business conditions" for its reversal, Disney had already dithered on the project for two years. Disney and DeSantis have been at war in the courts over governance of Disney's property outside Orlando, a battle sparked when Disney took a strong stand against a Florida law setting age restrictions on sex-and-gender education in public schools. Young Boy Saves Sister With Slingshot A Michigan boy used a slingshot to from a potential kidnapper while the young girl was foraging for mushrooms in the woods outside their home. Police say the boy, 13, heard his sister scream and saw an older teenage boy dragging her away. He leaned out his window and fired rocks at the assailant from his slingshot. When police caught the attacker, he had visible injuries. the brother said. ➤ Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis is expected to officially launch his 2024 presidential campaign next week. Sources say the announcement will come at an event in Miami for his longtime donors and supporters. () ➤ Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene announced she was filing impeachment articles against President Biden. This was "impeachment week" for Greene: She also filed impeachment papers against FBI director Christopher Wray, Atty. Gen. Merrick Garland, and DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas.() ➤ Warner Bros Discovery's CEO defended CNN chief Chris Licht against criticism for putting Donald Trump on CNN last week. He said that the struggling news network had to broaden its appeal and is looking to put more Republicans on-air. () ➤ Montana banned TikTok within the state’s borders starting next January, the first state to do so despite technology and free speech concerns. No one seems to know how the new law can or will be enforced, and legal challenges are expected. () Flying together with: Feel like going on a last-minute trip this weekend? Need a vacation in a far-flung location but don't want to pay for expensive flights? can help. It's a service that finds outrageous deals on flights from your local airport. Just , then see the list of all the cheap flights you could grab. (For example: as The Flyover was taxiing to the runway last night, FareDrop had flights available from Tulsa to Athens, Greece for $300 or Costa Rica for $241) Even if you don't book a flight today, it's a to see the possibilities. Just throw your local airport in the search bar and see what's available. You might be surprised! for free today. If you find a deal you can't resist, send us a postcard 🙂 ➤ Tiger Woods won in court against his ex-girlfriend who wanted a release from her non-disclosure agreement as well as $30 million for alleged sexual harassment. A judge ruled that the NDA was valid and that any other financial negotiations had to go to arbitration. () ➤ The Preakness Stakes takes place Saturday. The favorite--currently at 8-5 odds--is Mage, the winner of the Kentucky Derby. Mage is the only horse from the Derby running in the Preakness, gunning for a shot at horse racing's coveted Triple Crown. # Lakeland 5th grader arrested after making video depicting another student's murder

LAKELAND, Fla. -- A Lakeland fifth grader was arrested Thursday for posting a video on TikTok depicting her killing another student.
Shockingly, when the mother of the victim reported the video to school officials, they refused to act. Instead, the school resource officer effectively trespassed the victim's mom for reporting the violent threat.
Watch the violent video by clicking [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AdF0kQdaIk9MYmKd8bhw8w8LxA9VekyhwGm-AUlvlWeBdtPYEAu9zVUKt6Ed0bm1XOAuYEdgfTm0QHTR9ITgUvkiqeQrRL9yO5zMe9C15OD6mGW49ahdeZVIqDy6XJFAnBUbisiYbyBYpnJNqhu13bf-ACw7S5G9BeYu7b6FxeTKSMbGOOBghiF1C2AjISeRF68mBHVhjaj4wOYXBHgQXqTme87EYrNKEF4Fh88j2ku2pXNkuqdQKzEYYBujY-XvdbKn5Tl3GTlBQeryXgyZyoXg1y9KMamP&c=SMR2xxGOOHFGEZVtnxVRcaHYNRKD6ZIz1pebc4Y1jCS2ht5oDoepWw==&ch=FDwafXqIKnqbmEydpfwJok5jay3GQcZO-NXQd7ioxodyMqcK_6EbSA==).
The ugly scene unfolded at Rosabelle W. Blake Academy in Lakeland, part of the Polk County School District.
After Trisha Brown, the mother of the victim, a white 11-year-old girl, brought the video to the attention of school administrators on Monday, Blake Academy refused to take action. Brown pulled her daughter out of the school on Tuesday after confirming with Blake Academy that the aggressor student, a black 5th grade female who made the video, had not faced any disciplinary action and was in class that day.
After two more days of the school shrugging off the incident, Brown returned to the school, this time bringing with her a May 31 court date from the Polk County Court, showing that she had a hearing to gain a protective order against the student who made the video.
After reporting the incident to the school resource officer, Brown left the property. Shortly after she left, the school resource officer called her and told her she was not welcome to return to the school.
Frustrated, Brown turned to Citizens Defending Freedom, a non-profit organization, which helps empower parents and Americans who feel like there is nowhere else to turn when their rights are violated. Representatives from Citizens Defending Freedom recommended for her to report the incident to law enforcement and escalate the report to the Florida Department of Education.
Upon bringing the case to the attention of the Florida Department of Education in Tallahassee on Thursday, Brown was later told that the student who made the video had been arrested by the Lakeland Police Department.
"My daughter has been subjected to violent threats from another student for more than a week, and Blake Academy refused to take any action at all," said Brown. "The manner in which the school handled this incident is totally unacceptable, and the fact that I had to spend the past week fighting for my daughter's safety tells me that there is something horribly wrong going on inside the Polk County School District. This is just the beginning of this battle. I will do everything in my power to ensure that justice is served to the girl who heinously threatened my daughter's life."
According to representatives from Citizens Defending Freedom, this isn't the only Polk County School with leaders making questionable decisions. Citizens Defending Freedom has been [battling](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AdF0kQdaIk9MYmKd8bhw8w8LxA9VekyhwGm-AUlvlWeBdtPYEAu9zVUKt6Ed0bm1K2dayWEFCK6znu6ARfgonZhsfG6QMJvJTZpc_EIdu6LgtNFvWkqXY9Fyr2iH0pp2MFfumhPnhd9KiGbLfjTmweXVr26YmtAbZfiJljQUDzZBG1MUnEWzInE6rIYoTVL9pBi9S55fsopN7sZvTtSGIrwrp69rsodJ7V2hmThImwT7VByB5-aO1iavQgo0496sZf1D3rsGq-r5K-wclUie3NepTV93OO2EHX93K1fodvs=&c=SMR2xxGOOHFGEZVtnxVRcaHYNRKD6ZIz1pebc4Y1jCS2ht5oDoepWw==&ch=FDwafXqIKnqbmEydpfwJok5jay3GQcZO-NXQd7ioxodyMqcK_6EbSA==) to have violent and pornographic books removed from schools across Florida.
One of those books is called Assassination Classroom, where students visibly gun down their teacher in the classroom. After Citizens Defending Freedom challenged the book at Mulberry High School in Polk County, a 12-person panel at the school voted 11-1 to keep the Assassination Classroom series in the school library. The principal of the school determined the books were appropriate for 6th-8th grade students, while the rest of the 12-person panel suggested they were more suitable for 9th-12th grade students.
"It certainly seems like the leaders within this school district have a history of refusing to take action, and have abdicated their duty to listen to parents and protect students," said James Judge, the national spokesman for Citizens Defending Freedom. "But whether they are threats of violence like this one, or providing students with pornographic and violent materials in libraries, schools increasingly seem interested in working against parents. Rather, it seems school officials believe they should not be accountable to parents at all. This is another reason why Citizens Defending Freedom exists, and we're proud of our Florida team who helped this mother in need while justice was wrongly delayed by Blake Academy."
Watch the violent video by clicking [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AdF0kQdaIk9MYmKd8bhw8w8LxA9VekyhwGm-AUlvlWeBdtPYEAu9zVUKt6Ed0bm1XOAuYEdgfTm0QHTR9ITgUvkiqeQrRL9yO5zMe9C15OD6mGW49ahdeZVIqDy6XJFAnBUbisiYbyBYpnJNqhu13bf-ACw7S5G9BeYu7b6FxeTKSMbGOOBghiF1C2AjISeRF68mBHVhjaj4wOYXBHgQXqTme87EYrNKEF4Fh88j2ku2pXNkuqdQKzEYYBujY-XvdbKn5Tl3GTlBQeryXgyZyoXg1y9KMamP&c=SMR2xxGOOHFGEZVtnxVRcaHYNRKD6ZIz1pebc4Y1jCS2ht5oDoepWw==&ch=FDwafXqIKnqbmEydpfwJok5jay3GQcZO-NXQd7ioxodyMqcK_6EbSA==).

_"The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_

name: Andy Biggs
subject: JUST RELEASED: The BIGGS News
body:
News and updates from Andy Biggs for Congress
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pSmF4yv4I-hW3Z8qbYqaMRTUr5FWsbdEvagiNELvm_yIH141vkb1zYUXnXrAd8pAaHouqMqzQQ3yu0xMRHOv1ojhIVp-AIVBLf-aPife-zIz9h9dF3kngQQvfuW9ZKQOQYAuZh0-WnCKBz36mX0c9A==&c=hs1GdXwKEB_Pld0Xf6HVVLlX_NO8W5-tGXaw8JoIMOA7eN3d-Iu-aA==&ch=xLhdazTBP0STe2d0zV2Cv-BRQ_wNb6Pp7vCU9gscDBzORMXL4vDa_g==)
---
|
### Hello Peter,

Welcome to my new Biggs for Congress newsletter, The BIGGS News!
Here I hope to keep you updated on my campaign, my work in Congress, and other interesting happenings and headlines. Read on to see what I've been up to!
---
| |
---
|
### I'm Running!

I recently filed for re-election to represent Arizona's Fifth District in Congress. I've represented this district in Congress since 2017, and it has been the honor of a lifetime.
Our nation is at a crossroad. To preserve the freedoms and liberties we hold so dear, we must stand up for America First policies. I have fought for securing the southern border, getting our spending under control, ending forever wars, and restoring our energy independence. America is the greatest nation on Earth and I will not stop fighting to save it.
If you're a Fifth District resident, you can sign my petition to get on the ballot by clicking below.
---
| [Put Andy on the Ballot!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pSmF4yv4I-hW3Z8qbYqaMRTUr5FWsbdEvagiNELvm_yIH141vkb1zYUXnXrAd8pAGdSVxRcNv_aXiiVvDRXHzTkSr1GXF6hRuyL4LQRLi-R6QPSQ9Fh2aOnwZaRWOjVOx16fwO8GrV9UKyPIrjWvgv4BB3MaVTTM4klkOdAks2NVAxmNM-4XSg==&c=hs1GdXwKEB_Pld0Xf6HVVLlX_NO8W5-tGXaw8JoIMOA7eN3d-Iu-aA==&ch=xLhdazTBP0STe2d0zV2Cv-BRQ_wNb6Pp7vCU9gscDBzORMXL4vDa_g==)
---
| |
---
|
### Bill Updates

This Congress, I've introduced more bills than any other member of Congress, totaling 591. Here are some of the highlights:
521 Spending Reductions The U.S. has a $31.5 trillion national debt, which puts our national security and fiscal stability at risk. To get it under control, we must reduce our spending to within our means. In March, I introduced 521 bills to cap spending at FY19 levels, which would save us $100 billion next year and $1 trillion over 10 years.
Impeaching DHS Secretary Mayorkas The Biden Administration, led by DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas, created a devastating border crisis. More than 5 million illegal aliens have entered the U.S. since Mayorkas took office, creating pure chaos at the border, bringing crime into our communities, and jeopardizing our national security. Secretary Mayorkas refuses to enforce the laws passed by Congress that could slow the traffic, and lies to Congress and the American people by claiming the border is secure! I've introduced articles of impeachment against him and look forward to his removal from office.
Responsible Borrowers Protection Act The Biden Administration wants to charge borrowers with good credit higher mortgage fees to finance lending to riskier borrowers. These fees could result in tens of thousands of dollars over the life of the loan and put our entire housing market at risk. Instead of increasing fees on responsible borrowers, we should reduce the cost of housing for all by lowering inflation and repealing expensive federal regulations. My bill prevents Biden's irresponsible plan from taking effect.
WHO Withdrawal Act President Biden wants to hand American sovereignty over to the World Health Organization (WHO), an unaccountable international organization that does not put American interests first. During the COVID-19 outbreak, the WHO cared more about protecting China than finding the origins of the virus. Now, they want more authority to dictate how nations respond to future outbreaks. My bill withdraws the United States from the WHO, ensuring we can protect our own interests and keep our own money.
---
| [See All 591 Bills!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pSmF4yv4I-hW3Z8qbYqaMRTUr5FWsbdEvagiNELvm_yIH141vkb1zYUXnXrAd8pAdcMbZ2Fjnwe6kIoLDrNhHg8qiNwVA4JsM0JelbTP5330PoKHsuRcKb-zv7vCr59FSiNRY5cUbszuk9S13MkUJrD4_9k3zoD4SVDS1W1IQhanm7XS043W4T04iHmIqhjs_pdGbhliDPuXglTz8RUJfqrOVFa1wjwt39ULn6JUlPky4AsiEhbgPSLTcqQhFXMRO35bo541c8OFyswGLDxJPL6sxRTtWLme-eKaI6Djd7IDsuiF4PBN6RSAqvgM8rInzz9QZ_-53AVDZkIgBdpHm-Y1XZ_sZ26N3GezPzLshbYQRhY7E5Hg_7MbjLvQQuODguCIAXAATPoBbMwsnjCO-K-AjivkRYunnFgVHdJ6oaG9Tl04PVh-QpTki1tyuX34&c=hs1GdXwKEB_Pld0Xf6HVVLlX_NO8W5-tGXaw8JoIMOA7eN3d-Iu-aA==&ch=xLhdazTBP0STe2d0zV2Cv-BRQ_wNb6Pp7vCU9gscDBzORMXL4vDa_g==)
---
| |
---
| My Vote on Raising the Debt Ceiling
The House recently voted on the Limit, Save, Grow Act, to raise the debt ceiling in exchange for spending caps and policy reforms. See below for two opinion pieces explaining why I voted NO.
---
|
# The Hill: House GOP's Debt Ceiling Bill Still Leads Us to a Hard Crash

---
| [Read The Hill](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pSmF4yv4I-hW3Z8qbYqaMRTUr5FWsbdEvagiNELvm_yIH141vkb1zYUXnXrAd8pAOWeWvo0xr82jim7Y5Q5EIAKGERspwTFfeRXAYwIYr-jB2ACNumqFuBpwiLCbCiCqLv8VD9H7TRvR85JmqBq1iMac4tUoszlxze9GMhlSdF54qlBakJRNQRJ99bLZBFzQDDjLApVtIgll-SnTWEgk2NQRmagATaXe7Nt8-G_qnkCg2fGAV3a8FYbWW6YD7bEkHwkDwZ4vTtY=&c=hs1GdXwKEB_Pld0Xf6HVVLlX_NO8W5-tGXaw8JoIMOA7eN3d-Iu-aA==&ch=xLhdazTBP0STe2d0zV2Cv-BRQ_wNb6Pp7vCU9gscDBzORMXL4vDa_g==)
---
| |
