clean_body: News and updates from Andy Biggs for Congress | | | | == | Hello Peter, Welcome to my new Biggs for Congress newsletter, The BIGGS News! Here I hope to keep you updated on my campaign, my work in Congress, and other interesting happenings and headlines. Read on to see what I've been up to! | | | I'm Running! I recently filed for re-election to represent Arizona's Fifth District in Congress. I've represented this district in Congress since 2017, and it has been the honor of a lifetime. Our nation is at a crossroad. To preserve the freedoms and liberties we hold so dear, we must stand up for America First policies. I have fought for securing the southern border, getting our spending under control, ending forever wars, and restoring our energy independence. America is the greatest nation on Earth and I will not stop fighting to save it. If you're a Fifth District resident, you can sign my petition to get on the ballot by clicking below. | == | | | Bill Updates This Congress, I've introduced more bills than any other member of Congress, totaling 591. Here are some of the highlights: 521 Spending Reductions The U.S. has a $31.5 trillion national debt, which puts our national security and fiscal stability at risk. To get it under control, we must reduce our spending to within our means. In March, I introduced 521 bills to cap spending at FY19 levels, which would save us $100 billion next year and $1 trillion over 10 years. Impeaching DHS Secretary Mayorkas The Biden Administration, led by DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas, created a devastating border crisis. More than 5 million illegal aliens have entered the U.S. since Mayorkas took office, creating pure chaos at the border, bringing crime into our communities, and jeopardizing our national security. Secretary Mayorkas refuses to enforce the laws passed by Congress that could slow the traffic, and lies to Congress and the American people by claiming the border is secure! I've introduced articles of impeachment against him and look forward to his removal from office. Responsible Borrowers Protection Act The Biden Administration wants to charge borrowers with good credit higher mortgage fees to finance lending to riskier borrowers. These fees could result in tens of thousands of dollars over the life of the loan and put our entire housing market at risk. Instead of increasing fees on responsible borrowers, we should reduce the cost of housing for all by lowering inflation and repealing expensive federal regulations. My bill prevents Biden's irresponsible plan from taking effect. WHO Withdrawal Act President Biden wants to hand American sovereignty over to the World Health Organization (WHO), an unaccountable international organization that does not put American interests first. During the COVID-19 outbreak, the WHO cared more about protecting China than finding the origins of the virus. Now, they want more authority to dictate how nations respond to future outbreaks. My bill withdraws the United States from the WHO, ensuring we can protect our own interests and keep our own money. | == | | | My Vote on Raising the Debt Ceiling The House recently voted on the Limit, Save, Grow Act, to raise the debt ceiling in exchange for spending caps and policy reforms. See below for two opinion pieces explaining why I voted NO. | The Hill: House GOP's Debt Ceiling Bill Still Leads Us to a Hard Crash | == | | Washington Times: Americans Deserve Better Than House Leadership's Debt Ceiling Legislation | == | | | == | 70 S. name: Freedom First Project
subject: UPDATE: Everyone is talking about NewsGuard
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Dear Friend, **BREAKING NEWS: Massive public outcry and congressional hearings follow PragerU's campaign to expose NewsGuard! ** PragerU has educated millions of Americans about NewsGuard-one of the largest and most influential "fact-checkers" employed by Big Tech. But there is more work to do and we need your help.
---
[Support PragerU](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Political and corporate elites empower NewsGuard to censor anyone that doesn't comply with their agenda. That's why they hate truth-fighters like PragerU. They want to control the narrative on any and every topic-from climate change and COVID-19 treatments and vaccines to elections, Planned Parenthood, and the World Economic Forum (to name just a few!). Any outlet that does not conform to their agenda is targeted, blacklisted, and punished. **NewsGuard gave PragerU a low score (57 points out of 100) and warns users to "proceed with caution":**
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Despite NewsGuard's threats and intimidation tactics, **PragerU started sounding the alarm about their suppression of free speech**. Now EVERYONE is talking about NewsGuard. Here is the latest:
* Media outlets from The Daily Wire to The Federalist and Newsmax are reporting on NewsGuard's censorship and intimidation tactics.
* The recent "Twitter Files" (internal Twitter documents leaked by Elon Musk to a few journalists) confirm what PragerU has been saying all along-Big Tech is colluding with Big Government via fact-checkers like NewsGuard!
* Congressional hearings were recently held by the "House Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government" on this matter.
* Journalists Matt Taibbi and Michael Shellenberger (who has starred in several PragerU videos) testified in these hearings and have been relentlessly attacked for exposing this collusion-our own government is interrogating and threatening journalists who are simply telling the truth!
* State of Florida CFO Jimmy Patronis has been warning businesses about NewsGuard's nefarious tactics!
* Word has been spreading like wildfire online...millions now know that our government does not allow dissent...and is using taxpayer dollars to censor The American People!

PragerU has pulled back the curtain. We've opened millions of eyes to these cold hard facts: Our own government is pressuring-and paying-Big Tech to use "fact-checkers" like NewsGuard to slap a "misinformation" label on anything they disagree with and "redirect" people to government-approved websites to be reeducated with the "correct" information.
---
[Expose NewsGuard](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._vxw8MeLacHzL8u0yg)
---
We will not let NewsGuard and their cronies get away with this. We're not going to let them suppress free speech, conceal information, and control what you can and cannot see, all while keeping you completely in the dark. There might be severe consequences for us for pushing against NewsGuard. But if we don't do it, who will? **PragerU is taking a risk by fighting back against such powerful entities, and we need your help.** Third-party fact-checkers and their "partners" have all the money and all the power. But we have you. [Donate now to help us expose NewsGuard.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) This is David vs. Goliath. We know that God, and the truth are on our side and we will prevail. But there is more work to do, and we need your help. We're willing to take the risk. We're putting everything on the line. **But we need your help. **Please join in the fight and help us. Sincerely, Marissa Streit, PragerU CEO
---
[Donate Now](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---

---

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Income inequality isn't the problem...
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsCNBY3DNo

While these two words are often repeated, the actual impact of
income inequality is rarely considered. Is income inequality
actually increasing? What about poverty? More importantly, is
all income inequality necessarily a bad thing?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osCNBY3DNo

Dear
Friend,
There is
a lot of talk these days about the idea of income inequality.

While
these two words are often repeated, the actual impact of income
inequality is rarely considered. Is income inequality actually
increasing? What about poverty? More importantly, is all income
inequality necessarily a bad thing?

Hoover
Research Fellow David Henderson addresses these urgent questions
and more in his thought-provoking new commentary for the Hoover
Institution, Income Inequality Isn't the Problem.

From
showing how income inequality could be a good thing in the right
circumstances, to showing from the data that poverty in America
is actually on the decline, this brief but thought-provoking
commentary is truly a must read, if you care about our nation's
future economic success.

Friend, I
invite you to read what I think is one of the strongest counter
arguments to the prevailing rhetoric on this hot-button issue
today.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of Income Inequality Isn't
The Problem right now.

Thank
you,

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

clean_body: While these two words are often repeated, the actual impact of income inequality is rarely considered. Is income inequality actually increasing? What about poverty? More importantly, is all income inequality necessarily a bad thing? Dear Friend, There is a lot of talk these days about the idea of income inequality. While these two words are often repeated, the actual impact of income inequality is rarely considered. Is income inequality actually increasing? What about poverty? More importantly, is all income inequality necessarily a bad thing? Hoover Research Fellow David Henderson addresses these urgent questions and more in his thought-provoking new commentary for the Hoover Institution, Income Inequality Isn't the Problem. From showing how income inequality could be a good thing in the right circumstances, to showing from the data that poverty in America is actually on the decline, this brief but thought-provoking commentary is truly a must read, if you care about our nation's future economic success. Friend, I invite you to read what I think is one of the strongest counter arguments to the prevailing rhetoric on this hot-button issue today. Simply click here to request your free copy of Income Inequality Isn't The Problem right now. Thank you, Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world. name: Christopher Buskirk, Firebrand
subject: We can’t trust big polling groups
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.-gJ8azvvVldn6w)
---
Fellow American, 2024 is going to be a historic election year. A newly-released national poll shows former President Donald Trump is a competitive opponent for President Joe Biden in a general election rematch. **_I'm sure though, like me, you're hesitant to trust the big polling groups after they got the 2016 presidential polls completely and utterly WRONG_. ** You and I knew that Republicans would win BIG against Hillary Clinton, but the liberal news media and establishment polling groups didn't understand what was brewing among We the People. And, I'm not sure they realize the power that is rising among conservative voices RIGHT NOW. [**Before we can tackle the general election, we must first focus on the GOP Presidential Primary, and because we can't trust "big polling," Firebrand is conducting our own PRESIDENTIAL STRAW POLL. Can you tell me: which candidate do YOU want to be the 2024 Republican nominee for President?**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
[**Take the Presidential Straw Poll Now**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
While November 2024 might seem far away, multiple candidates have already announced their presidential campaigns ... or are expected to announce them soon. The frontrunners seem to be President Donald Trump and Florida Governor Ron DeSantis. Polls suggest that Trump has a large lead over DeSantis. [**But, I want to know STRAIGHT FROM YOU, is one of these candidates - Donald Trump or Ron DeSantis - your first choice to be the Republican Presidential nominee?**](http://trk.libertyledger._gftOShKw) **President Biden** has yet to announce his bid for reelection. On the Republican side, three candidates have officially announced their bids for Commander in Chief:__**Donald Trump, Nikki Haley, and Vivek Ramaswamy.** While **Ron DeSantis** hasn't announced a presidential campaign, he continues to be the most competitive opponent for Trump. But, there are many other prominent Republicans who could throw their hat in the ring:
* **Mike Pence **
* **Mike Pompeo **
* **Chris Sununu **
* **Tim Scott**
* **Glenn Youngkin **
* **Kristi Noem **
* **Asa Hutchinson **
* **Liz Cheney **
* **John Bolton**

[**In the next 24 hours, please let me know which candidate is YOUR first choice to face the Democrat presidential candidate in 2024. It's important that Firebrand hears from the PEOPLE to know which candidates are leading.**](http://trk.libertyledger._0LQ)
---
[**Take the Presidential Straw Poll Now**](http://trk.libertyledger._Dw)
---
In liberty, Christopher BuskirkFirebrand
---

There's no sugarcoating it, Peter: We are on the cusp of one of the most critical presidential elections in modern history. It's no longer simply about right vs. left or Democrat vs. Republican. **In 2024, our fight centers around protecting a single, fundamental value: freedom.** Freedom to marry whomever you love. Freedom to make your own healthcare decisions. Freedom to feel safe in our communities. Freedom to exercise our right to vote. President Biden knows that freedom is worth defending. He has spent his time in office fighting every day for it, and he will continue to protect our most fundamental rights in 2024 and beyond. But the MAGA Republican movement is growing more dangerous, and they will stop at nothing to undermine our freedoms. **That's why it's so important for Democrats to not only secure the White House in 2024 but also defend the Senate and take back the House.** [There’s too much at stake to sit on the sidelines in this election, Peter. It's no longer simply about right vs. left or Democrat vs. Republican. In 2024, our fight centers around protecting a single, fundamental value: freedom. Freedom to marry whomever you love. He has spent his time in office fighting every day for it, and he will continue to protect our most fundamental rights in 2024 and beyond. | | Peter,

We know you know that Marjorie Taylor Greene is a grave threat to our democracy.

She’s spent her time in Congress denying the legitimacy of the 2020 election, spreading horrific conspiracy theories, and fanning the flames of toxic MAGA extremism.

2024 is our chance to stop MTG, and since she’s a potential VP pick for Donald Trump, the stakes couldn’t be higher. We can keep Georgia blue, flip the House, boot her off her committees, and make sure she gets nowhere near the White House.

But here’s the thing: **we can’t do this alone.**

We won’t be able to defeat MTG and MAGA extremism without you, our grassroots team. Without people like you chipping in what they can, we won’t be able to raise the resources we need to out-organize the GOP. **And if we fail, Marjorie Taylor Greene will get even more powerful!**

[**_So we’re asking you to step up, here and now, to help us defeat MTG and crush MAGA extremism once and for all. We can’t do this alone. name: DURHAM UPDATE [From Tom Emmer]
subject: MAINSTREAM MEDIA IS IN A PANIC!
body:
John Durham’s ground-breaking report confirms everything we’ve feared over the last few years

| |
---
| | | John Durham's ground-breaking report confirms everything we've feared over the last few years:
**1.** Hillary Clinton operatives fabricated evidence about Donald Trump.
**2.** Barack Obama's FBI used it to launch a full-scale investigation into Trump-Russia collusion**3.** The mainstream media ran with the story for YEARS
**4.** They even won Pulitzer Prizes for their investigations
**5.** Now Democrats are panicking because their dirty smear campaign against Donald Trump is being exposed for the world to see

**[Everything Republicans calling out the Trump-Russia lie has been vindicated this week! Now we need your help because the fight is FAR from over.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztgqof54mkkijsibbek2i0nje43o2s809g7cv62o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cli6aor2c3h2bs "Everything Republicans calling out the Trump-Russia lie has been vindicated this week! Now we need your help because the fight is FAR from over.")**

Despite the Durham Report cracking the case wide open, the mainstream media is burning the midnight oil to discredit the investigation, attack John Durham's credibility, and undermine his findings. Just look at some of the headlines from this week.
_" After Years of Political Hype, the Durham Inquiry Failed to Deliver"_
- The New York Times, 05/17/2023

_" Column: Why Special Counsel John Durham's report takes so long to say so little"_
- Los Angeles Times, 05/16/2023

_" John Durham Owes the American People an Apology for Wasting Their Money"_
- The Daily Beast, 05/16/2023
The mainstream media is in full-blown PANIC MODE! Here's what you can do to keep the heat up:

**[We're humbly asking all Conservatives to stand with House Republicans as we fight for accountability. Heads have to roll, or this level of corruption will keep happening. Democrats and the mainstream media can't be let off easy when the Durham Report exposed so much.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmpukteqtlq7a7ugiuvrhcdm021jd4d9qa26ij3g_rp22sh2s8i66o71cli6aor2c3h2bs "We’re humbly asking all Conservatives to stand with House Republicans as we fight for accountability. Heads have to roll, or this level of corruption will keep happening. Democrats and the mainstream media can’t be let off easy when the Durham Report exposed so much. ")**

Can we count on you?

Thank you,
House Republicans

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: We've Got To Get Creative About Youth Crime in Memphis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
May 19, 2023
Dear friend,
Addressing the rise in youth crime in Memphis is a top priority for voters. TVP will be working hard to elect candidates for Mayor and City Council who have innovative solutions.
Here at Tennessee Voter Project, we don't believe in locking kids up and throwing away the key. When our youth are given opportunities to thrive and their quality of life is invested in, our communities are better for it.
For far too long, we've been investing more in punitive measures to combat youth crime rather than how we can get ahead of it. We've got to get more creative about solutions to youth crime for the sake of our youth, for the sake of our future.
DONATE TO TENNESSEE VOTER PROJECT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
That's why TVP will be supporting candidates who commit to more funding for our community centers and libraries and getting the City back in the business of investing in Memphis Shelby County Schools.
Earlier this month, we made youth opportunity a top priority at our Mayoral Forum and we'll continue to uplift this issue in every corner of our community with every candidate we can .
Our community deserves candidates with innovative solutions to youth crime. Please consider donating what you can today to help TVP support progressive candidates for Memphis Mayor and City Council. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is serious...

| |
---
| | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667534%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7OfvMk8j1UesFaPz%2fsGKhg&sysid=1)

name: Colin Allred via Blue Amp Action
subject: Peter, this race is personal
body:
My story
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta00321ee-de87-4ab5-8025-c4e65a8ca87f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bbc0dd9-23f0-4f1d-9d77-b97fab4a75b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I'd love to take a moment to explain why. I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79ea8ce4-6013-49f8-8de1-32582421660f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75dae9ec-53d2-4377-861f-22c35f9d6ba2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T429f54b0-c8aa-46b3-99cb-0adf00c8528f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House.[Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f10373b-53ab-4d5d-bfc5-b494d700227b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate. Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me. [**So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11057bb2-752e-439a-88ac-0bb07f708dac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning. Colin Allred
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcee57298-e994-43bc-8866-ce181cacc8e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---

name: Hung Cao
subject: I was put on a hit list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=17935bcfaff44487a020fa03fa87124d&_e=sFUG0TC1DIQFgoPt7c-u-tLAfMU6DNMscb01NJqFTue9FCFFlJhJsR-PsZacCVeG830ktwvQwePtke8hy5WsvErDZcaMT7XQr4Cv8uHTAjqazokDFy5ND8-YHBu3dxUVIHmm7P7R8qbH3IfPrLmoGj5k1rdPb7wmOv5g3kPLgV5Iefjpjze6N735Im5Gv2hX5cRTj0aUpJKWVQVQUxaD6i2hq-omvnfYpiiYxqpV9shbChuoON1nURnRQxObItTYGlGMK3mINSTEnp5mC0AN48Q08d343GuLWn_sZThFcnkhuGWRmuQYxdDvk_htHXfwA3yaNlokXyjGZdx1ts2e8tU6oxz5LOVXqVkXZ681mhQ%3D)
---
Peter, I’m still in shock.

I was put on a socialist “hit list” of conservatives to be targeted for trying to expose the TRUTH about disgusting coverups in our Virginia school system. I'm number #31 on the list.
---
[](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=17935bcfaff44487a020fa03fa87124d&_e=sFUG0TC1DIQFgoPt7c-u-tLAfMU6DNMscb01NJqFTue9FCFFlJhJsR-PsZacCVeG830ktwvQwePtke8hy5WsvErDZcaMT7XQr4Cv8uHTAjqazokDFy5ND8-YHBu3dxUVIHmm7P7R8qbH3IfPrLmoGj5k1rdPb7wmOv5g3kPLgV5Iefjpjze6N735Im5Gv2hX5cRTj0aUpJKWVQVQUxaD6medgLrX1vwPFKbn8cK09U_O2nMzq2Ttkovw13N21Gt2-wXj9EX3pBLza7fBL0TAaKvUqM5nef-PKPviYIihKa3CQ_klcoLqqI6XqgctXCCwXKYxRbIh_7vg9wmShrXtrErGR5XFsYIXPwHFy5LqWbI%3D)
---
This rag-tag team of Leftists even bragged about wanting to hurt conservatives in our state, saying they were “ready to show up with guns” and that they “would shoot” us.

It’s absolutely disgusting, Peter. But what is the FBI doing about these blatant and clear threats? _Absolutely nothing._
---
[**HOLD THE JUSTICE SYSTEM ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=17935bcfaff44487a020fa03fa87124d&_e=sFUG0TC1DIQFgoPt7c-u-tLAfMU6DNMscb01NJqFTue9FCFFlJhJsR-PsZacCVeG830ktwvQwePtke8hy5WsvErDZcaMT7XQr4Cv8uHTAjqazokDFy5ND8-YHBu3dxUVIHmm7P7R8qbH3IfPrLmoGj5k1rdPb7wmOv5g3kPLgV5Iefjpjze6N735Im5Gv2hX5cRTj0aUpJKWVQVQUxaD6kXDL9x12QzPf5eRhSHuOZisDKFmmbMO7Y38ZkhCa9NDpwr6S_FkCfE-0Adai1qakppuXGNelEtRdWJ9udc0evTxE300U1MiIt6bkRUnZJxY-IsLc-ka6gFuc_rtPXlaLw3rtuRS0QbcVFL4NF8TSVE%3D)
---
Instead, they’re treating parents concerned about their children’s education as terrorists while real criminals like these are putting law-abiding citizens in danger.

**But let me be clear: no hit-list or censorship is going to silence me.**

I will NEVER stop standing up for what’s right for our children, and I want YOU by my side while we do it.

clean_body: | | | Peter, I’m still in shock. I was put on a socialist “hit list” of conservatives to be targeted for trying to expose the TRUTH about disgusting coverups in our Virginia school system. I'm number #31 on the list. This rag-tag team of Leftists even bragged about wanting to hurt conservatives in our state, saying they were “ready to show up with guns” and that they “would shoot” us. It’s absolutely disgusting, Peter. But what is the FBI doing about these blatant and clear threats? Absolutely nothing. Instead, they’re treating parents concerned about their children’s education as terrorists while real criminals like these are putting law-abiding citizens in danger. But let me be clear: no hit-list or censorship is going to silence me. I will NEVER stop standing up for what’s right for our children, and I want YOU by my side while we do it. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | Address: PO Box 320253, Alexandria, VA 22320 Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Unleash America PAC

This is serious...

I'm hearing that some Republicans are getting complacent. Voters seem to think now that we've won back Congress, they can just sit on the sidelines...

That is simply NOT TRUE. Dems still have the White House & the Senate, and our majority in the House is on THIN ICE.

| | The Kellen Courier brings you the latest news from the campaign trail. Friends, Family, and Supporters, We had strong interviews this week with [TIME Magazine](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/ecOWQy4wz/c?w=NXPSJTtMqj5aqvdH-H0TQu4jXGOedK8VGSv3XO3ZX4c.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aW1lLmNvbS82MjgwMzM5L2dlb3JnZS1zYW50b3Mtd2hvLWlzLXJ1bm5pbmctYWdhaW5zdC0yMDI0LyIsInIiOiJiYWFjNTZjMS1lOGFkLTRmMDMtOTZkMC0xZmE3ZjE0ODU0ZTkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyMThjNmJhYS01MzllLTQ3M2EtYjYzZi1iMjM0Yzc2ZThjNzQifQ), [Daily Mail](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/ecOWQy4wz/c?w=XtYaVCCrbNqs0DsFvclsJgyYiNrshlIpDj-lTt63NZs.), and my discussion with Forbes is below, please share with your family, friends and network. Our campaign remains focused on real issues such as national security, rebuilding our Merchant Marine Academy, achieving the gold standard of constituency services and delivering federal resources for youth mental health. Thank you all so much! I could not do this without you! Your kind words and generosity are what drives me every day. Have a great weekend.

name: Colin Allred
subject: this is why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi Peter, I wanted to tell you why I'm running for Senate, but I
know you're busy, so I'll keep this short.

1. As a father, I'm running to build a better world for my kids and yours,
to create more opportunities for them and their peers to succeed and to
ensure our country lives up to its promises for the next generation.

2. As a Texan, I've watched Ted Cruz fail our state for more than a
decade, doing what's best for Ted Cruz and not for Texas families. I'm
running to be a voice for Texans in the Senate, and I promise to always
put you first.

3. As a civil rights attorney, I'm running to defend our fundamental
rights. Ted Cruz and his allies are waging an all-out war on our right to
vote, which is the basis for all other rights. Expanding our Democratic
Senate majority is our best hope of stopping them.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18960?t=1001&akid=3250%2E346206%2ENhBxUR ]If you're with me in this fight, I'm humbly asking: Will you please
split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker
to raise $50,000 before midnight? Every dollar helps as we work to unseat
Ted Cruz, protect the Senate and build a better future for our families. →

Thank you so much, I'm glad to have you on this team.

Colin Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230519-3250-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3250_346206_NhBxUR&akid=3250%2E346206%2ENhBxUR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

clean_body: Hi Peter, I wanted to tell you why I'm running for Senate, but I know you're busy, so I'll keep this short. 1. As a father, I'm running to build a better world for my kids and yours, to create more opportunities for them and their peers to succeed and to ensure our country lives up to its promises for the next generation. 2. As a Texan, I've watched Ted Cruz fail our state for more than a decade, doing what's best for Ted Cruz and not for Texas families. I'm running to be a voice for Texans in the Senate, and I promise to always put you first. 3. As a civil rights attorney, I'm running to defend our fundamental rights. Ted Cruz and his allies are waging an all-out war on our right to vote, which is the basis for all other rights. Expanding our Democratic Senate majority is our best hope of stopping them. [ ]If you're with me in this fight, I'm humbly asking: Will you please split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to raise $50,000 before midnight? Every dollar helps as we work to unseat Ted Cruz, protect the Senate and build a better future for our families. → Thank you so much, I'm glad to have you on this team. Colin Allred Contribute to Charles Booker:

This is the sad state of our nation.
* 14,000 illegal immigrants cross our Swiss-cheese southern border *daily* now that Title 42 has ended.
* Veterans, who fought for our freedoms, are being evicted to welcome those who break our laws.

As a child of immigrants, I understand the want to come to America to fulfill the American Dream. I don't even **blame** the people crossing the border. I **blame** the reckless abandonment that lies at the feet of Biden. Or more precisely, his handlers.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

We need a Commander in Chief who will protect Americans at all costs, not one who puts Americans last. I want to hear from you: | When I become President of the United States, I will use our military to secure the southern border and restore the rule of law in the United States. That is what it means to be an American. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

---
**FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ** Dear Fellow American, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. **The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.** Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. **The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. **[I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. ](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTM5LTQ3ZWQzOGNmMmUwNzRjYTY4ZTdlZmViM2YzMDZlYzk1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9RkFMUjM5MTgzIn0/_L89B0-0s-bUH87VTpfRuQ)**
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTM5LTQ3ZWQzOGNmMmUwNzRjYTY4ZTdlZmViM2YzMDZlYzk1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9RkFMUjM5MTgzIn0/gD5kOmfJzj2R9TNc6Ql4Tw)
---
Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
---
**Alan Dershowitz** Columnist, The New York Sun

name: The Courier Data Team
subject: This will only take a moment, Peter
body:
Will you take 90 seconds to complete our News Consumption Survey?
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=960%2E120351%2E4OaP0k)
Peter, Courier Newsroom is different because we deliver our factual, local journalism directly to the newsfeeds, inboxes and other online spaces where people actually get their news.
As we dive into the 2024 election cycle, we want to take a moment to hear from you:
**How do you get your news?** Your responses are critical because they will help our newsrooms fight disinformation and reach new audiences who don’t have access to quality, local news.
[**Will you take 90 seconds to complete our News Consumption Survey?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/news-consumption-survey/?source=em-20230519&t=2&akid=960%2E120351%2E4OaP0k)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/news-consumption-survey/?source=em-20230519&t=3&akid=960%2E120351%2E4OaP0k)**
_Your insight will be invaluable to our local newsrooms as they fight back against right-wing disinformation and get factual, original content in front of voters._
How and where we get our news is constantly changing. With the disappearance of local newsrooms, many communities have ended up in **“news deserts”** — and been left particularly vulnerable to right-wing disinformation that’s spread online.
At Courier, our newsrooms aim to fill in these gaps by serving **free, high-quality journalism** that’s focused on the issues voters actually care about and dismantles bad information.
A critical part of our success is our ability to stay one step ahead of trends in news consumption. That’s what makes your input so important — with your help, we can better serve local communities.
[**Understanding how our supporters get their news allows us to better serve the local communities who need our content the most. So we’re asking: will you take our quick, 90-second News Consumption Survey?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/news-consumption-survey/?source=em-20230519&t=4&akid=960%2E120351%2E4OaP0k)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/news-consumption-survey/?source=em-20230519&t=5&akid=960%2E120351%2E4OaP0k)**
Thanks so much,
The Courier Data Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=960_120351_4OaP0k&akid=960%2E120351%2E4OaP0k)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=960%2E120351%2E4OaP0k)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

**Peter, you were in the top 5% of my supporters during my campaign last year. That’s why I’ve selected you to participate in my exclusive 2023 focus group. **
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63506927/407054517/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1085-su-nd&refcode=jtk1085-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTVjMzAyNi00ZWY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PxG9PIhupnacgy-Rk3QqIw9hibP5ZVQatmyAKmSdiU=&emci=267248bd-fef3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5e5c3026-4ef6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

I’m counting on your response because when I made history and became New York’s attorney general, I vowed to _always_ let the people’s voice guide my work. As someone who grew up without a platform to speak out against the things that directly affected my neighborhood, I knew that I _never_ wanted to let another New Yorker feel as powerless as I once did.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. As one of my top supporters, you’re someone I can trust to speak honestly and openly about which fights to prioritize this year – **but it looks like you still haven’t accepted my invitation to participate in my focus group.**** **
| | **FOCUS GROUP RECORD**
---
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com FOCUS GROUP PARTICIPATION ID: 128810098 **PARTICIPATED IN FOCUS GROUP?: **NO DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.
---

---
**This focus group is only open until midnight tonight, and I need another 581 fearless fighters to respond in order to reach statistical significance.****[_Please, will you participate in my focus group now so I know what’s most important to the people I represent? It’ll only take a moment of your time._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63506929/407054519/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1085-su-nd&refcode=jtk1085-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTVjMzAyNi00ZWY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PxG9PIhupnacgy-Rk3QqIw9hibP5ZVQatmyAKmSdiU=&emci=267248bd-fef3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5e5c3026-4ef6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

Together, we made ___real_ progress in our fight for the voiceless and vulnerable in 2022 – but we can’t afford to let that momentum falter in 2023. Because this January, _millions_ of Americans have entered the year without the right to an abortion, _millions_ of parents have entered the year without confidence that their children will be safe at school, and _millions_ of LGBTQ+ individuals have entered the year fearing for their safety.

Peter, with the chambers of Congress now divided, federal action on reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun safety reforms will likely continue to be stalled – and it’s up to state attorneys general like me to continue the fight for justice and progress.

**But before I solidify my plans for the year ahead, I need to know what you think. Please: [_Will you accept my personal invitation to participate in my exclusive focus group? Click here to access your personalized link:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63506930/407054520/1229846208?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1085-su-nd&refcode=jtk1085-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTVjMzAyNi00ZWY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PxG9PIhupnacgy-Rk3QqIw9hibP5ZVQatmyAKmSdiU=&emci=267248bd-fef3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5e5c3026-4ef6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

subject: NEW: Our “Old Glory: hat just hit the store
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Ship free with code: GETYOURHAT
#
Derek -
Our “Old Glory” hat just hit the store. .
It’s a summer-weight hat, the kind of thing you will want to wear on a run, to a barbeque, or on July Fourth to watch some fireworks. It’s got a big ol’ American flag right on the front, and the VoteVets logo on the side.
VoteVets puts out products like this because most other organizations on the left don’t. The patriotic merch out there usually comes from the same Republican flag-huggers that are pushing bills to slash Veterans benefits as we speak.
Here’s the hat:
[](https://shop.votevets.org/products/american-flag-dark-blue-trucker-cap?utm_source=actionkit&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oghat&utm_id=230519-1?refcode=em230520-1-15)
[**This “Old Glory” hat is $35, and if you use the code GETYOURHAT today we’ll ship it to you for free. body:

[](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTM5LTkwYTdhNmFlNzk4YzQyMmRiNWIyMTY2NDU0ZmE0Y2E1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9U1BPMzkxODQifQ/jNGSxBA_xFhpnAybWrb7IQ)
---
**FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ** Dear Fellow American, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. **The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.** Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. **The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. **[I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. ](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTM5LTkwYTdhNmFlNzk4YzQyMmRiNWIyMTY2NDU0ZmE0Y2E1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9U1BPMzkxODQifQ/3Jf8bgvQK3S68las-spEVQ)**
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTM5LTkwYTdhNmFlNzk4YzQyMmRiNWIyMTY2NDU0ZmE0Y2E1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9U1BPMzkxODQifQ/hbNfPS-FOPQRQ8ro-JUmKg)
---
Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
---

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ Dear Fellow American, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. Alan Dershowitz Columnist, The New York Sun | Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The hits keep on coming for Leftist Election Officials
body:
My latest release showed my cameraman's confrontation of a casually dressed, Adrian Fontes. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F4qdoS0763IsaNRrwPYnZcBMA%2FXjRdoSOVFzTWee5zi1dEig/1/0100018834623896-c2fa33a4-f94f-4756-bd38-53736a3892b3-000000/I8tN3cxz6Q7UC3VCoIVaSu_JxLo=322) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F4qdoS0763IsaNRrwPYnZcBMA%2FXjRdoSOVFzTWee5zi1dEig/2/0100018834623896-c2fa33a4-f94f-4756-bd38-53736a3892b3-000000/9QD_u_apl_lzz1Did4W9R1y47kc=322) Dear Friend,

My coverage of the secret, Zuckerberg-funded election summit in D.C. continues to expose how amazingly biased our own election officials are.

My latest release showed my cameraman's confrontation of a casually dressed, Adrian Fontes.

Don't know who Adrian is?

Before I get into that, I am still short of covering the travel costs for this investigation. I spent days in the Swamp with my team investigating this election summit. **[Will you help me cover these costs?](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F4qdoS0763IsaNRrwPYnZcBMA%2FXjRdoSOVFzTWee5zi1dEig/3/0100018834623896-c2fa33a4-f94f-4756-bd38-53736a3892b3-000000/f4vS9GfjwVHb9xz23xccXKmdSCw=322)**

Adrian Fontes is Arizona's Secretary of State, which means he is the person who is ultimately in charge of the state's elections. In his private practice as an attorney, Adrian Fontes represented Mexican Drug Cartels in their defense with Obama's "Fast and Furious" gun running scheme.

During the nearly seven minutes of lecturing by Fontes, he admitted that Democrats only represent a third of voters in Arizona.

**Yet, Conservative Kari Lake "lost"? How is that?**

I'll tell you how.

Secretaries of State are SUPPOSED TO BE neutral positions, not partisan positions. But voters in Arizona are faced with a man who calls Trump supporters "MAGA Fascists", and anyone who questions the election "Terrorists."

And when my team and I confronted Adrian Fontes about his partisan remarks, he defended his statements while he attended a Leftist conference to "discuss" the 2024 Elections.

But we all know that when Leftists get together, they're not looking to discuss anything. Instead, they are plotting with group-think on how to grasp or retain as much power as they can.

They want a repeat of 2020, but without the scrutiny! And they will change any voting rules, counting procedures or transparency requirements to make that happen!

Thank about it. These government officials hold **positions of trust** . Americans count on them to make sure we have free and fair elections without interference, fraud or illegal influence.

How can we trust any of them when they gather from around the nation, make hyper partisan comments, and plot IN SECRET, to discuss changes to how we vote?

**The answer is simple. We cannot.**

We have to expose them for who they are, and if they don't resign, we can flip back to these videos when they try to steal our votes again and hold these videos up as evidence in front of a federal judge!

So please, **[help me cover these costs so that I can keep](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F4qdoS0763IsaNRrwPYnZcBMA%2FXjRdoSOVFzTWee5zi1dEig/4/0100018834623896-c2fa33a4-f94f-4756-bd38-53736a3892b3-000000/dpKFtGt6leqoUb7YFoEK-xMuW2w=322)** exposing the Left and stop a repeat of 2020 from occurring. Your help is THE ONLY way I can keep working for you. **[Please donate today](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2F4qdoS0763IsaNRrwPYnZcBMA%2FXjRdoSOVFzTWee5zi1dEig/5/0100018834623896-c2fa33a4-f94f-4756-bd38-53736a3892b3-000000/FUgKSAbcDfkxWql6J5P7y-acPuk=322).**

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

clean_body: My latest release showed my cameraman's confrontation of a casually dressed, Adrian Fontes. | | | | | Dear Friend, My coverage of the secret, Zuckerberg-funded election summit in D.C. continues to expose how amazingly biased our own election officials are. My latest release showed my cameraman's confrontation of a casually dressed, Adrian Fontes. Don't know who Adrian is? Before I get into that, I am still short of covering the travel costs for this investigation. I spent days in the Swamp with my team investigating this election summit. Adrian Fontes is Arizona's Secretary of State, which means he is the person who is ultimately in charge of the state's elections. In his private practice as an attorney, Adrian Fontes represented Mexican Drug Cartels in their defense with Obama's "Fast and Furious" gun running scheme. During the nearly seven minutes of lecturing by Fontes, he admitted that Democrats only represent a third of voters in Arizona. Yet, Conservative Kari Lake "lost"? How is that? I'll tell you how. Secretaries of State are SUPPOSED TO BE neutral positions, not partisan positions. But voters in Arizona are faced with a man who calls Trump supporters "MAGA Fascists", and anyone who questions the election "Terrorists." And when my team and I confronted Adrian Fontes about his partisan remarks, he defended his statements while he attended a Leftist conference to "discuss" the 2024 Elections. But we all know that when Leftists get together, they're not looking to discuss anything. Instead, they are plotting with group-think on how to grasp or retain as much power as they can. They want a repeat of 2020, but without the scrutiny! And they will change any voting rules, counting procedures or transparency requirements to make that happen! Thank about it. These government officials hold positions of trust . Americans count on them to make sure we have free and fair elections without interference, fraud or illegal influence. How can we trust any of them when they gather from around the nation, make hyper partisan comments, and plot IN SECRET, to discuss changes to how we vote? The answer is simple. We cannot. We have to expose them for who they are, and if they don't resign, we can flip back to these videos when they try to steal our votes again and hold these videos up as evidence in front of a federal judge! So please, exposing the Left and stop a repeat of 2020 from occurring. Your help is THE ONLY way I can keep working for you. . Thank you again for all that you do. Respectfully, Laura Loomer | (C) 2023 Illoominate Media, 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465 Lake Worth, FL 33460 To opt-out of marketing emails like these, please unsubscribe below.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: Sign the Petition against Florida book bans
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Stand with parents and publishers fighting back against GOP book bans >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63801069-6bb1-4d25-957e-eb806db185c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0194248-2141-4db6-886a-ed8a5a623ca4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Republicans in Florida are waging war on our education system by attempting to ban books that discuss women’s issues, race, LGBTQ issues, and more. They’re trying to whitewash and even erase key parts of history and keep kids from learning about important issues! Thankfully, people are rightfully taking a stand in Florida. NBC News reported: “Penguin Random House, authors, parents and a free speech group filed a lawsuit Wednesday against a Florida school district for removing 10 books related to race and the LGBTQ community after a high school teacher complained.” They allege that these book bans are in violation of the First Amendment. We stand with the publishers, authors, and parents who aren’t afraid to stand up for what’s right and put our students first. Join us by signing your name: [I stand with parents and publishers fighting back against GOP book bans >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T610a110c-744e-4570-8f88-b6b4ebaac623/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Republicans in Florida are waging war on our education system by attempting to ban books that discuss women’s issues, race, LGBTQ issues, and more. They’re trying to whitewash and even erase key parts of history and keep kids from learning about important issues! Thankfully, people are rightfully taking a stand in Florida. NBC News reported: “Penguin Random House, authors, parents and a free speech group filed a lawsuit Wednesday against a Florida school district for removing 10 books related to race and the LGBTQ community after a high school teacher complained.” They allege that these book bans are in violation of the First Amendment. We stand with the publishers, authors, and parents who aren’t afraid to stand up for what’s right and put our students first. Join us by signing your name: | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action [P. This confirms what we already knew: Ted Cruz is one of the most unpopular — and most vulnerable — Republican Senators in the country. We have a real chance to beat TED CRUZ and elect Black Congressman COLIN ALLRED to the US Senate. But to do that, we’re going to need YOUR help. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. Look, Peter -- I’m proud of all the progress we’ve made. We’ve created over 12 million new jobs, lowered prescription drug prices for millions of seniors, and passed the largest effort to tackle the climate crisis in our history.
But we’ve got a lot more to do -- _and there is so much at stake._
MAGA forces are determined to take this country backward -- backward to an America where there is no right to choose, no right to privacy, no right to access contraception, and no right to marry who you love.
The MAGA Republicans believe that, for them to succeed, everyone else has to fail.
**I believe America is big enough for all of us to succeed. That is the nation we’re building: a nation where no one is left behind.**
I first ran for President because I believed we were in a battle for the soul of this nation. I still believe that to be true.
That’s why we have to bring people together around our common ideals. We have to build a campaign that lifts everyone up and leaves no one behind.
But we can't do it without your help.
**So I’m asking, Peter: Can you make a contribution to our campaign?**
**You can use this link to donate:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-wh-may-2023](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ymOoaZ2Tr-ojHUJEEb0iKbe46rgXAelUYiv0eD9jFoyIzlD58zhHvtdSE4fpvKt0ek_OQSd0AnekgPPPX9tZ4TyfQTXIwfiRrKpgWTOsYwBdqP7u4PB9Y0Iux8aoDYks-uWi6Z_rZncQzfsCvQ0XRRDbqW7bGLr5kpJd9qo1XQw5qv-gDnlFs3MchdlPMjnVZHFueDey306jC9ayG_NecSJB7a_OH73A2h4q8v9BsdEtcwLCG8tyiCRFpW-FK7ez6PD6Xmcd0AFNx6fE-fgQd27zEghTlQASphohT0mPwsL6-fvqlaPTpXAwvPOA6F6V4Qghpm2mSiIu_HBCjk95bA/3wb/YJFzbU13QyeiMdtnAL8OAw/h7/0JpzYv3nQteFDMzUIpl7gsJop9W02YomsY1YRPlS3tI)**
Every dollar you contribute will help us hire staff, open field offices, and run ads to get our message out to voters.
And every phone call you make, every door you knock on, every conversation you have with your friends and family, will help us build the kind of grassroots movement that can win this election.
Thanks for all that you do,

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: It's National Police Week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _It's National Police Week_
---
“It is not how these officers died that made them heroes, it is how they lived.” That quote, found on the the National Law Enforcement Officers Memorial in Washington, D.C., is always worth revisiting during National Police Week as we honor and remember those officers who have made the ultimate sacrifice to protect their fellow citizens. Earlier this week, the names of two Hoosiers were added to that memorial: Officer Noah Shahnavaz of Elwood and Officer Seara Burton of Richmond. Both tragically lost their lives in the line of duty last year. Now, with their names carved into those limestone walls, we promise to always remember them, to never forget their service to our state nor the sacrifice they made. But it's not just this week we honor those with the courage to pin on the badge, but every day. To all of those who bravely serve our communities, unafraid to run into harm's way: thank you. We will always have your backs, and pray for you and your families. Enjoy this week's newsletter. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
**Forwarded this newsletter from a friend?[Sign up for The Party Line here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/79c406f043c48f4cc3d6b838967d376c/40313)**
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Honoring Officer Moody_
---
| |
---
_**Governor Eric Holcomb** presents Officer Dustin Moddy with a Sagamore of the Wabash._**
---
This week, **Governor Eric Holcomb** honored Trafalgar police officer Dustin Moody with the highest honor bestowed by the governor's office, the Sagamore of the Wabash.

Officer Moody was paralyzed in a crash last year when he attempted to pull over an alleged impaired driver. **From the governor:** "Today [Wednesday] I honored Officer Dustin Moody with a Sagamore of the Wabash. Officer Moody was injured in the line of duty in June of 2022. Dustin, his wife Emily, and the family that supports them are on a long road to recovery and the State of Indiana is behind them." **About the award:** According to the state, the Sagamore of the Wabash award was created during the term of Governor Ralph Gates, who served from 1945 to 1949.
* It is a personal tribute usually given to those who have rendered a
distinguished service to the state or to the governor.
* There is no record of the total number which have been presented, as each governor has kept his own roll.

---
|
---
| | **More:** **Gov. Holcomb** has signed on to a letter with 24 other Republican governor pushing back against the U.S. Department of Education’s proposed rule that "could prevent states from enforcing duly-enacted statutes protecting fairness in women's and girl's sports."
---
|
---
# _Register for Our 2023 Municipal Candidate Training_
---
---
We recently announced our 2023 municipal candidate training —**** IN IT TO WIN: Victory in Indiana's Cities & Towns. **Details:** The training will be held on**** Saturday, June 10, 2023,**** at the University of Indianapolis. More details will be forthcoming. **What to expect: **This one-day session will include breakout sessions with industry experts and consultants on all things grassroots, finance, and communications, to give candidates and their campaigns the winning edge for November. **Take action:** [**Register**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/ad4792a38095dd57c3d6b838967d376c/40313) for an early bird discount of $75. **PRICE INCREASES TO $100 ON SATURDAY, MAY 20.**
---
|
---
# _U.S. House Democrats Don't Back the Blue_
---
Yesterday, in honor of National Police Week, the U.S. House of Representatives considered a [resolution](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/f36559b95da83a7dc3d6b838967d376c/40313) that recognizes local law enforcement officers and condemns calls to defund or abolish the police. **In a shocking turn of events:** 117 Democrats voted "no."
* That's over half of their caucus and included the Indiana Democrat Party's own André Carson.

**(Unneeded) context:** Democrats have a [well documented history](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/a1c9ea1e1b5da448c3d6b838967d376c/40313) of calling to defund and dismantle the police.
---
|
---
# _ICYMI: House Republicans Pass 'Secure the Border Act'_
---
Late last week, **U.S. House Republicans** passed the strongest border security bill the country has ever seen, with zero support from the Democrats. **Context:** In President Biden's first 100 days, he took more than 94 executive actions on immigration that have weakened our system and led to more than 6.3 million illegal border crossings, including 1.3 million gotaways that have escaped past border patrol into the country.
* But he hasn't done it alone, Democrats have voted to [aid](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/8de376601211101ac3d6b838967d376c/40313) sanctuary cities, against [hiring](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/342dc0b9609669f7c3d6b838967d376c/40313) more border patrol agents and [funding](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/915874cbabfe8d2ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) Title 42, and repeatedly against [funding](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/57200ad1a4bc0311c3d6b838967d376c/40313) the border wall.

**The solution** : The [Secure the Border Act](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/a69055df0018e3f1c3d6b838967d376c/40313) delivers on Republicans' Commitment to America to end the chaos.
* The bill would fix our broken asylum system, hire more Border Patrol agents and provide them with resources they need, reinstate policies like Remain in Mexico, and force the Biden administration to resume building the border wall.

---
|
---
# _Fox News:**Border Patrol Arrest 16 People on FBI Terror Watch List in April at Southern Border**_
---
From [Fox News](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/f4af91ea77bd11f1c3d6b838967d376c/40313)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/a2a2ae524631cf37c3d6b838967d376c/40313): "Border Patrol agents encountered 16 people who are on the FBI’s terror watch list attempting to enter the U.S. illegally at the southern border between ports of entry in April, according to Customs and Border Protection (CBP) statistics. "CBP stats show that 16 people — more than all four years of fiscal years 17, 18, 19 and 20 combined — were stopped by Border Patrol agents in the month of April. "It means there have so far been 98 encounters at the southern and northern borders between ports of entry in FY 23 so far. That’s the same as all of FY 22. There were 16 in FY21, 3 in FY 20 and FY19, 6 in FY18 and two in FY12." _[Story continues.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/8e54c11fc641a786c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_
---
|
---
# _Session Spotlight: SEA 3_
---
This session, there were 252 bills passed by the legislature and signed by **Gov. Holcomb**. Over the next several weeks, this section will be dedicated to highlighting some of those bills. **The bill:** SEA 3 (state and local tax review task force), signed May 4, 2023. **The details:** SEA 3 establishes the State and Local Tax Review Commission to study the state's near and long-term financial outlook and overall fiscal position.
* The commission will study methods to further reduce or completely eliminate the individual income tax, methods to reduce or eliminate the tax on homestead properties, and review other taxes.

---
|
---
# _The Latest Biden Fact Check from the RNC_
---
The Republican National Committee (RNC) has launched [factcheckbiden.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/004562c8bca1036cc3d6b838967d376c/40313), a website solely dedicated to fact checking President Biden in real time. _**Biden Has Not Given Police Any Backup**_ Joe Biden is trying to rewrite his record by claiming that the answer to address policing is “[not to defund](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/9b0a5be36aefbf9cc3d6b838967d376c/40313).” But Biden’s history is clear, he himself has called for [redirecting police funds](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/8a0bc7b56fa1a811c3d6b838967d376c/40313). In fact, Biden’s unity task force even called for a need to “[reimagine policing](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/7f71dd9389e856f5c3d6b838967d376c/40313).”
* Biden [has done nothing to solve the crime wave](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/07015879240a628ac3d6b838967d376c/40313) and instead [has surrounded himself with defund](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/ba88ae352056ff3fc3d6b838967d376c/40313) the police supporters.
* In 2022, Biden [signed an executive order](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/bf28d25969d2dee1c3d6b838967d376c/40313) that limited law enforcement and made it “[harder for police to do their jobs](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/60d894130eb46766c3d6b838967d376c/40313).”
* In 2023, Biden threatened to [veto](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/7e972317e0d6c46cc3d6b838967d376c/40313) legislation that would overturn [progressive policies](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/2d9f6edc56169bbfc3d6b838967d376c/40313) from the D.C. Council that will hamstring District officers and place them in unsafe situations.
* Democrats’ calls to [defund the police](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/aba55474d7df171ac3d6b838967d376c/40313) have left [law enforcement demoralized and made it increasingly difficult](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/0ac7e67686e38656c3d6b838967d376c/40313) to recruit new officers.
* In 2022, violent crime rates, including crimes such as rape, robbery, and assault remained [dramatically higher](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/276e800e22cd45e1c3d6b838967d376c/40313) than levels before 2020.
* Law enforcement professionals lay the blame squarely on failed Democrat policies:
* [National Police Association Spokesperson Sgt. Betsy Branter Smith](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/9a8205f49ca6f8ac/82b0cf3db6588107c3d6b838967d376c/40313) says police officers are leaving departments amid the “vilification of law enforcement” from politicians.

---

# _News You Can Use_
