clean_body: | | | | \- - -| Peter, We must take immediate action to secure our southern border and protect our communities from the flow of dangerous drugs. Oregon is not a border state, but we are still feeling the devastating effects of drug trafficking through our state. Just last month, Oregon police seized over 100,000 fentanyl pills and 33 pounds of powdered fentanyl in two separate freeway stops. This is a shocking and alarming amount of drugs that could have caused untold harm to our community. That's why I am proud to be fighting for bipartisan efforts to secure our southern border and stop the flow of drugs into our country. This is not a partisan issue - it is a matter of public safety and national security. | | | | We can't afford to wait any longer to take action. Every day, more and more dangerous drugs are making their way into our communities, putting our loved ones at risk. With your support, we can work together to stop this deadly flow and build a safer, more secure future for all Americans. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe61eafb25a54eec966aec46e23c7f0e&_e=drgoTHJy-904mFggOeB_JgMF3vFo8ybf4AOT0QtgGgkcfho9u-T55wG0nH_VwcJ4NJZAi3Dq5Pz_4SvbuL7BFm9Os-evxTZ6kGVxYt49mkRdT2fOyYdwr6fWw8AR8kWG5-FVfO0XHy6eUg6v4R3RRxXnDHekj25oJKvvXckp7qz1w17-sMMDTqenkvmMFe-bUyWytwYx-xGK9bOLSzf6gpWKcIDuu-q2ocgW59wypHujkqBQ8DDVIce9fgGgrVGD7MoHoEMG4US6byBe6x-zuiYmv3YffeCL49A1RyYhg4RedpEm2acjcQV_9PmnLooPj-LTjAQHiK2QvdyzeXbqgw%3D%3D)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe61eafb25a54eec966aec46e23c7f0e&_e=drgoTHJy-904mFggOeB_JgMF3vFo8ybf4AOT0QtgGgkcfho9u-T55wG0nH_VwcJ4NJZAi3Dq5Pz_4SvbuL7BFm9Os-evxTZ6kGVxYt49mkRdT2fOyYdwr6fWw8AR8kWG5-FVfO0XHy6eUg6v4R3RRxXnDHekj25oJKvvXckp7qz1w17-sMMDTqenkvmMFe-bdHDwdOInll4f9lClmgNrOWeJYjoAIfAGuQj1Os4RptcDcYUMP8jGtdIXyTnsiG82OAidT2BOBs858KO6DbFqC3xfXH26OlQ8uWh5oYu8qdExOhPCEey3oudLJtnX8dhA_MiyW6KbBdxgZR3Ge4c9sQ%3D%3D)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe61eafb25a54eec966aec46e23c7f0e&_e=drgoTHJy-904mFggOeB_JgMF3vFo8ybf4AOT0QtgGgkcfho9u-T55wG0nH_VwcJ4NJZAi3Dq5Pz_4SvbuL7BFm9Os-evxTZ6kGVxYt49mkRdT2fOyYdwr6fWw8AR8kWG5-FVfO0XHy6eUg6v4R3RRxXnDHekj25oJKvvXckp7qz1w17-sMMDTqenkvmMFe-b85-h-UcjPSz6PPprv9Pn9HUVL3QFTK4fg9nD643TG3WAzteSN2Ln2VNeXkPNyivzT61Zqn9ZV5IhDO0B84tSbMmhuDtY7ZQt8oSgos91VobYnmSgSUMZcTMbA3AVnb_4pubP1cJlDw1DMMquzska7Q%3D%3D)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe61eafb25a54eec966aec46e23c7f0e&_e=drgoTHJy-904mFggOeB_JgMF3vFo8ybf4AOT0QtgGgkcfho9u-T55wG0nH_VwcJ4NJZAi3Dq5Pz_4SvbuL7BFm9Os-evxTZ6kGVxYt49mkRdT2fOyYdwr6fWw8AR8kWG5-FVfO0XHy6eUg6v4R3RRxXnDHekj25oJKvvXckp7qz1w17-sMMDTqenkvmMFe-bGaKI47ugQ_oHhc_QZcfmg21zDXTExObCyY9aP-KUHpZwHpF3d8kQxud-_YteNyVYZkouvGl6gONxAFcltmbRdlMLL8zjZlwKw5fI5klbVvUbzNkmQJTcSzXluejiACwyCado5f4aLMM9xj5aexB8_w%3D%3D)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe61eafb25a54eec966aec46e23c7f0e&_e=drgoTHJy-904mFggOeB_JgMF3vFo8ybf4AOT0QtgGgkcfho9u-T55wG0nH_VwcJ4NJZAi3Dq5Pz_4SvbuL7BFm9Os-evxTZ6kGVxYt49mkRdT2fOyYdwr6fWw8AR8kWG5-FVfO0XHy6eUg6v4R3RRxXnDHekj25oJKvvXckp7qz1w17-sMMDTqenkvmMFe-bPZqp36FkcO1Ia9dmqzfBOF58Uxz7_Wms_yCNjT02inx9st1h1hvawx70bvuPAOYr0d9BbdqK51w8E-R-4aD3iv-m4y1MPQeAX7hAlpt0UVclkILyJxPG0xbtli1snpv9ZIycJs7VFHI2eEeJ29DTjQ%3D%3D)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe61eafb25a54eec966aec46e23c7f0e&_e=drgoTHJy-904mFggOeB_JgMF3vFo8ybf4AOT0QtgGgkcfho9u-T55wG0nH_VwcJ4NJZAi3Dq5Pz_4SvbuL7BFm9Os-evxTZ6kGVxYt49mkRdT2fOyYdwr6fWw8AR8kWG5-FVfO0XHy6eUg6v4R3RRxXnDHekj25oJKvvXckp7qz1w17-sMMDTqenkvmMFe-bmlqgqxpAatQ8tc9EECmbY-ZYh7ARxYz8dMkV33CCwE0c1EgtQI9uJHm2NnAeH_SYJrEXCvFGuGxWDSgco7M4W4RU0I4iVz33XDQZFxreoqiaMiff7kUib6xW62Q_lj7VZCUxSE1Gc3VamG1N8lMRsw%3D%3D) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances... Dear Friend, I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances... ...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him. That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo. Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend. He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation. And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. But first, let me explain what happened... On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a violent criminal named Quadren Wilson. Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom. Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice. Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out. With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up. Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward. Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle. Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat. Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark. Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster. And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison. Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD). We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) offering to help Mark. This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help. They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge! But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it. This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question: Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family. Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family. Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF. With deepest gratitude, Becky Wagner P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do. This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others. Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Arrested for speaking the truth
body:
What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders?

| | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? I'll tell you. **We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I 'm asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech. **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=07aa4cef4deb4aef982698b4bdcc7233&_e=8v8wAwYgiChgkxIA-ChcIbl_r3R5zs51Iy2qCSzv_H_9dG7HAz092hgawOHJ0JoDSdp8zfftvKrwyKbBV3Hmjx0H2aukx3A0df2HU8iJrFAQygDji2niKDDiWoObeoHo3QRvnaSlJm0uEaduBQbAEMsot8Wq1EZK3mbbcAzEkBcbBaL0WRkuo7_-sk6-kfPvzIgt08ckWzh5ktJDXZ8o1WznJoeRB3WLvnZl01G1bl38VgXOUAL5_z-zB99E6bK6gN9IjMQSvDz5A5rgmuAmOe49pq3TPBioBqh1grmMkgzDcxeUar9_hBOiz_c45Bq2bccfxxBANOhfhuRWWosQOr_n2QdKeDfdXaQIwWwBGGgnvfVEExwfVMHCMZ0Qtv1P) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! **That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can't win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=07aa4cef4deb4aef982698b4bdcc7233&_e=8v8wAwYgiChgkxIA-ChcIbl_r3R5zs51Iy2qCSzv_H_9dG7HAz092hgawOHJ0JoDSdp8zfftvKrwyKbBV3Hmjx0H2aukx3A0df2HU8iJrFAQygDji2niKDDiWoObeoHo3QRvnaSlJm0uEaduBQbAEMsot8Wq1EZK3mbbcAzEkBcbBaL0WRkuo7_-sk6-kfPvzIgt08ckWzh5ktJDXZ8o1WznJoeRB3WLvnZl01G1bl0BGQLNJF0v3HlUIOwnwRpVL-HyXXEnb58kycvJycLu2EuZE_jD1cm5UGrKH6R-i3hYhEHBgCrkApsrJT40xW1B47Z8_S7WtTUDFfAdUEOM-cb0TfUTUiawBP_31z7DnWQSTbdImghfRQqlxl7FNrRW) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=07aa4cef4deb4aef982698b4bdcc7233&_e=8v8wAwYgiChgkxIA-ChcIbl_r3R5zs51Iy2qCSzv_H_9dG7HAz092hgawOHJ0JoDSdp8zfftvKrwyKbBV3Hmjx0H2aukx3A0df2HU8iJrFAQygDji2niKDDiWoObeoHo3QRvnaSlJm0uEaduBQbAEMsot8Wq1EZK3mbbcAzEkBcbBaL0WRkuo7_-sk6-kfPvzIgt08ckWzh5ktJDXZ8o1WznJoeRB3WLvnZl01G1bl1mSwsMsfsMSHeu8v1OcV8UomlYF-pS3fuk5e7gjDgastWnVKtTsbez3DH29DOT-YvvpWt8evmxgBbIwQ5bWYKKCh5jxaBtfcO6e0RbtBe8PtWSfKEJCEPOVNFCuK8eGp2fNq5EfRrbj3d9SYkqGT_k) Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,

clean_body: What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? | | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? I'll tell you. We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea. One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao. Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress. But we can't win without you. Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead. Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support. Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. - | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: =?utf-8?B?UmFxdWVsIFRlcsOhbg==?=
subject: We desperately need Medicare for All.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Raquel Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_051623_Baseballgame&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_051623_Baseballgame&amount=5]
Hi friend,
Our country is facing a crisis too many of our leaders are ignoring: our broken healthcare system.
Arizona has nearly 800,000 uninsured residents with many underserved communities disproportionately affected. Hispanics make up 60% of uninsured Arizonans.
That number might soon rise as over 600,000 Arizonans on Medicaid could suddenly lose healthcare coverage as the federal COVID-19 public health emergency ends. With one in every three Arizonans relying on Medicaid for healthcare coverage this would be a huge setback we can’t afford.
Arizonans and working families deserve better. That’s why I strongly support a single-payer Medicare for All system. When we make it to Congress, we will fight like hell against corporate money and special interests to make universal healthcare a reality.
If you believe working families deserve affordable quality healthcare, join our grassroots campaign. Pitch in $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_051923_Healthcare&amount=20]
Critics always ask, “How can we afford Medicare for All?” What we should be asking is, “How long can we afford to go on as we are?”
Americans continue to pay the highest healthcare costs in the developed world yet our healthcare outcomes are only getting worse – from lower life expectancy to higher infant mortality rates.
It feels like premiums and copays keep increasing each year while coverage never improves leaving us paying out of pocket to fill in the gaps. Meanwhile, insurance and pharmaceutical companies post record profits while their business executives take home millions. That is a terrible deal. We deserve better.
We can’t accept this subpar status quo. So friend, what do you say? Join our grassroots campaign to support working Arizonans today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_051923_Healthcare&amount=20]
A ganar,
Raquel Terán
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_051923_Healthcare&amount=20]
Raquel Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States
Paid for by Raquel Terán for Congress

_From the moment Joe Biden entered the White House this administration has targeted conservatives like YOU because we pose a threat to the Left’s agenda and quest for power and control._

**For far too long the federal government has been weaponized against conservatives and freedom-loving Americans.**

President Trump was attacked with relentless witch hunts and false narratives for 4 years as a result of the blatant LIES used to interfere with his campaign. And through all the attacks, President Trump reiterated “They aren't after me, They're after you.” He was right. From the moment Joe Biden entered the White House this administration has targeted conservatives like YOU because we pose a threat to the Left’s agenda and quest for power and control. For far too long the federal government has been weaponized against conservatives and freedom-loving Americans. But House Republicans are doing everything we can to hold the radical Left accountable for these un-American attacks on conservatives and we are counting on you for help. Just look at what the radical Left and federal agencies have done to target conservatives over the past few years: The ATF is attacking lawful gun owners by creating a rule to make 40 million Americans felons overnight. body:
| | | Hello Peter, This coming Wednesday, May 24th, OLCV and our partners on the West Coast, Washington Conservation Action and California Environmental Voters, are hosting a webinar at 6pm. [**Join us and learn about how you can cash in on clean energy!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63527186/407122506/-1273621073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiNjJhZjJjLTczZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=42ZvX7yITcgVNHSq2I3AqsE9FRyG9g9uWXQzt9VIbIE=&emci=86887479-60f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fb62af2c-73f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) President Biden’s Affordable Clean Energy Plan provides families nationwide with clean energy tax credits and other benefits for making sustainable upgrades. Our virtual event will walk you through the various incentives and feature speakers from National LCV and Rewiring America. [**[REGISTER NOW]**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63527188/407122509/-1273621073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiNjJhZjJjLTczZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=42ZvX7yITcgVNHSq2I3AqsE9FRyG9g9uWXQzt9VIbIE=&emci=86887479-60f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fb62af2c-73f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)
**What:** Cashing in on Clean Energy: Save Money and the Climate
**When:** Wednesday, May 24, 2023 at 6PM PT
**Where:** Zoom Webinar I hope you’ll join us! Britney VanCitters

Organizing Manager, OLCV [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63527190/407122512/-1273621073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiNjJhZjJjLTczZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=42ZvX7yITcgVNHSq2I3AqsE9FRyG9g9uWXQzt9VIbIE=&emci=86887479-60f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fb62af2c-73f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, In 2022, Congress passed the largest climate investment in our history with the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), which included what is now the Affordable Clean Energy Plan. It passed because people like you never stop fighting for what we need - a clean energy future that centers racial justice and equity. It will be successful because of people like you, too. **[Join us on Wednesday, May 24th, at 6pm to find out more.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63527193/407122514/-1273621073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiNjJhZjJjLTczZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=42ZvX7yITcgVNHSq2I3AqsE9FRyG9g9uWXQzt9VIbIE=&emci=86887479-60f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fb62af2c-73f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Pres. Biden’s Affordable Clean Energy Plan is a game-changer for climate and clean energy. It will help put us on a path to cut climate pollution nearly in half by 2030, and better protect our communities from further devastation. How? In part, by providing tax credits and incentives so people like you can upgrade to clean energy and better energy efficiency, all while saving money on utility bills. Think: window upgrades, energy efficiency projects, electric vehicles, and more! **[Join us and our West Coast partners next Wednesday for a virtual event going over the incentives coming our way.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63527197/407122517/-1273621073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiNjJhZjJjLTczZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=42ZvX7yITcgVNHSq2I3AqsE9FRyG9g9uWXQzt9VIbIE=&emci=86887479-60f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fb62af2c-73f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63527200/407122522/-338648891?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiNjJhZjJjLTczZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=42ZvX7yITcgVNHSq2I3AqsE9FRyG9g9uWXQzt9VIbIE=&emci=86887479-60f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fb62af2c-73f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)****What** : Cashing in on Clean Energy: Save Money and the Climate

clean_body: | | | Hello Peter, This coming Wednesday, May 24th, OLCV and our partners on the West Coast, Washington Conservation Action and California Environmental Voters, are hosting a webinar at 6pm. President Biden’s Affordable Clean Energy Plan provides families nationwide with clean energy tax credits and other benefits for making sustainable upgrades. Our virtual event will walk you through the various incentives and feature speakers from National LCV and Rewiring America. [[REGISTER NOW]]() What: Cashing in on Clean Energy: Save Money and the Climate When: Wednesday, May 24, 2023 at 6PM PT Where: Zoom Webinar I hope you’ll join us! Britney VanCitters Organizing Manager, OLCV Hi Peter, In 2022, Congress passed the largest climate investment in our history with the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), which included what is now the Affordable Clean Energy Plan. It passed because people like you never stop fighting for what we need - a clean energy future that centers racial justice and equity. It will be successful because of people like you, too. Pres. Biden’s Affordable Clean Energy Plan is a game-changer for climate and clean energy. It will help put us on a path to cut climate pollution nearly in half by 2030, and better protect our communities from further devastation. How? In part, by providing tax credits and incentives so people like you can upgrade to clean energy and better energy efficiency, all while saving money on utility bills. Think: window upgrades, energy efficiency projects, electric vehicles, and more! : Cashing in on Clean Energy: Save Money and the Climate When : Wednesday, May 24, 2023 at 6PM PT Where : Zoom Webinar [[REGISTER NOW]]() A just clean energy transition plan is critical to reduce climate pollution while ensuring all our communities thrive. The Affordable Clean Energy Plan is the biggest opportunity we have to jumpstart this transition right now. Climate action can’t wait. Our invited speakers, including from national LCV and Rewiring America, will go over the different benefits and offer resources to help you plan your clean energy transition. “See” you there, Lindsey Scholten Interim Executive Director, OLCV | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters. | ---|---

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=62%2E552475%2EFl3Q5G)
Peter, this is going to be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the entire country.
To win, we need to establish support ALL over the map — including near you.
**We’re hoping to bring in at least seven more donations from 18326 in the next 24 hours. Can you help?**
**[What do you say, Peter? Re-electing Bob and defending our razor-thin Senate majority is going to take all of us, so we need as many people from 18326 to show their support today. Will you chip in?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230519-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230519-1&refcode2=62_552475_Fl3Q5G&akid=62%2E552475%2EFl3Q5G)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230519-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230519-1&refcode2=62_552475_Fl3Q5G&akid=62%2E552475%2EFl3Q5G)**
We know there are folks all over the Commonwealth who are dedicated to defending this Senate seat and our Democratic majority. **Now we need our team to take action.**
If just a few folks from 18326 (including you) chip in now, and we can generate the same support from other neighborhoods, it’ll add up to a major surge in donations.
But we can’t wait to act. CNN and Roll Call have named Pennsylvania’s Senate race as a top battleground, and Mitch McConnell has openly said he wants to target and flip this seat in 2024.
So we’re asking you and your neighbors to show your support now: **[Can you be one of the 7 supporters we need from 18326 by making a contribution to this email?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230519-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230519-1&refcode2=62_552475_Fl3Q5G&akid=62%2E552475%2EFl3Q5G)**
Thank you for being on the team!
Team Casey

Bob Casey for Senate

name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene's racist + dangerous words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Representative Greene wasn't even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.
#
Hey Peter, it's Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear:
In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me "aggressive" and saying she feels "threatened" by me.
**Representative Greene wasn't even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.** It echoes what happened with Emmitt Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being "threatening" or "intimidating."
While Republicans claim that gender affirming care, African American history, and childrens' books are stripping our country of its safety and security — our nation is at war with assault weapons and we're losing more and more innocent lives every day.
Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody's beliefs — which are clear for everybody to see — isn't "like calling a person of color the n word," no matter what false equivalencies she might draw.
This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can't let it stop our movement for progressive change.
[**We must ALL continue to speak truth to power, and I'll keep standing up to right-wing extremists. If you're with me, will you split a donation between Pramila and my campaign today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42169?refcode=em20230519-2502&t=1&akid=2502%2E420207%2Ehp47QW)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42169?refcode=em20230519-2502&t=20&akid=2502%2E420207%2Ehp47QW)**
Thank you for being on our side in this fight.
Peace and love,
Jamaal Bowman

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230519-2502-footer&t=21&refcode2=2502_420207_hp47QW&akid=2502%2E420207%2Ehp47QW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Colin Allred
subject: Peter, this race is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first.

| Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why.

I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63527463/407123116/-1166863400?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230519-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxODg0MTRmLTczZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n9L1l3S4vpoT7QCTk-h62Vsn6g9C7dFRyWNUC84-5FM=)
Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress, let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63527464/407123117/-1166863400?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230519-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxODg0MTRmLTczZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n9L1l3S4vpoT7QCTk-h62Vsn6g9C7dFRyWNUC84-5FM=)
After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas, we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63527465/407123118/-1166863400?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230519-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxODg0MTRmLTczZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n9L1l3S4vpoT7QCTk-h62Vsn6g9C7dFRyWNUC84-5FM=)
**It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help.[_That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress today →_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63527466/407123119/-1166863400?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230519-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxODg0MTRmLTczZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n9L1l3S4vpoT7QCTk-h62Vsn6g9C7dFRyWNUC84-5FM=)**

We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6, and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate.

**Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me.

[_So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10, or whatever you can between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it →_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63527468/407123121/-1166863400?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230519-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxODg0MTRmLTczZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n9L1l3S4vpoT7QCTk-h62Vsn6g9C7dFRyWNUC84-5FM=)**

Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning.

Colin Allred
| [DONATE >> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63527470/407123123/-1166863400?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230519-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxODg0MTRmLTczZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n9L1l3S4vpoT7QCTk-h62Vsn6g9C7dFRyWNUC84-5FM=)

clean_body: Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. | Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why. I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. = Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress, let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. = After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas, we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters. = It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help.= We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6, and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate. Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me. = Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning. Colin Allred | = * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. body:
| | | Peter, Over the past few years, we’ve seen our fair share of corrupt Democrats.

_But no families have tarnished America as much as the Clintons and the Bidens._

They’re both bad, but we want to know which YOU think is worse.

[**Which family is more corrupt - the Clintons or the Bidens?**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=ab70ff3dc7984198ae33408760279973&_e=4GeiFZH5Lg1s9SGbCYjB8UmSXRoyxetrA8y1BgEQxJgeO28onI1uujldVaEtUyZYiDW3TGNYdbu8w0--l2egOe_4CZ4De43OVj--TZSgRHKbJPdWzGRw3x34mD8Z4JTykz6Vd2rYSg_wlwyS85sNQCt-QXACslHPmCavozR65rKfUpVLT8a5NzTht4mPnESOGnG2b0W8JRrq7U06qXhiTC0IcxP_-qxLwY5FOwp8ILhmjKG91FbcNF1KkkkdCbOs-xNKZPXxLti10vUuU5-LDNJfsdyA0QW-wSEedolsKc9txYVxl2zkUL_TPoir30akc-9YccQ8tQ6p851Tr6vZHbllH9LqSM-kXi7n1t-TwAagGGRdr0YqAgvd4iD2nckbShb3NS9Ff1ixrNklqf-vXQ%3D%3D)

body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea1859ead8504c4e9748f806ec76814e&_e=OrIfyHQuhJUiocZIgKfKWvvFxV-HL5uya8wA58xwHgNv3A-2ZF_7kbY4JjcuJuhizuDQFdAn-g09MCWFs5HIPNuKt1wsn8LiqPIkdOUdtpRb_nOJ_HsrlF2d8ZVZeazBhvllKFixIuIqYZ25KdUcnM7D6QRyKDKSoOxZ3qk30QTSuJHEOyUSLn9K2WbDip64YvQe_lJ8BQrr0GXpJXLBXjWt7tczGOQQ4U1-5g2gB_sBHIKHbGVRoJh2_Yy4jNb37RDwHkdhU_tzy-xeYe8jgHrAdKLuO2lzvt1qqUDc6Tsz82Kc3hyg-OIxNWQtdUDWUjjXSPUeQn67-wpNb4WRPA%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | **Back The Blue 🚔**
---
| |
---
It’s [National Police Week](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea1859ead8504c4e9748f806ec76814e&_e=OrIfyHQuhJUiocZIgKfKWjmh5GyipIqS2vrWGx86JfVMkjt4qcVbIrTTd8kN2TnxI1iSmA8oMPI854vgfDVmamMSKvxsf8FmTXjQU7f1sL44wUkLfoL5JP_7S0HVWxJoh66rP3OySZiHE3YyYRXF3-c7B8nzdNn_r665lsMs8au2xxf4jJjL6YVBrYidsjIq4K-dE4pXokR9Yw26-tuKuArfEZK86-6G66iqCUADFVs5v9daXZU_vghCUxOiPxGS), a time to rally around the fantastic men and women who protect and serve. I can’t thank our police officers enough for putting their lives on the line every day. Our communities are better off because they’re on the front lines, and I’ve got their back, no matter what. This week I voted on several pieces of legislation that are all centered around keeping America safe, saving some hard-earned taxpayer dollars, and showing appreciation for these brave folks who put it all on the line every day.
* The Protect Our Law Enforcement with Immigration Control and Enforcement (POLICE) Act is all about [taking immediate action](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea1859ead8504c4e9748f806ec76814e&_e=OrIfyHQuhJUiocZIgKfKWoYv-EURbFkwVHQX8yovxecHk9O73esnYhRN8f8TKU6tpy0E_Z055rl4Msj3ZMvZzh7YyXRYJ7ekIzkGJbUGzDEtrJtnu2pAplZZ3gjqThAJLhpiGozHSk3tf6bgpUdzbgfDZFoHCdCUZgt1iif-pO1BK-xIfXGByaL5wRfXdddaLlEpmVwjp6-ZK6_gBS4Wvo0q2aGWeTCCyfC5u16JWG_2RZbKnQv7pW7cUoW-gpVzTljwcrh_KceVRCGHvkAUre-4k-4lgK9MVPs66h5PI802xHvA49EOdOU03XFTYD9a) to deport illegal aliens who have been convicted of or admitted to assaulting a police officer.
* Next, we’ve got a bill that would save American taxpayers around $8 million. The Federal Law Enforcement Service Weapon Purchase Act would allow officers to [buy their retired service weapons](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea1859ead8504c4e9748f806ec76814e&_e=OrIfyHQuhJUiocZIgKfKWm09GlHCeilQGYXQUbIH2xMX2FT9tvP4IEIB6s1HFGp1T7dVb2YxLoIa8QLcr_U4xkDCuLlispJ3zVbHvdLhl4Z7WCIOb5jbtxEvr5SQ_6BEA8-rG_-n-ZLkDUsRumRNWiHNR72zNxNKD1vP0n8L68a4IXRaB6V2snaETBYCkMYYHgIp2D9MKSSRlXRLj9ZGch7lCd5GI0tyc2q0WSu-y6jqSbpGTxmdZ_mKINGI6G-3qorMQ61lwSr02lPYAT4Xl5QODLuNlI40Zx2Ubzp5ecF8TB8x3hXYeKcooM5EuD-CMbFW6oNLpB_YetwnB-AKvA%3D%3D) at a fair market price instead of the federal government wasting money to destroy them.
* H. Con. Res. 40 is all about backing the blue and[ condemning any efforts to defund](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea1859ead8504c4e9748f806ec76814e&_e=OrIfyHQuhJUiocZIgKfKWnH52OWtFW9FRJomRVEQhyTEOV3a2nojJpSI3gv5NBLHu2kGL2fNsnZ6MEeag_D_UkG-G9LDCDEYEkc0d7S2PqyfWnkWKok0QzERE-7bkC6GtvpvJ_FbCG7QlEO8DyzBorN6tVjOLpMtzFoAP1EcsAm83KR6lO7jOxnJIxK7qtn4i7ggPVtlY3OC3pKDGRZXh9I7qTHZoc8I6zep2jyjR0OGN0n6DLsF9lt_e7R1W4Xb) or dismantle our local law enforcement agencies. This is especially important when you consider how Democrats have often demonized these heroes in an attempt to cut funding from local police departments.

When all is said and done, you’ll find me fighting the good fight for our police and standing up for those who risk it all when they put on that uniform.
---
| | |
---
| | **Fighting For Fiscal Responsibility 💰**
---

Tennessee has a new custom license plate option that benefits the [Millennial Debt Foundation,](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea1859ead8504c4e9748f806ec76814e&_e=OrIfyHQuhJUiocZIgKfKWnWqH-s0YLa4SW7GpOLTFxHhXaN6lEZRhABxzmJ-77wpa5JdtbVWKUm3adlVzUddO5yiIiPmaP1EVKATDpTwIZf6MCI2qv8Aj_4KEGQ0jHpODBc_qmaZWng3yaZFsTKXgaALHYxOPyfzNMVB0AcANUH2u2P9WcLx-U6Zr_Wj1nMITMeRgk1owmpUjlJcE5RoKg%3D%3D) a nonprofit on a mission to educate the public on the need for fiscal stewardship in government. In other words, stop the frivolous spending! This is something I’ve been saying all along. Designed and manufactured in Tennessee, this license plate is all about emphasizing the fact that less is more. We can’t continue to spend more dadgum money than we have. It’s encouraging to see my fellow Tennesseans taking a stand on [this important issue](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea1859ead8504c4e9748f806ec76814e&_e=OrIfyHQuhJUiocZIgKfKWk5AWzX9oZO3SKWKSPYibAkYBiR25w4VKh3AdorPseGfs6uZfTaTkfGMBxux3g0TOJ_HWjIgYyY9WiYNgBmX5YtkC_JHaXsAvyK9uNlZl8bCinJpaIz_PEqd5vorH1EUN2GFprwX5-jAqlya1vEsg8e9k58fEqTuHqv3tmcXXV4iwTBWuvF6lsOYkUQMMAgU7w%3D%3D).

Res. 40 is all about backing the blue and or dismantle our local law enforcement agencies. This is especially important when you consider how Democrats have often demonized these heroes in an attempt to cut funding from local police departments. clean_body: Friend: Don't miss Friday afternoon's top conservative news! | | | | | | | | | Your input is critical to us and to the future of conservatism in America. We refuse to be silenced, and we hope you do too. and never miss a story. To ensure our email makes it to your inbox daily and not spam, please add our email address to your email contact list. | ## ## ## ## ## | ## ## ## ## ## ## | | | ## ## ## You Might Like | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- ## ##

name: Team Hayes
subject: What I’ve been up to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63528483/407126758/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGQzM2I1My03NmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D08sspp8RiweQilWS6351R7bEscEtfZFHg-Ltt0jAWA=&emci=84e27ea4-85f2-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=84d33b53-76f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | Dear everyone, I am committed to fighting for the issues that matter most to our community, and I am proud to share with you the work that I have accomplished lately.
1. **I was able to secure millions of dollars I reimbursements for the veterans who reside at Curtis Home, **after hearing about funding delays hurting the facility. By reimbursing room and board, pharmacy needs, transportation, and more, we’ve helped make major strides in meeting the needs of our veterans.

2. **I have introduced the School Meals During School Closures Act,** a bill that would allow states or school districts to continue to provide free and subsidized meals during disruptions like extreme weather events. As a teacher myself, I know firsthand that without reliable access to food, students suffer significant and long-lasting effects on their physical and mental health.

3. **This week, I introduced the Social Determinants for Moms Act** to make key investments to wholistically address all the factors that impact our health and the health of our communities. This is a part of the so-called "Momnibus" act to save moms and address the disparities in maternal health.

I am proud of the work we have accomplished so far, but there is still much more to be done. As a Frontline congressional candidate, the work I do has never mattered more. [**If you would like to support me in my efforts to build a better and stronger future for our communities, please consider rushing a donation to help my team and I continue making wins.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63528484/407126786/1183618966?refcode=em_20230519_jahanaupto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGQzM2I1My03NmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D08sspp8RiweQilWS6351R7bEscEtfZFHg-Ltt0jAWA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63528485/407126787/1183618966?express_lane=true&refcode=em_20230514_jahanaupto&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGQzM2I1My03NmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D08sspp8RiweQilWS6351R7bEscEtfZFHg-Ltt0jAWA=)

clean_body: | | Dear everyone, I am committed to fighting for the issues that matter most to our community, and I am proud to share with you the work that I have accomplished lately. 1. I was able to secure millions of dollars I reimbursements for the veterans who reside at Curtis Home, after hearing about funding delays hurting the facility. By reimbursing room and board, pharmacy needs, transportation, and more, we’ve helped make major strides in meeting the needs of our veterans. 2. I have introduced the School Meals During School Closures Act, a bill that would allow states or school districts to continue to provide free and subsidized meals during disruptions like extreme weather events. As a teacher myself, I know firsthand that without reliable access to food, students suffer significant and long-lasting effects on their physical and mental health. 3. This week, I introduced the Social Determinants for Moms Act to make key investments to wholistically address all the factors that impact our health and the health of our communities. This is a part of the so-called "Momnibus" act to save moms and address the disparities in maternal health. I am proud of the work we have accomplished so far, but there is still much more to be done. As a Frontline congressional candidate, the work I do has never mattered more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. But our fight is far from over – **a recent poll by Harvard/Harris indicated that 64% of voters had never heard of ESG**.

[ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=86c12c0adab9484490f14f861d3c2a5b&_e=2MZREbqAtyTnZcAQclXnb5ruGwmYVf4CHE5o8fnvjn4YCIr5S9xkKogkCWOEvYnv79QFXmDB6gOT-Rlcn6hM8wlHBNz8jnpXb3WyfoE_6tmUkbLL028xrsJxrJZXL_s3c0ZETw8RUrS7z-y4ef5SMqlh9fx3NviXzY7-5WbFF0Tp2SiTbACRO8hGT2CpIc_3cp06cZg4VmTHG04Bl1GRWDpsmde2JluRli8LFB6ZyYm2RKoO-yxBMeSPXi_uZpUsZDNMH2du2i1YPf-73s1GjPY4aC7dywMePXJNlWW7XxQdqvoI4-EJE_hgM0fcG54nBP1pU-MGTedrpii86AlMxzDe4buQM5UmufyE3eTya9snIx5ng1lCbhDXvbWhtqNG)

name: Josh Harder
subject: I'm their target
body:
The Republicans aren’t even keeping it a secret who they’re targeting - it’s me.

Hi Peter, it's Josh.
I hate to say it, but this has been one of the hardest weeks on the campaign so far.
After being hit with a brand new 5 figure ad blitz by the GOP’s biggest Super PAC, the Republicans put out a press release calling me “the most vulnerable Democrat” in California. They aren’t even keeping it a secret who they’re targeting - it’s me.
And at the same time, we’re struggling to reach our fundraising goal this month. I almost couldn’t believe it when I saw we’re only 18% to our fundraising goal for the organizing and digital investments we need to make.
It’s going to take an incredible effort to take back the House in 2024, and if we lose this race there is no way we’re going to take back the Speaker’s gavel from extremists like Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene.
I’ve told my team we need a plan of response: that means hiring field organizers, digital ads in English and Spanish to fight misinformation, and investing in new strategies to reach young voters (more on this to come!).
But we can’t do any of this until we pick up the pace on our fundraising. That’s why I need your support today so we can respond to the GOP’s new 5 figure attack campaign and make these critical investments.
All of this to say, I hope you will consider making a donation to my campaign today. It would mean the world to know I’ve still got your support after all of this has happened.

clean_body: The Republicans aren’t even keeping it a secret who they’re targeting - it’s me. Hi Peter, it's Josh. I hate to say it, but this has been one of the hardest weeks on the campaign so far. After being hit with a brand new 5 figure ad blitz by the GOP’s biggest Super PAC, the Republicans put out a press release calling me “the most vulnerable Democrat” in California. They aren’t even keeping it a secret who they’re targeting - it’s me. And at the same time, we’re struggling to reach our fundraising goal this month. I almost couldn’t believe it when I saw we’re only 18% to our fundraising goal for the organizing and digital investments we need to make. It’s going to take an incredible effort to take back the House in 2024, and if we lose this race there is no way we’re going to take back the Speaker’s gavel from extremists like Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene. I’ve told my team we need a plan of response: that means hiring field organizers, digital ads in English and Spanish to fight misinformation, and investing in new strategies to reach young voters (more on this to come!). But we can’t do any of this until we pick up the pace on our fundraising. That’s why I need your support today so we can respond to the GOP’s new 5 figure attack campaign and make these critical investments. All of this to say, I hope you will consider making a donation to my campaign today. It would mean the world to know I’ve still got your support after all of this has happened. I’ll leave a link here: = Appreciate it. \- Josh Josh Harder for Congress 10 N California St Stockton, CA 95202 United States

Today, those judges hold the fate of abortion access in their hands. Keeping the Senate (and judiciary appointments) in Democratic hands this cycle is CRITICAL to protecting the right to an abortion. **We're surging support this week to protect medication abortion, which is under direct attack by anti-choice judges and legislators. Please donate before midnight to help elect women, save the Senate, and save abortion access:** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63529189/407129449/-1702582888?sourceid=1050075&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhkZDhhNS03N2Y2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1RBRFUgDG5BvdwwXd5RxMmgh4QQZ1ArcXXJVvt7onU=&emci=eb2cd2a6-6ef6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a28dd8a5-77f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Wanted to give you a quick update on the fight to protect medication abortion.

**FIRST** , an anti-abortion extremist judge in Texas singlehandedly attempted to ban the use of mifepristone, one of the pills used in medication abortion, by ruling the FDA needed to undo its approval of the drug. (The FDA studied, reviewed, and approved mifepristone **20 years ago**).

**THEN** the Supreme Court agreed to hear arguments in the case — and after its disastrous reversal of 50 years of precedence in overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , we know where this Court stands on abortion rights.

**NOW** news is breaking that the conservative-stacked 5th Circuit Court of Appeals is poised to uphold the Texas judge's ruling and restrict or destroy access to mifepristone.

This is _exactly_ why Senate Republicans, led by Mitch McConnell, spent their recent years in control of the Senate ramming through an unprecedented number of judicial confirmations. They knew that judicial monopolies would give them a new advantage in the fight to eradicate reproductive freedom in America. Protecting the Senate majority means protecting our judiciary from further anti-choice takeover, and protecting access to medication abortion.****Today is the last day of our Protect Medication Abortion Fund, and we're aiming to raise $75,000 for this fight. Will you be a part of it? Donate before midnight:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Protect-Medication-Abortion-Fund](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63529196/407129456/-1702582888?sourceid=1050075&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhkZDhhNS03N2Y2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1RBRFUgDG5BvdwwXd5RxMmgh4QQZ1ArcXXJVvt7onU=&emci=eb2cd2a6-6ef6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a28dd8a5-77f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you for taking a stand,

Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers)
Senior Vice President of Campaigns, EMILYs List

clean_body: | | | Judges 🤝 Senate 🤝 Abortion access When Republicans had control of the Senate, they stacked federal courts nationwide with anti-choice extremists. Today, those judges hold the fate of abortion access in their hands. Keeping the Senate (and judiciary appointments) in Democratic hands this cycle is CRITICAL to protecting the right to an abortion. We're surging support this week to protect medication abortion, which is under direct attack by anti-choice judges and legislators. Please donate before midnight to help elect women, save the Senate, and save abortion access: Peter, Wanted to give you a quick update on the fight to protect medication abortion. FIRST , an anti-abortion extremist judge in Texas singlehandedly attempted to ban the use of mifepristone, one of the pills used in medication abortion, by ruling the FDA needed to undo its approval of the drug. (The FDA studied, reviewed, and approved mifepristone 20 years ago). THEN the Supreme Court agreed to hear arguments in the case — and after its disastrous reversal of 50 years of precedence in overturning Roe v. Wade , we know where this Court stands on abortion rights. NOW news is breaking that the conservative-stacked 5th Circuit Court of Appeals is poised to uphold the Texas judge's ruling and restrict or destroy access to mifepristone. This is exactly why Senate Republicans, led by Mitch McConnell, spent their recent years in control of the Senate ramming through an unprecedented number of judicial confirmations. They knew that judicial monopolies would give them a new advantage in the fight to eradicate reproductive freedom in America. Protecting the Senate majority means protecting our judiciary from further anti-choice takeover, and protecting access to medication abortion.**Today is the last day of our Protect Medication Abortion Fund, and we're aiming to raise $75,000 for this fight. Will you be a part of it? Donate before midnight: Thank you for taking a stand, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) Senior Vice President of Campaigns, EMILYs List ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: MIGOP Honors Our Fallen Police Officers
body:
The Michigan Republican Party Supports Our Fallen Police Officers | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2653b0fda085/migop-honors-our-fallen-police-officers?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| [www.MIGOP.org](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=20da322e90&e=a2af77507c "www.MIGOP.org")
---
|
---
| | This week is National Police Week. As our nation pays homage to those who gave their lives in the line of duty, radical Congresswomen Rashida Tlaib and Cori Bush were the only two members of Congress who voted against recognizing and honoring fallen police officers. This despicable outward display of disrespect is an outrage, and demonstrates a complete disregard for the brave men and women who risk their lives daily to keep our communities safe. In these challenging times, it is essential to support leaders who uphold the principles that have made our great nation strong. The Michigan Republican Party is dedicated to defending the values we cherish, including a profound respect for law enforcement and the sacrifices they make. We firmly believe that a safe and secure society is built upon the unwavering support we offer to our police force. Now, more than ever, we need your support to ensure that our voices are heard loud and clear. By donating to the Michigan Republican Party, you can play a crucial role in promoting the safety, security, and prosperity of our state. Your contribution will aid us in advocating for policies that strengthen law enforcement and protect the rights of our citizens. Please consider making a donation today at [www.MIGOP.org](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=6cfa683092&e=a2af77507c). Every dollar you contribute will make a significant difference in our efforts to back our police force and preserve the core principles that have made our great state a beacon of liberty. In addition to your generous financial support, I encourage you to spread the word among your family, friends, and colleagues. Together, we can make a lasting impact and ensure that the Michigan Republican Party continues to stand as a strong advocate for our police officers and the communities they serve.
---
| | [DONATE HERE](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=121bd6bba1&e=a2af77507c "DONATE HERE")

Sign here to send a letter directly to President Biden: Take the steps to fire Louis DeJoy. [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/sign-here-to-send-a-letter-directly-to-president-biden-take-the-steps-to-finally-fire-louis-dejoy-3?source=2023DeJoy_DWS&referrer=group-democrats-win-seats-pac&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwspac-upsell23?amount=25]

Almost three years after his appointment, the United States Postal Service continues to languish under Trump-holdover Postmaster General Louis DeJoy’s failing leadership.

Medications, essential household items, ballots and more... All of these have been delayed in transit for millions of Americans under DeJoy’s reign while jobs get cut and workers prepare for potential slashes to their pay.

We must stand up for the small businesses, working families, rural and indigenous communities who rely on the USPS as an essential public service. Will you join us in taking a firm stand?

Sign and send the petition to President Biden: Nominate two new members to the USPS Board of Governors who are needed to fire Louis DeJoy and protect our postal services. subject: Taking back the House

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=33d2f6b0ea4b44f2938df6a4d0222188&_e=xIcTrLhFpOvVThmRMmKTSBB32I6RgbIihtrzb4m2UJAJPnR2EOcv17Vf3JcwdGFfD9RJ7wG1v52KKqkI4v4wBiPvq-bDdFFoHyC17smyu_F3S78tnoXehbIxNTvEUa5TKPqz7Nt0rXRPXZZw-nQRIWimPO_WMao1CHvqUbfA-0G3lyI4q1kOxK7Fdse7mbkGgkt-bbPSgVzaiiRmR75HjwGk1DiKKMelSHfAEDDZFyrFLEwrh0BIp_szJ__z8b0y5typ1FR7sLNoy7P5fY0pVIGwa_hnaw3OIOLTFQy1lravIaqdIp8KOoOT8ZB5z-WTwxraYNotaEhLsrrP05yFn87_c7jaIn27miQ-EyP4t08vNuqNk3xADxKyCWBKZm1jTUbIlkNIczNqP6Sh5d7WhDMplf77As8CnIrA-5TKl3w%3D)

How do we start? **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream. I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, but that won't work if we stay united. How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement. For The American Dream, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. So you might be wondering how I got here, Derek. Can I explain? 😊
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230519-1?refcode=em20230519-1-8381&amount=5&refcode2=8381_434096_E2nPnj&akid=8381%2E434096%2EE2nPnj)
_I’ll try to keep the story short(s)_
It all starts here: this entire GOP debt ceiling negotiation is a sad charade...and it’s *exactly* what’s wrong with Washington.
I mean, we’re playing with fire + the livelihoods of millions just for the GOP to try to put the screws on hungry Americans? _It’s nuts!!!_
Buuut — and this was the reason for our press conference today — these Republican antics are the whole reason why the 14th Amendment exists. If President Biden invokes the 14th Amendment, the United States can keep paying its bills on time...and we need to be prepared to use it.
**TL: DR; We can’t let these reckless Republicans hold the economy hostage.**(And, if our unelected Supreme Court Justices try to block the use of the 14th Amendment and blow up our economy, that’s on them.)
Anyways, that’s how I ended up on stage with my colleagues today, asking President Biden to invoke the 14th + shut down radical Republican budget demands.
And maybe, y’know, not exactly blending in. 🩳
**Look, I promise I’m always gonna be the guy you supported on the campaign, and I hope you’ll stick with me in these tough fights.****[Kick in a donation now to show your support, if you can spare it.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230519-1?refcode=em20230519-1-8381&amount=5&refcode2=8381_434096_E2nPnj&akid=8381%2E434096%2EE2nPnj)**

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

body:
The complaint accuses Sinema of illegally using campaign funds for personal gain | | | Peter – It's true—we've filed a complaint with the Federal Election Commission against Kyrsten Sinema. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_gpOvD9yv6LcjZkfCiUFHcR2p7QVbyMEVRdA8GtqyGWfwHiRCqF3iZzuZVQYxSsIx7w0Gdfzn9tGtKEYy0at3_wPsNgwNk50KlerW6owR5HYW7GLlEXbFRYNy9u0mcyjzk-Cl8NNUr3LKWsBJNIzsiVTssvpywyWAiYW65h_B9vrTnc57h3O9jJH9vgx2YR0u2aWgK4asM0okEnL8-0oA0rIUIDhe43NImy5YsRaQlpRaOqF1wZYc2by2np8urSgEZ0fOVW9-gj8JQhqVwyZY8-9IPCfSBHrCh-YSVzqvj5WHvbov7dFGnDfFjfOj8QOTn9BbFcAer7JlVDI91v7sskevzIB_dw69E-TikcZoNw/3wb/k2v5ByYuSJKqw2vesCe4Qw/h0/WflWXghQxWmYn2EmzOnm4uFITR0jVcO1umJWfozFFM4)Our what we already knew to be true: that Sinema is bought, sold, and paid for by Wall Street, pharma, and special interests. **This is why we are in this fight: to let everyone in Arizona know that
