Sinema’s team refuted the complaint as ‘a political attack,’ but an independent ethics expert says the complaint has merit:**“When I read this FEC complaint, I was shocked – and I’ve seen a lot of political corruption in my life,”** said prominent Arizona attorney Tom Ryan, who is a past president of the Arizona Association of Justice. **“You don’t get to mislead donors. You don’t get to take money that’s intended for a public use and turn it into a private benefit, and she has clearly done that in spades.”**

Because Sinema’s spending isn’t sporadic or minimal–it’s not just a dinner here and a hotel stay there: **our report outlines over $180,000 in campaign, PAC, and Senate funds spent on luxury hotels and resorts, car services, expensive charter flights, high-end restaurants, and wine.**
If this sounds out of the norm...that’s because it IS! Sinema is cashing big money checks from special interests to fund her luxury lifestyle, all while obstructing our most basic rights and dodging any accountability from constituents.**We’ve had enough.**
Sinema is required to respond to a complaint filed against her with the FEC. She is constantly practicing the art of the dodge–but she sold out and we’re going to make sure she answers for putting Arizona second time and again.
**When you have no moral high ground you’ll take checks from anyone–which is why Sinema’s war chest is so big. Our campaign has been fueled by 17,000 small dollar donors.** Your support grants us the tools necessary to do research like this on Sinema’s potentially illegal and unethical behavior and bring it to light.
[**If you can, please help fund our fight to hold Sinema accountable.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_gpOvD9yv6LcjZkfCiUFHzZg_AHGGyRoVoB_r-T7CHDME3Rlv0nNBI5wSqEJKHELiwgsrHuThbeXd_qGoSudngcNl0mWvZxkNL-O2tFy-aJ475E-hm52-KUjYSWoyF_k2TxQ3SGUj3ktnYlJIfcvZqX22iD7EwpxfbK9q3N44_SioE9M7o71uecxl9beOitPljIvDqC35eK3sOvrv5rgP92DcjUTaRLiakgErGNrS5Zj-_kdOdnEDNFgk7kOFaX1ZjoKyItfRcv0yXFrX58aVD8wA-DPQ1fCQu8B1OUl1pJqVwOAXVCHy-IuZMgT0rSM60-6enFfUhtZbcGzb--qFb6zexBXYLr95JRd8IvGLLw/3wb/k2v5ByYuSJKqw2vesCe4Qw/h8/ARAUYgXQ4ai71ZjghrrrA6c5gWgPYVOWbX93Cc6EP_8)
**It won’t be easy–but we’re ready to fight tooth and nail to secure better leadership for Arizona.**
Your help is greatly appreciated,
-Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024

To all my fellow servicemen and servicewomen, I salute you and thank you for your service. ♥️
Peter, it's**Armed Forces Day** tomorrow, a culmination of **Armed Forces Week. ** **_It's a time to give the brave women and men who serve our country the love and recognition they deserve. _** This celebration has special meaning to me. I had the privilege to serve in the U.S. Air Force. After that, I worked in the DOD and VA. I dedicated my career to giving back to the troops who so selflessly defend our freedom. [_**That's why I'm running for Congress. Please contribute $12 to ensure that the thousands of American troops have a clear voice in the House.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=9eb7aafc4014459eb4a7515983fc350f&_e=4FbEkRn-d4LC9s_GkVO9p2BLdVbJlAZUTgBQl4LvHjJ3p30L1wxAQI3BYlY36gJ6pLhVCgVQcVy9u2LpK4jfJwSP-0SbUaWisBheAPx8TMK7mzeN4vdWmK7ro1E0LX4s_sYOfnJhjPeDyPIfwf-JSN5MqNILv8iDzzWGbOd9oMd_SyeIgDhl4wUg_v6-uhbRqCsGWMoO7rYyABf9Qw5XElLw43UofDWatzqwO8-KcLpznSmn_b3hvbuxaZeTCZtbVu_kRJx3uYggELdbNwTXSg%3D%3D)

Entering into the military was a defining moment in my life. I learned to handle a firearm, harness discipline and provided life-saving support to warfighters while deployed stateside and overseas. While many of the principles I mastered in the military serve me today, I was able to end my service and move forward in life. _**Others aren't so lucky.**_ Thousands of our veterans struggle to adapt to a new life, held back by the trauma they experienced fighting for our country. Our leaders are failing to give them the support they need. [_**Your $12 donation today will help me build a winning campaign team and give our Armed Forces the backup they deserve.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=9eb7aafc4014459eb4a7515983fc350f&_e=4FbEkRn-d4LC9s_GkVO9p2BLdVbJlAZUTgBQl4LvHjJ3p30L1wxAQI3BYlY36gJ6pLhVCgVQcVy9u2LpK4jfJwSP-0SbUaWisBheAPx8TMLRdIJuSPeqt0DiSjhDkxilHfU3iR5N3azI9XDk6rdG9hf0zAi7LWD8FOiwgyo67TeQIPXM6QwocUmwGdLjlhRbQeI8DwSLrMTEb6k-8HOUg_dlWyPDW7YeySeT6m_UxoUN-lvWZ4K7le0kqhPguwj-KbnT0yJNd85Sx0Eib6wQsg%3D%3D) _I promise to always have their six._ Thank you,**Mariela Roca**

clean_body: To my brothers and sisters| | | | | To all my fellow servicemen and servicewomen, I salute you and thank you for your service. ♥️ Peter, it'sArmed Forces Day tomorrow, a culmination of Armed Forces Week. It's a time to give the brave women and men who serve our country the love and recognition they deserve. This celebration has special meaning to me. I had the privilege to serve in the U.S. Air Force. After that, I worked in the DOD and VA. I dedicated my career to giving back to the troops who so selflessly defend our freedom. Entering into the military was a defining moment in my life. I learned to handle a firearm, harness discipline and provided life-saving support to warfighters while deployed stateside and overseas. While many of the principles I mastered in the military serve me today, I was able to end my service and move forward in life. Others aren't so lucky. Thousands of our veterans struggle to adapt to a new life, held back by the trauma they experienced fighting for our country. Our leaders are failing to give them the support they need. I promise to always have their six. Thank you,Mariela Roca | | | | | | | Mariela Roca is a veteran of the U.S. Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Air Force or the Department of Defense.

Peter, it’s time to let Republicans know we’ve had enough. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Republicans are not stopping their attacks anytime soon. So, we must be relentless in our efforts to stop them. name: Geoff Simpson
subject: I’m pissed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, I’m pissed.

Marjorie Taylor Greene is going full-on racist. Calling Jamaal Bowman
“aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by him.

It’s not just disappointing. It’s dangerous. She put a target on his back
for her MAGA extremists, QAnon conspiracist and white supremacist friends.

I need your help. Can we show Jamaal we have his back today? What would be
really meaningful is if we can pour love + support on him today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134525?refcode=em20230519-29027&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29027%2E1203867%2EDveHhL ]Rush a split $3 donation to Jamaal’s campaign today to
show him we’ve got his back as he fights off these bigoted attacks. Every
dollar helps Jamaal keep speaking out for US in Congress and will help us
elect more progressives.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134525?refcode=em20230519-29027&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29027%2E1203867%2EDveHhL ]Contribute $3

Jamaal represents the best of JD. The best of America. A passionate and
tireless advocate for the voiceless. A guy who has spent his entire life
serving others.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134525?refcode=em20230519-29027&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=29027%2E1203867%2EDveHhL ]I hope you’ll join me in supporting Jamaal today. Please split a
contribution between JD and Jamaal today. We have his back and we won’t
let these disgusting attacks stand.

Thank you.

Geoff Simpson
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=29027%2E1203867%2EDveHhL ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=29027%2E1203867%2EDveHhL ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

name: Maya Castillo @ FFA
subject: ICYMI, Brian Kemp just signed TWO anti-voter laws
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
We’ve seen how when Fair Fight Action activists come together, we have the power to stop extremists in their tracks. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63532061/407139250/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230519_f_kemp2_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQzYTU1Ni03ZmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pV-na8jRv3mIPlU7MpHuB3FoKYADapeIzUzvEtD0riI=&emci=c6e89950-7ff6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9543a556-7ff6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | I’m reaching out with an update from Georgia: **Governor Brian Kemp signed TWO anti-voter bills into law this month.** This is Kemp’s latest attack on our democracy, but it’s certainly not his last. The Fair Fight Action team works day in and day out to fight back against anti-voter measures and advocate for legislation that will lift up voters’ voices. But it’s only possible because of activists like you, so I’m asking: [_**Will you chip in $5, $25, or anything you can swing to help respond to future anti-voter attacks in Georgia and beyond?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63532062/407139251/-130772955?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230519_f_kemp2_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQzYTU1Ni03ZmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pV-na8jRv3mIPlU7MpHuB3FoKYADapeIzUzvEtD0riI=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63532063/407139252/-130772955?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230519_f_kemp2_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQzYTU1Ni03ZmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pV-na8jRv3mIPlU7MpHuB3FoKYADapeIzUzvEtD0riI=)
---
If you need a bit more convincing, I’ll tell you more about what we’re up against:
During this year’s legislative session, extremists introduced numerous bills attempting to silence our voices and attack our elections — particularly for Black and brown voters who often already overcome immense barriers to the ballot box. While we were successful in mobilizing activists to stop the majority of these anti-voter bills, SB 222 and SB 92 made it onto Kemp’s desk.
These laws will criminalize hardworking elections officials, deny them necessary funds for our elections, and create a state commission to target and remove democratically elected district attorneys. **They’re unfair, they’re undemocratic, and they’re shameful.**
We’ve seen how when Fair Fight Action activists come together, we have the power to stop extremists in their tracks. But there’s a great deal of preparation that goes into ensuring that we can respond quickly and effectively to these anti-voter attempts — so that’s why I’m asking for your support right away.
**[Please chip in $5, $25, or any other amount today to support Fair Fight Action’s efforts to respond to — and stop — future attempts to suppress the freedom to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63532064/407139253/-796428265?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230519_f_kemp2_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQzYTU1Ni03ZmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pV-na8jRv3mIPlU7MpHuB3FoKYADapeIzUzvEtD0riI=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63532065/407139254/-130772955?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230519_f_kemp2_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQzYTU1Ni03ZmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pV-na8jRv3mIPlU7MpHuB3FoKYADapeIzUzvEtD0riI=)
---
Thanks for your support,
Maya Castillo
Director of Voter Protection, Fair Fight Action
**P.S.** — I totally get it if you're not in a position to donate today. If that’s the case for you, will you please forward this message to 3 friends and ask them to make a contribution to Fair Fight Action’s efforts?
|

clean_body: We’ve seen how when Fair Fight Action activists come together, we have the power to stop extremists in their tracks. | | | I’m reaching out with an update from Georgia: Governor Brian Kemp signed TWO anti-voter bills into law this month. This is Kemp’s latest attack on our democracy, but it’s certainly not his last. The Fair Fight Action team works day in and day out to fight back against anti-voter measures and advocate for legislation that will lift up voters’ voices. But it’s only possible because of activists like you, so I’m asking: = | = If you need a bit more convincing, I’ll tell you more about what we’re up against: During this year’s legislative session, extremists introduced numerous bills attempting to silence our voices and attack our elections — particularly for Black and brown voters who often already overcome immense barriers to the ballot box. While we were successful in mobilizing activists to stop the majority of these anti-voter bills, SB 222 and SB 92 made it onto Kemp’s desk. These laws will criminalize hardworking elections officials, deny them necessary funds for our elections, and create a state commission to target and remove democratically elected district attorneys. They’re unfair, they’re undemocratic, and they’re shameful. We’ve seen how when Fair Fight Action activists come together, we have the power to stop extremists in their tracks. But there’s a great deal of preparation that goes into ensuring that we can respond quickly and effectively to these anti-voter attempts — so that’s why I’m asking for your support right away. = = Thanks for your support, Maya Castillo Director of Voter Protection, Fair Fight Action P.S. — I totally get it if you're not in a position to donate today. If that’s the case for you, will you please forward this message to 3 friends and ask them to make a contribution to Fair Fight Action’s efforts? | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. If you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please click . If you would like to no longer receive emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION

subject: A View from the Campaign Trail

body:
https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6b5087b15b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Throughout my campaign for Governor, I have been blessed to meet and share my vision for Indiana with Hoosiers. We are hitting the ground running with so much support across the state. This week, I am honored to share five endorsements I received...
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6b5087b15b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"Suzanne Crouch has a proven record of leadership and a unique understanding of local government and finance. Suzanne is responsive and has been instrumental in navigating state government to help move Hamilton County projects forward on a timely basis. But for her work, support and partnership, many Hamilton County projects just would not have become a reality. I look forward to Suzanne guiding the state as governor!"
Commissioner Christine Altman, Hamilton County
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6b5087b15b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"Suzanne is a proven leader and relates to all Hoosiers. Her personal story is one of service to others. Her Conservative values resonate with Hoosiers. I am proud to work with her and endorse her candidacy."
Bob Grand, Former Managing Partner of Barnes & Thornburg
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6b5087b15b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"I have tremendous respect for Suzanne, and I endorse her for Governor. She has been a fiscal conservative as a State Rep and Vice Chair of the House Ways and Means Committee, as Indiana Auditor of State and now as Lt. Governor and President of the Senate."
State Senator Ryan Mishler, SD-9
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6b5087b15b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"It is my honor and privilege to endorse Suzanne Crouch for Governor. She has dedicated her life to public service and has always put the needs of her constituents and the State of Indiana first. In every position that she has held, our community and our state has thrived. Suzanne is the best person for the job. She is a woman of integrity and character. She has always conducted herself with honesty and dignity. I wholeheartedly endorse my friend Suzanne Crouch for Governor."
State Representative Wendy McNamara, HD-76
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=6b5087b15b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"I support Suzanne Crouch for Governor as a fiscal conservative who will bring transparency and accountability to Indiana's government."
Craig Dunn, Former Howard County GOP Chairman

clean_body: Throughout my campaign for Governor, I have been blessed to meet and share my vision for Indiana with Hoosiers. We are hitting the ground running with so much support across the state. This week, I am honored to share five endorsements I received... "Suzanne Crouch has a proven record of leadership and a unique understanding of local government and finance. Suzanne is responsive and has been instrumental in navigating state government to help move Hamilton County projects forward on a timely basis. But for her work, support and partnership, many Hamilton County projects just would not have become a reality. I look forward to Suzanne guiding the state as governor!" Commissioner Christine Altman, Hamilton County "Suzanne is a proven leader and relates to all Hoosiers. Her personal story is one of service to others. Her Conservative values resonate with Hoosiers. I am proud to work with her and endorse her candidacy." Bob Grand, Former Managing Partner of Barnes & Thornburg "I have tremendous respect for Suzanne, and I endorse her for Governor. She has been a fiscal conservative as a State Rep and Vice Chair of the House Ways and Means Committee, as Indiana Auditor of State and now as Lt. Governor and President of the Senate." State Senator Ryan Mishler, SD-9 "It is my honor and privilege to endorse Suzanne Crouch for Governor. She has dedicated her life to public service and has always put the needs of her constituents and the State of Indiana first. In every position that she has held, our community and our state has thrived. Suzanne is the best person for the job. She is a woman of integrity and character. She has always conducted herself with honesty and dignity. I wholeheartedly endorse my friend Suzanne Crouch for Governor." State Representative Wendy McNamara, HD-76 "I support Suzanne Crouch for Governor as a fiscal conservative who will bring transparency and accountability to Indiana's government." Craig Dunn, Former Howard County GOP Chairman SHOP NOW () THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! STAY TUNED FOR MORE ENDORSEMENTS TO COME! ============================================================ Copyright © 2023 Suzanne Crouch for Indiana, All rights reserved.

And if I made you proud, please, consider chipping in a few bucks so we can keep up the work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63532429/407141561/224150735?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230519nracnn_wm_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjY3ZmUwMy04MGY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1HVS4h7YI5fPozpY0Y4evkXnZ5VInM5a-4y50-D50k4=)** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63532430/407141562/224150735?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230519nracnn_wm_180da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjY3ZmUwMy04MGY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1HVS4h7YI5fPozpY0Y4evkXnZ5VInM5a-4y50-D50k4=)

I've been governor for 5 months, and I've seen how for the past 8 years the homicide rate in our state has nearly doubled. I've seen how in 8 years, the rate of non-fatal shootings has nearly doubled. We are dealing with something that is a nearly decade-long challenge.
My administration is taking an all-of-the-above approach to public safety. We are taking aggressive measures, including:
* Getting violent offenders off our streets
* Tracking and eliminating illegal guns in our neighborhoods
* Supporting mental health services
* Investing in our schools and job training programs

**I ran on making Maryland safer. And I am going to continue to deliver – no matter what the NRA says or does.**
**[You can learn more by watching my interview with Jake Tapper.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63532432/407141565/224150735?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230519nracnn_wm_180da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjY3ZmUwMy04MGY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1HVS4h7YI5fPozpY0Y4evkXnZ5VInM5a-4y50-D50k4=)**
Thanks for being a part of the fight to move Maryland forward.
Elevate,
Wes

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.

He secured the most substantial gun violence prevention reform in decades, making our communities safer. He oversaw unprecedented levels of job creation and drove the unemployment rate down to a historic low. But now that President Biden is running for reelection, his GOP rivals will be attacking his agenda at every turn. According to our records, you're an active Democrat in OH, so we're reaching out for your input. name: Our Revolution
subject: a signed copy of Keith Ellison's new book!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Thanks to your support, Our Revolution
helped Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison fend off multiple extreme
challengers bankrolled by police unions. In that role, he overcame
systemic barriers to convict police officer Derek Chauvin for brutally
murdering George Floyd.

While on the case, Keith kept a diary which he is now releasing as a book
with a forward from George Floyd's brother Philonise called Breaking the
Wheel: Ending the Cycle of Police Violence.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8670?t=1011&akid=4296%2E5885482%2E8yAUsB ]Since Our Revolution was so critical to helping Keith overcome police
unions and win re-election, Keith is offering Our Revolution supporters a
special deal! Donate $35 or more, and we'll send you a signed copy of
Keith Ellison's new book!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8670?t=1012&akid=4296%2E5885482%2E8yAUsB ][IMG]

Keith said he wrote this book to make sure that future organizers fighting
for change had "a historical account and a guide to officials when faced
with a case of police misconduct."

Without Our Revolution helping Keith Ellison win elections for attorney
general (last fall by less than 21,000 votes), he wouldn't be doing this
incredibly important work to expose systemic bias and model how to
overcome it.

America needs a clear dialogue around true public safety and police
reform. That’s why Keith will be joining us for a deep dive into this
critical topic on our LIVE Call Monday Night.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8670?t=1013&akid=4296%2E5885482%2E8yAUsB ]Click here to reserve your signed copy of Keith Ellison's new book with
a donation of $35 or more!

When we organize, we win.
Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230519_FR_BreakTheWheel_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_BreakTheWheel.tuiuO1&t=1008&akid=4296%2E5885482%2E8yAUsB ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2023 Movement Builder with a

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230519_FR_BreakTheWheel_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_BreakTheWheel.Ckrrtm&t=1009&akid=4296%2E5885482%2E8yAUsB ]GIVE MONTHLY

name: Team Heidi
subject: One candidate stood out at yesterday’s debate, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230519_em_fr_b1_TH_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230519_em_fr_b1_TH_initial]
Hi Peter, it’s Team Heidi—here's what you need to know from yesterday's debate:
Yesterday, we watched Heidi debate eight of her opponents in a debate hosted by NC5, the Tennessean , and Belmont University. We were so proud when she told everyone exactly what leadership for Nashville ought to look like:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230519_em_fr_b1_TH_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230519_em_fr_b1_TH_initial]
Peter, putting Nashville first means electing someone with the experience and leadership to meet Nashvillians where they are. To get there, we’ll need to leverage the full strength of our grassroots coalition. Can we count on you to support Heidi with a contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230519_em_fr_b1_TH_initial]
CONTRIBUTE TODAY >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230519_em_fr_b1_TH_initial]
Peter, 56% of respondents in a recent Vanderbilt poll said that Nashville is headed in the wrong direction.
Heidi knows that’s not a fair representation of Music city, and she has a plan to get us back on track that starts with the basics: cleaning up our city.
That means:
🛣️ Fixing our potholes
🚮 Cleaning up our litter
♻ Reducing our carbon footprint via recycling and waste reduction programs.
Peter, no one cleans up a room better than a mom, and Heidi has been both a mom **and** a mayor. Can we count on you to help us put Nashville residents by chipping in to Heidi’s campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230519_em_fr_b1_TH_initial]
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230519_em_fr_b1_TH_initial]
With gratitude,
Team Campbell for Mayor
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230519_em_fr_b1_TH_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230519_em_fr_b1_TH_initial]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230519_em_fr_b1_TH_initial]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment. Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote. Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream. Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to: Campbell for Mayor P.O. Box 330302 Nashville, Tennessee 37203 SUPPORT HEIDI [] Paid for by Campbell for Mayor Chip Forrester, Treasurer Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer Campbell for Mayor PO Box 330302 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: NPP Knocks on 9,000 doors in PA House District 163
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Good afternoon, friends, advocates and voters.
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use, events happening in your neighborhood, career opportunities, and other updates.
The New Pennsylvania Project Congratulates Heather Boyd on her victory in Tuesday's special election
Instagram post congratulating Heather Boyd for winning her special election [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_2265.jpeg]
The New Pennsylvania Project is pleased to join Delaware County and the voters of Pennsylvania State House District 163 in celebration of Heather Boyd’s projected victory in Tuesday’s special election.
“The voters of Delaware County have spoken and we are incredibly pleased with the outcome,” said Kadida Kenner, CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project. “The stakes of this special election were incredibly high, which is why our organization committed our time and resources to get out the vote. We look forward to Rep. Boyd joining the Democratic Caucus in Harrisburg, and Speaker Joanna McClinton maintaining control of the Speaker’s gavel."
New Pennsylvania Project's work on the ground focused heavily in Delaware County, working to get out the vote for Tuesday's special election. In total, we:
*
Knocked
on
9,000
doors
in
HD-163
*
Made
more
than
15,000
phone
calls
*
Sent
roughly
16,000
text
messages
We were also joined by Speaker of the Pennsylvania House Joanna McClinton at a canvass launch on Tuesday morning, who provided motivation for staff, fellows, and volunteers as they embarked on a long day of canvassing.
Welcome New NPP Staff!
Graphic welcoming a new staff member to the NPP team [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/FvxhoBKWcAYXBe1.jpg]
NPP CEO, Kadida Kenner, welcomes our newest staffer, Eric Leisure. Eric joins NPP as the Director of Strategic Communications (and may just be the guy crafting this exact eBlast):
Eric brings a “Frankenstein’s Monster” of a resume to NPP that includes over a decade of work at some of the Keystone State’s premier family-entertainment destinations followed by stints as a journalist with Vox Media and later a brand manager for a boutique MARCOM agency. Eric transitioned out of the private sector in 2020, becoming a Community Organizer in Squirrel Hill. He followed up that election cycle by managing Alyssa Cowan’s campaign for the Allegheny County Court of Common Pleas before returning to statewide work in 2022.
Meet our entire team: https://www.newpaproject.org/npp-team/ [https://www.newpaproject.org/npp-team/] #ExpandTheElectorate #DefendDemocracy.
NPP in the News
Reproductive Freedom and Voting Rights on the Line in Upcoming House Special Election [https://keystonenewsroom.com/story/reproductive-freedom-and-voting-rights-on-the-line-in-upcoming-house-special-election/] (The Keystone Newsroom)
“In no way is 2023 an ‘off-year election’ with so much on the line — and at stake,” Kenner said “Pennsylvanians must turn out in record numbers on May 16 for the important local, municipal and judicial elections."
Heather Boyd Wins In Delco, Democrats Keep Control Of The House [https://buckscountybeacon.com/2023/05/heather-boyd-wins-in-delco-democrats-keep-control-of-the-house/] (Bucks County Beacon)
Boyd’s election spares voters across the state an assortment of referendum questions Republicans had hoped to place on the November ballot to ban abortion and restrict voting accessibility had Ford won. The referendums would have circumvented Governor Shapiro’s veto power and allowed changes to the state’s constitution.
News You Can Use
GOP, Dems Propose New Legislation Surrounding Elections [https://www.politicspa.com/gop-dems-propose-new-legislation-surrounding-elections/121589/] (Politics PA)
The ink is barely dry on the 2023 Pennsylvania municipal primary and new pieces of legislation are being proposed in both chambers of the General Assembly to change them for the future.
Republican state senators are calling for primary runoffs if the winner does not have a majority of the votes. Democratic House members are calling for ranked choice voting.
5 things we know, post-primary edition [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/politics/2023/05/5-things-we-know-post-primary-edition/386528/] (City & State)
From the courts to the counties, there was plenty of action to follow on primary day in Pennsylvania. In Allegheny County, voters chose nominees for county executive, county council and district attorney in races that pitted progressives against more moderate Democrats. Meanwhile, Democrats successfully defended their state House majority in a special election for a vacant seat, and two vocal supporters of former President Donald Trump didn’t see the results they were hoping for.
Inside one northeast Pa. county that has made light work of running “two elections” since the advent of mail-in balloting [https://pennsylvania.votebeat.org/2023/5/18/23728987/columbia-county-election-day-primary-2023?oref=cspa_firstread_nl] (VoteBeat)
Columbia County, with fewer than 39,000 registered voters, realized it could only pull off its “two elections” more smoothly if the office got lots of extra help. Its election day operation is now based on robust cooperation from employees across the county government.
We're Hiring!
The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate.
*
Director
of
Programs
*
Regional
Organizing
Directors
(Capital
Region)
*
Regional
Organizing
Directors
(Lehigh
Valley)

*
Community
Engagement
Associate
*
Fellows
(part-time)
To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [https://www.newpaproject.org/careers/] .
Upcoming Events
Event Flyer for NPP's 2nd anniversary at the Phillies Game. Event details listed in text below. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Screen%20Shot%202023-04-21%20at%2011.47.33%20AM.png]
Happy 2nd Anniversary to the The New Pennsylvania Project!
Our work has been made possible because of the incredible grassroots support from so many across the Commonwealth and it is about time we all get together and celebrate!
Join us for a fun day at the ballpark to root on the Philadelphia Phillies!
When: Monday, June 5
Where: Citizens Bank Park
1 Citizen Bank Way
Philadelphia, PA 19148
Purchase tickets here: https://bit.ly/NPPBirthday?fbclid=IwAR0wV7oYkNNay-vlH-OS5rBza08NgT8PcLg5AIOhIuk9kYGKaK8jl_ZF-pE [https://bit.ly/NPPBirthday?fbclid=IwAR0wV7oYkNNay-vlH-OS5rBza08NgT8PcLg5AIOhIuk9kYGKaK8jl_ZF-pE]
RSVP here: https://bit.ly/NPPPhilliesRSVP?fbclid=IwAR3pk21gzlYWtMNiR4QQsoqlYaujr6xGUdUo-blP4A82owyRdimD3lkNL9E [https://bit.ly/NPPPhilliesRSVP?fbclid=IwAR3pk21gzlYWtMNiR4QQsoqlYaujr6xGUdUo-blP4A82owyRdimD3lkNL9E]
- Tailgate party starts at 4:00pm (parking lot TBD)
- Game starts at 6:40pm
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition.
In solidarity,
#TeamNPP
PA ELECTION DATES:
Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023
Last day to register to vote : October 23, 2023
Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot : October 31, 2023
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate.
Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023!
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]

name: Giffords.org
subject: Good news from Minnesota 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This afternoon, Governor Tim Walz signed lifesaving gun safety legislation into law
#

Friend -
This week, the Minnesota legislature had the courage to act, passing background checks and extreme risk protection order—aka “red flag law”—legislation into law.
Today, we were proud to watch as Minnesota Governor Tim Walz signed this transformative gun safety legislation into law.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230519-1-15&t=1&akid=5695%2E3935704%2EPls49Y)
Background checks and extreme risk protection orders will save lives, as they will ensure that guns aren’t able to fall into the wrong hands.
GIFFORDS worked closely with lawmakers to craft the background checks and extreme risk protection order bills that were signed into law today. So thank you. Your support is what gives us the ability to do this work.
But our fight to end gun violence is far from over. While this is a huge win for the state of Minnesota, and last month we saw a similar victory in Michigan, we cannot rest until every state in our nation passes lifesaving legislation like this.
[**So please, will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today so we can keep fighting for gun safety legislation all across the country?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230519-1-15&t=2&akid=5695%2E3935704%2EPls49Y)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-may23.hLCBBa&refcode=em230519-1-15&t=21&akid=5695%2E3935704%2EPls49Y)**
---

| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-may23.9ZfwpO&refcode=em230519-1-15&t=22&akid=5695%2E3935704%2EPls49Y)**
---

We hope you take a moment today to share in our pride about this good news from Minnesota. Thank you for all that you do to make these wins possible.
\- The GIFFORDS Team

name: Democrat Corruption Watch
subject: We need your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, Over the past few years, we’ve seen our fair share of corrupt Democrats.

_But no families have tarnished America as much as the Clintons and the Bidens._

They’re both bad, but we want to know which YOU think is worse.

name: Team AOC
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene’s attacks on Rep. Bowman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
These nasty remarks are racist and they’re dangerous.
#
Marjorie Taylor Greene has hit a new low.

These nasty remarks are racist. They are dangerous.
We need to have Rep. Bowman’s back in this critical moment. [Will you donate to his campaign and ours to help him fight back? Your contributions are a powerful statement of support.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230519-jamaal.ZIt2uT&refcode=em20230519-4350-P_FND_RES_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4350%2E2526796%2Ev3SNOR)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230519-jamaal.ZIt2uT&refcode=em20230519-4350-P_FND_RES_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4350%2E2526796%2Ev3SNOR)**
As Alexandria and Jamaal continue to fight for us in Congress, it’s imperative we remind them that millions of people in this country are behind them. With all of the nastiness that gets thrown their way, we need to show them love and support. Because solidarity in the wake of hurtful racist attacks can be a powerful tool for our movement.
Thank you for reading,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230519-jamaal?refcode=em20230519-4350-P_FND_RES_GFM&t=21&refcode2=4350_2526796_v3SNOR&akid=4350%2E2526796%2Ev3SNOR)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230519-4350-P_FND_RES_GFM&t=22&akid=4350%2E2526796%2Ev3SNOR)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Sen. John Fetterman
subject: You can take the guy outta Scranton, but you can’ttake the Scranton outta the guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
If Joe is gonna build a campaign that can compete for the long haul, he needs ALL of yinz + youse to pitch in now. | | |
---
Hey Peter -- it’s Senator John Fetterman, or as Joe Biden likes to call me “that big ol' boy.” (He really said that 😂) While he might have represented Delaware in the U.S. Senate, Joe is Pennsylvania through and through. You can take the guy outta Scranton, but you can’t take the Scranton outta the guy. Joe’s hometown taught him the importance of hard work, treating others with dignity and respect, and leaving no one behind -- values he’s taken all the way from his childhood home to the White House. **Joe has spent his entire career fighting for folks like me and you. Now, he needs *our* help to get a second term in office to finish the job. ✅** **Will you join me in supporting Joe Biden’s reelection campaign today? Anything you can give -- truly any amount -- will make a huge difference early on in this race.** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **** _Republicans Give Statewide Executives Massive Raises_ At a time where many Hoosiers are struggling to keep up with rising costs, the Republican supermajority [handed out raises](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63535320/407147890/-689737133?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDU5OTk1Yy04NWY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6WuD10qVi75vgRtmIHHHozjLzA5AirSOCvfQ_aeZXr0=&emci=c9a8e5fc-77f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b059995c-85f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) of tens of thousands of dollars to Diego Morales, Todd Rokita and more. The next governor will get a raise of 48%, Todd Rokita gets a raise of 45%, and Diego Morales will receive 39% more. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Republicans Give Statewide Executives Massive Raises At a time where many Hoosiers are struggling to keep up with rising costs, the Republican supermajority of tens of thousands of dollars to Diego Morales, Todd Rokita and more. The next governor will get a raise of 48%, Todd Rokita gets a raise of 45%, and Diego Morales will receive 39% more. The Governor’s raise is worth more than the average Hoosier teacher makes in a year. Now, they’ll be one of the in the country. Our educators and first responders deserve a raise before career politicians. Republican Supermajority Expanding Private School Vouchers Instead of Addressing Teacher Shortage The Republican supermajority expanded private school vouchers this past session to families of , amounting to a handout for those who can already afford private school tuition. This was largely at the expense of local school districts that are at a time when the state is in a teacher shortage. A from State Rep. Gregory W. Porter (Indianapolis) reiterates that most school districts did not get a funding raise that even equals the rate of inflation. Our students, teachers, and parents deserve better. Our schools need the resources to recover from the pandemic, help students get ahead, and address the teacher shortage. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. State Rep. Earl Harris, Jr. (East Chicago) will automatically enroll eligible Hoosier students into the 21st Century Scholars program. This program has helped thousands of low-income students go to college, and the new legislation will ensure even more have the same opportunity. “This bill will help so many Indiana students achieve a higher education, and in turn, will boost our state economy and enhance the quality of life for Hoosiers by helping individuals break the chains of cyclical poverty," The new has been signed and could of the program. Upcoming Candidate Trainings Saturday, May 13, 12-5 p.m. ET: “Train-the-Trainer (T3) Summit”: This training summit is only held once a year by the NDTC. Learn skills to take back to your local parties, campaigns, and volunteers. Register by . Tuesday, May 16, 1-2 p.m. ET: “How to Maximize Call Time and Raise More Money”: Learn more about raising money for your campaign and outreach efforts. Get important advice on developing a hard fundraising ask. Register by . Rural Urban Bridge Initiative Virtual Training Tuesday, May 23, 7-8 p.m. ET: RUBI’s presentation explains how the rural-urban divide came to be and suggests what progressive groups, candidates, and parties can do about it. The objective is to defuse hostility and contempt, find mutual understanding and common ground, and build multi-racial working and middle-class rural solidarity between rural, suburban, and urban dwellers. Our practical solutions are based on research by our own and other scholars as well as the personal experiences of rural progressive organizers. Register by ! Save The Date: 2023 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner More details to come on this year’s Hoosier Hospitality Dinner — but for now mark your calendars for June 16 at the Indiana Convention Center! 2023 IDEA Convention: Book Your Room Today! name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I will never stop fighting to protect the Sound
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I'm especially proud of this victory, Peter
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63535418/407148015/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjNhYjRiN2ItODVmNi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VpzfpMGrCCWFRnS2xoy96Hx-_2xSAjrpUfguxs-Zvgg=&emci=dd174575-85f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=63ab4b7b-85f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

In our region, we all understand just how vital Puget Sound is to our identity and our economy. The Sound's recovery is crucial to our region's environmental and economic future.

**That's why I'm proud to share that, as a result of legislation passed by Rep. Marilyn Strickland and I, the Puget Sound Federal Leadership Task Force has officially launched.**

Together, we're encouraging various government agencies and Western Washington Tribes to start the process of implementing a five-year federal action plan focused on Puget Sound restoration and addressing Tribal treaty rights.

**[We can't afford to wait to protect our region's most crucial natural resources — and that includes the Sound! If you agree we need to invest in Puget Sound recovery, please add your name next to mine today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63535419/407148016/-439893731?ms=em23_230519_pgtsnd_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em23_230519_pgtsnd_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em23_230519_pgtsnd_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230519_pgtsnd_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=3a0qatWUamr5NX0nezZHsMPaCNqc0h8VeGvSuS2796cHbjH1XJ90g1JTFvWQw+B5e3aGF0Vqxb+pCullN25D2XDWDMaMmnm2kqf+25NJBqDVdIZcRblndCGIdilsVx9HXMDnwEHe+XwWveaC9el3udUtY2MZZ/EQxKZOR0RLN6M=&refcode2=63ab4b7b-85f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjNhYjRiN2ItODVmNi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VpzfpMGrCCWFRnS2xoy96Hx-_2xSAjrpUfguxs-Zvgg=&emci=dd174575-85f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=63ab4b7b-85f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63535420/407148017/-439893731?ms=em23_230519_pgtsnd_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em23_230519_pgtsnd_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em23_230519_pgtsnd_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230519_pgtsnd_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=3a0qatWUamr5NX0nezZHsMPaCNqc0h8VeGvSuS2796cHbjH1XJ90g1JTFvWQw+B5e3aGF0Vqxb+pCullN25D2XDWDMaMmnm2kqf+25NJBqDVdIZcRblndCGIdilsVx9HXMDnwEHe+XwWveaC9el3udUtY2MZZ/EQxKZOR0RLN6M=&refcode2=63ab4b7b-85f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjNhYjRiN2ItODVmNi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VpzfpMGrCCWFRnS2xoy96Hx-_2xSAjrpUfguxs-Zvgg=&emci=dd174575-85f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=63ab4b7b-85f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)
---
Peter, for generations, our friends, neighbors, and families have built their lives and earned their livelihoods on the Sound. And for future generations — including my own children — to reap the same benefits and opportunities as their generational predecessors, we need to take action **now** to protect and restore the Sound.

Together, we can implement important changes like preventing pollution from stormwater runoff, protecting and restoring habitat, and restoring and re-opening shellfish beds.

**[I’m honored to have Rep. Strickland by my side in this important work to support Puget Sound's recovery and prosperity for years to come. If you're with us and agree Congress needs to invest in the Sound — and our region! — please add your name.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63535421/407148018/-439893731?ms=em23_230519_pgtsnd_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em23_230519_pgtsnd_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em23_230519_pgtsnd_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230519_pgtsnd_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=3a0qatWUamr5NX0nezZHsMPaCNqc0h8VeGvSuS2796cHbjH1XJ90g1JTFvWQw+B5e3aGF0Vqxb+pCullN25D2XDWDMaMmnm2kqf+25NJBqDVdIZcRblndCGIdilsVx9HXMDnwEHe+XwWveaC9el3udUtY2MZZ/EQxKZOR0RLN6M=&refcode2=63ab4b7b-85f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjNhYjRiN2ItODVmNi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VpzfpMGrCCWFRnS2xoy96Hx-_2xSAjrpUfguxs-Zvgg=&emci=dd174575-85f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=63ab4b7b-85f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

clean_body: I'm especially proud of this victory, Peter Peter, In our region, we all understand just how vital Puget Sound is to our identity and our economy. The Sound's recovery is crucial to our region's environmental and economic future. That's why I'm proud to share that, as a result of legislation passed by Rep. Marilyn Strickland and I, the Puget Sound Federal Leadership Task Force has officially launched. Together, we're encouraging various government agencies and Western Washington Tribes to start the process of implementing a five-year federal action plan focused on Puget Sound restoration and addressing Tribal treaty rights. Peter, for generations, our friends, neighbors, and families have built their lives and earned their livelihoods on the Sound. And for future generations — including my own children — to reap the same benefits and opportunities as their generational predecessors, we need to take action now to protect and restore the Sound. Together, we can implement important changes like preventing pollution from stormwater runoff, protecting and restoring habitat, and restoring and re-opening shellfish beds. It's an honor to serve you, Derek Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

| Fellow activist,

We held on to a Democratic majority in the Pennsylvania State House!

We’re very proud to say we played our part, having knocked on 9,000 doors and made more than 15,000 phone calls and 16,000 text messages in an effort to turn out voters in House District 163 for Tuesday’s election. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63536089/407148533/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230519Delcowin_N_TEAM_90do_3_A_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY3ODRkMTg5LTg2ZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZuxLekPLkcXsNF--lVQoAo6k584dXzc__X_bL8AIYVs=) The New Pennsylvania Project was honored to be joined by Speaker of the Pennsylvania House and NPP Board Member, Rep. Joanna McClinton, at our election morning GOTV launch in House District 163, Delaware County.

This is a significant victory for Pennsylvania, once again keeping our rights safe from the MAGA GOP’s attacks, and we couldn’t have done it without you, fellow activist.

**[Now it’s time to shift our full focus back to year-round voter registration and civic engagement. Our work does not end after election day. We’re very proud to say we played our part, having knocked on 9,000 doors and made more than 15,000 phone calls and 16,000 text messages in an effort to turn out voters in House District 163 for Tuesday’s election. = The New Pennsylvania Project was honored to be joined by Speaker of the Pennsylvania House and NPP Board Member, Rep. Joanna McClinton, at our election morning GOTV launch in House District 163, Delaware County. This is a significant victory for Pennsylvania, once again keeping our rights safe from the MAGA GOP’s attacks, and we couldn’t have done it without you, fellow activist. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = PS: Don’t forget to vote and encourage your friends, family, and community to do the same. In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. [**May 19, 1994:** First Lady Jackie Kennedy passed away leaving a legacy of American class and culture. Notably married to JFK and widowed after his assassination, Jackie Kennedy went on to marry Greek shipping magnate Aristotle Onassis. After being twice widowed, she began a successful career in publishing. [**May 19, 2018:** Prince Harry, the second son of King Charles III (then the Prince of Wales) married American actress Meghan Markle at St George’s Chapel, Windsor Castle. Queen Elizabeth II, his grandmother, granted him the title Duke of Sussex on the morning of his wedding. Following the ceremony Markle became Her Royal Highness The Duchess of Sussex. The couple has come under scrutiny following their departure from being working members of the royal family.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=db520da346414f14a9b934ec9ab2adec&_e=6uJxMGjEnYivp-k8yGWAOsAboJCHBEU_sIWKhZt8sWtO7JT9nDhAFZm8X_F9KLcDdFbh2vnSk6cEHkBW51hB678FBH7_P9v3ZFjghiETcyFzEKoVXC2l5i09oz_JwSE1_xU3J-ua9yP_7xZ-WrMePkJD6beJpvXx65hfj_OV3b2LLNnqt3knOlaqUwQbzWtIpVyeYqndZy7Lmt0SwcjrtQgnPVHRPFbajdwpfDr-w-s%3D) **Source -[royal.uk](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=db520da346414f14a9b934ec9ab2adec&_e=6uJxMGjEnYivp-k8yGWAOsAboJCHBEU_sIWKhZt8sWtO7JT9nDhAFZm8X_F9KLcDdFbh2vnSk6cEHkBW51hB6zi9l_o8Z52D48172KuD6HJVhKRBtGluGG73NtWrRYZRgBlWTK42YE4alLE2mYPGI6ANko4yLSsjSmwDCYyuEfb5isMEsYyT4es1235JXr5CaKp5meKUJX3ki-0y0VjtIjDH4aTGPkWqbsGbBWoyQcI%3D)**

clean_body: We’re now up by 46 points! | | Friend, Locking up the nomination and wrapping up the GOP primary as quickly as possible is the biggest defeat we can deal Crooked Joe Biden at this stage of the election. Behind the scenes, Soros already snuck an early $50 MILLION into 2024 in the hopes of a long, drawn-out GOP primary... ...But I know grassroots patriots like YOU are not about to give Biden and the Democrats that advantage. In fact, we’ve now SURGED to a 46-POINT LEAD – our widest margin yet! And when even fake news CNN is saying this about our lead, you know we’re running away with the nomination... “Trump’s primary polling advantage is historically large” Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Wed, May 17, 2023 Subject: Our new LEAD To: <[dpwillis67@gmail.com]> | Friend, Every week, our commanding lead over the GOP field continues to grow. Another brand-new poll just dropped that shows we’re up by43 POINTS! And it’s no mystery why... I’m the only candidate who can show the American people exactly what life would’ve been without Crooked Joe sitting in the White House. Voters like YOU remember what your lives were like when I gave my 2020 State of the Union Address: Our economy was booming like never before. Overseas jobs were pouring back into the country. Cost of living was affordable. We were not only energy independent, we were energy DOMINANT. Our border was SECURE. The wall was being built. Our streets were SAFE. Washington swamp creatures were finally beholden to THE PEOPLE. We were respected on the world stage. We were TOUGH on China and Russia. Your God-given freedoms were protected. Simply put, Friend, we were WINNING! And all of that can be had once more. But first, we need to wrap up this primary as quickly as possible. Biden and his billionaire special interest donors would love nothing more than a long, draw-out contest – in fact, Soros has publicly admitted as much. Which is why I’m counting on YOUR support to help lock up the nomination TODAY. Thank you, | Donald J. Peter,

**Shawn Wilson is running for governor of Louisiana, and he needs the support of Democrats across the country.**

Peter, the Louisiana governor's race will be one of the year's toughest, and it’s one of the most important in the country. If we win here, we’ll show that Democrats are fired up across the country and ready to defeat the extreme GOP agenda, even in places like Louisiana.

| | On Tuesday, one of the most important elections in the country kicked off: **_the race for Kentucky Governor._**

On Tuesday, the Trump-endorsed candidate for Governor secured the GOP nomination, setting the stage for one of the most crucial races of 2023. The gubernatorial election between Daniel Cameron and Democratic Governor Andy Beshear is now the most competitive race in the nation this year.

Mitch McConnell protégé Daniel Cameron's disastrous track record speaks for itself. He has attacked public schools and teachers, supported a health care plan that would leave over 100,000 Kentuckians without access, and botched the investigation into the tragic death of Breonna Taylor. Cameron's extreme agenda will hurt Kentuckians and boost the rise of MAGA extremism everywhere – plain and simple.

Peter, we’re asking you to help the Kentucky Democrats re-elect Governor Beshear and keep a Democratic check on GOP extremism. [**_Will you split $25 between the Democratic Parties of Kentucky and Georgia to help defeat GOP extremism?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63541378/407153172/829398920?refcode=20230519.2_GADems_5AJ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGIzMmY5Yi04YmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bXzksCUPhG_NqCp9aQ25kI16bg0l7HTMYmrgUT96qn4=)

We can’t allow a McConnell protégé to replace Governor Beshear. Andy’s been a strong advocate for all Kentuckians, and we need to re-elect him in November.

[**_Can the Kentucky Dems count on your help? Will you split a donation right now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63541380/407153180/829398920?refcode=20230519.2_GADems_5AJ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGIzMmY5Yi04YmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bXzksCUPhG_NqCp9aQ25kI16bg0l7HTMYmrgUT96qn4=)

Every dollar you donate today will go straight to defeating MAGA extremism and protecting the most vulnerable Democratic Governor up for election this year.

Thank you for your support,

GA Dems

May 19th, 2023 Bringing _you_ the latest news, updates and what you _need to know_ about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio
---
|
---
**☀️ Happy Friday!**
---
| |
# 3 Things to Know This Week:
---
* Matt Dolan was endorsed by 17 more elected Ohio Republicans this week, including 16 law enforcement officials.
* Matt Dolan continues to receive notable news coverage on his campaign trail stops, endorsements and direct policy hits on Sherrod Brown.
* Matt Dolan continued his focus on the need for enhanced border security to stop the flow of fentanyl across our southern border.

---
| |
# Get up to speed...
---
Matt Dolan was endorsed by 17 more elected Ohio Republicans this week, including 16 law enforcement officials.
* On Tuesday, during National Police Week, Matt Dolan was endorsed by 16 law enforcement leaders in Logan, Hardin, Butler, Hancock, Lake, Belmont, Knox, Morgan, Champaign, Washington, Ashtabula, Union, Fayette, Madison and Licking Counties! In a joint statement, they said, “The choice presently facing Ohio voters is one that carries ramifications for every city in our state and communities across America. As State Senator and a former prosecutor, Matt Dolan achieved a strong public record of supporting Ohio’s law enforcement community. Time and again, Matt has provided Ohio’s sheriff and police departments with the funding and programs we need. He is running a campaign focused on policy solutions and putting the needs of Ohio first. That’s why we support Matt Dolan for U.S. Senate.”

* To view the full slate of law enforcement endorsements, [click here](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=f1afd9204467452a9d7b3f95883c5b37&_e=k4CmmojvUZFKEmOfnkvyNRaleTjBLRkKd80my52PGvJ4gagX_9aqyjT7GsK7tGPIHvbk_dzEFxBnkzJff0Dk2nhNuD943_87E9zSlelKfhh9No5S5LjvtdVkNjYgUstPnRKV_EyglnI5tiYnh6Ihq6h_nMQaiPKh3L6_zDz3lGsgURj3uAx1HEnhxm6ObNwZid7sd-4zRsDoWW-e8qRWyemy6Aiklr49q1T6St9CZDY7rnvDQsVEB4G88pC4dESdXJBUXWp4Yj6UUtbFzwNjFQ%3D%3D).

* On Thursday, Dolan was endorsed by Mayor Christina Muryn of Findlay. Muryn said of Matt, “Civic participation and public leadership are needed more than ever to move our cities, state and nation forward. With the challenges that confront America today, it’s vital we elect experienced public servants willing to put the good of our people before their own self-interest. Matt Dolan is one such public servant. He has a strong record of working to get results for the people of Ohio and that’s why I’m proud to endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate.”

* To read Mayor Muryn’s endorsement release, [click here](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=f1afd9204467452a9d7b3f95883c5b37&_e=k4CmmojvUZFKEmOfnkvyNRaleTjBLRkKd80my52PGvKhV-gADQt4Ld72MMeUp-2NjwzeBRWTiWjbFuuxKhMZM4bKZ2BVa4QECTvRwwG3fnYxO8qJdMaWjiCzLeO3LWpux2ufI_GR6Zp4wTHaSFhq2Vv1OhucTMdanxJI9jEjUd0WO1p8jfYMxSTVmMRVGP7Tt9Gkj2V6XzDTW8E389Ui3xqCSAlcgQsgNiXF92CcyMP56v_6uy8q-HIeqjWcrMaXX-yWFSk5nfSK5yv-4B5bCRPjh5mUg-EILvgXbD4laoI%3D).

Matt Dolan continues to receive notable news coverage on his campaign trail stops, endorsements and direct policy hits on Sherrod Brown.

Matt Dolan continues to receive notable news coverage on his campaign trail stops, endorsements and direct policy hits on Sherrod Brown. Matt Dolan continued his focus on the need for enhanced border security to stop the flow of fentanyl across our southern border. | | Get up to speed... Matt Dolan was endorsed by 17 more elected Ohio Republicans this week, including 16 law enforcement officials. On Tuesday, during National Police Week, Matt Dolan was endorsed by 16 law enforcement leaders in Logan, Hardin, Butler, Hancock, Lake, Belmont, Knox, Morgan, Champaign, Washington, Ashtabula, Union, Fayette, Madison and Licking Counties! In a joint statement, they said, “The choice presently facing Ohio voters is one that carries ramifications for every city in our state and communities across America. As State Senator and a former prosecutor, Matt Dolan achieved a strong public record of supporting Ohio’s law enforcement community. Time and again, Matt has provided Ohio’s sheriff and police departments with the funding and programs we need. He is running a campaign focused on policy solutions and putting the needs of Ohio first. That’s why we support Matt Dolan for U.S. Senate.” To view the full slate of law enforcement endorsements, . On Thursday, Dolan was endorsed by Mayor Christina Muryn of Findlay. Muryn said of Matt, “Civic participation and public leadership are needed more than ever to move our cities, state and nation forward. With the challenges that confront America today, it’s vital we elect experienced public servants willing to put the good of our people before their own self-interest. Matt Dolan is one such public servant. He has a strong record of working to get results for the people of Ohio and that’s why I’m proud to endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate.” To read Mayor Muryn’s endorsement release, . body:
This winning moment is a result of our unified fight | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4001a6da0bdd/n41kepo7ku-536684?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=6bb2b683aa&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| We rallied with Nebraska Senators to protect our more children from becoming prey to the gender reassignment and abortion industries. Today, we achieved victory!

[LB 574](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=89b1464440&e=25844e23a8), known as the _“Let Them Grow Act,”_ **_will be heading to the Governor’s desk_! ** This was a monumental day to reverse the tide of losing children and begin to move the state government back into the job of protecting the innocent life of all citizens.

**We are grateful to Senator Kauth for sponsoring this bill. We appreciate the support of many others that helped us reach this crucial milestone! We are also grateful to Senator Hansen for his hard work in limiting abortions across Nebraska. **

This **WINNING** moment results from our unified fight against ideologies that are destructive, divisive, and anti-American in nature. We will continue to protect the rights of all Nebraskans regardless of if they agree with us or not. However, we will continue to protect the lives of kids until they are of age to make responsible decisions for themselves with a fully developed mind.

**Our fight isn’t over, and there is strength in numbers!**

We encourage you to get involved with the Nebraska Republican Party, which will fortify our stand against those who oppose our shared values of life, family, and individual rights and freedoms.

If you haven’t signed up to be a part of our [**2nd House Legislative Task Force**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=b26858dc09&e=25844e23a8), I encourage you to do so today!

Thank you again for taking a stand for the protection of Nebraska’s children!
---
| Sincerely,

**Todd Watson**
Political Director
Nebraska Republican Party
[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=cc82c04c2b&e=25844e23a8)

name: Katie Porter
subject: 3 things about the debt ceiling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23221%2E3422442%2EjUwqlz)
Our country’s debt ceiling and budget negotiations are underway. Here are three things you should know:
* Republicans have tied the debt ceiling to the budget. This isn’t normal. **It’s like paying for your groceries on your credit card, then deciding you don’t want them and therefore shouldn’t have to pay your credit card bill.**
* By doing this, they are essentially hijacking the economy in order to implement their policies.
* Republicans want to implement work requirements for government programs. It’s BS to claim Americans don’t want stable, full-time employment, and data shows that these requirements don’t end up pushing people into the workforce—**they simply harm vulnerable seniors and children.**

We don’t have to choose between economic turmoil and cutting benefits for Americans. I’ll keep advocating for a budget that puts families first.
Onward,
Katie
**Before you go:[Can you make a donation to our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230519-1?refcode=EMAH19_1_DEB_20230519_V1_F&refcode2=23221_3422442_jUwqlz&akid=23221%2E3422442%2EjUwqlz) Our average donation is just $24 this week, but that all adds up to power our movement. We can’t do this without you.** **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230519-1?refcode=EMAH19_1_DEB_20230519_V1_F&refcode2=23221_3422442_jUwqlz&akid=23221%2E3422442%2EjUwqlz)**

Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH19_1_DEB_20230519_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=23221_3422442_jUwqlz&akid=23221%2E3422442%2EjUwqlz)**

subject: What Is Biden Afraid Of?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/what-is-biden-afraid-of?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=c2636947cb&e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
May 19, 2023

Friend,

President Joe Biden has been dodging good-faith negotiations with Speaker Kevin McCarthy and completely ignoring the Republicans’ plan to get the nation's spending habits under control. The fact is that _**Biden has no solutions and would like nothing more than to raise taxes on middle-class families and keep pretending he has a no-limit credit card.**_

Biden's fiscal irresponsibility isn't sustainable and will hurt American families and seniors who can least afford it.

One reason why I'm running for Congress is to ensure that United States workers, small businesses, and families are protected for decades to come. It's up to us NOW to make sure that we stay within our budgetary boundaries and that we can pay all our bills when they come due.

[I'm campaigning to bring fiscal common sense to Congress. Will you help me do that? Today is $5 Friday. Will you commit to giving $5 per month?](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=7b68f9c013&e=1722d05e10)

---
| [DONATE NOW](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=b27848eb65&e=1722d05e10 "DONATE NOW")
---
| That's just $5 a month, $60 a year, or $95 between now and Election Day 2024. Your assistance will help my campaign unseat Jim Costa, grow the GOP majority in the House, and send a local small business owner to Congress.

Thanks in advance for your $5 Friday support. Enjoy your weekend!

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Michael Maher

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_5.17.2023_LA_all&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_5.17.2023_LA_all&amount=5]
Hi friend,
Our Primary Election on June 20th is just a month away, and we need your help in this final stretch to ensure we've got the word out in every corner of our district.
This race will be close -- early vote numbers show that this primary election is shaping up to be the most competitive race in our Commonwealth! So, friend, we have three big asks for you today to help us make the most of this final stretch.
1) Reserve a yard sign so you can proudly display your support for Lashrecse >>
2) Make a plan to vote! [https://iwillvote.com/] Polls are open for early in-person voting so find your polling location now >>
3) Donate to help us keep our latest ads on the air so we can reach more voters before the polls close on June 20th >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_5.17.2023_LA_all&amount=10]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89018/images/IMG-5936.jpg]
Thank you for all you do -- let's keep the momentum going!
Thank you!
Team Lashrecse
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Virginians understand the meaning of hard work, and Democrat Lashrecse Aird knows the kind of hard work it’s going to take to make this commonwealth better for all Virginians.
Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Lashrecse campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_4.20.2023_LA_all&amount=25]

| Peter,

Last week, Carlina reached out about our community fundraiser -- and how important it is for this campaign.

[**Will we see you there?**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=9b6c426a38&e=2de202398d)

When: Monday, May 22nd from 6-8 pm
Where: Lower East Side

| From creating the first Abortion Access Fund in New York to delivering thousands of affordable housing units, Carlina is a proven champion for our families. This upcoming Monday is our chance to come together as a community to support her re-election campaign and continue to build on these wins.

We're facing a pivotal moment in our campaign, and you can make a huge difference by joining us at any level. [**RSVP today -- and remember, every dollar given by a New York City resident will be matched 8-1!**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=a3b4ae77cc&e=2de202398d)

Thank you,
Team Carlina
