A group of some of the nation's most notorious election fraud deniers and election officials, including anti-Trump Secretaries of State, secretly gathered at CEIR's Soros-Tied and Zuckerberg Funded Election Summit in Washington DC on May 8-May 9 called "[Summit on American Democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/d8c31551-796d-4ceb-a7ad-19211a34db42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)", which I have been reporting on.
Newly-elected Secretary of State of Arizona, Adrian Fontes, [who has called Republicans who support Trump "MAGA Fascists,](https://substack.com/redirect/56b180fe-fb31-421d-9b96-2e7e2afd1099?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" was in attendance at the Soros-tied, Zuckerberg-funded election fortification summit in Washington D.C.
While I wasn't able to get to him before or after he walked into the conference, I did spot him at the bar inside the hotel chatting it up and flirting with beautiful red head, on taxpayer dime of course.
However, when he left the bar and headed toward the elevator, my videographer was able to chat with him and ask him about his recent claim that Trump voters, and people who believe our elections are rigged and illegitimate are "MAGA fascists." Not only did Fontes repeat and double down on his sentiments during the confrontation, but he also said that right-wingers are fascists as well.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4373df4a-a2bb-45f7-92a6-eca87ad6704a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Adrian Fontes is a radical Democrat who works closely with the newly-(s)elected, Democrat, Arizona Governor Katie Hobbs. He is also currently in litigation with Arizona's Republican 2022 Gubernatorial nominee, Kari Lake, who is suing multiple Arizona election officials over her stolen election, and what Maricopa County's improper and illegal signature verification process.
Fontes and Hobbs recently tried to counter-sue Lake by requesting she pay their legal fees.
Prior to being Secretary of State of Arizona, Fontes, who is a lawyer, [represented Mexican Drug Cartels and the ringleader of the Cartel's Fast and Furious Gun Running Operation under the Obama administration. ](https://substack.com/redirect/7dfacbaa-87c5-4007-ae98-b524196aaa38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Years later, after making a living defending killer Cartel terrorists, Fontes is now in charge of overseeing Arizona's elections.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: The largest renewable energy infrastructure project in U.S. history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63544108/407157059/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230519_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjhhOWNjOS05MGY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WsaLO3zXhbu7jZvNNOksRZ9YZGmo2t1gVBlTYQI_Nnc=&emci=648def9b-8ff6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=568a9cc9-90f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
This is a historic week for our clean energy future. I’ve been working to make the SunZia Transmission and Wind Project a reality for most of my congressional career. **The SunZia project will be the largest renewable energy infrastructure project in our country’s history. Yesterday, it finally advanced thanks to a Record of Decision issued by the U.S. Bureau of Land Management.** The magnitude and importance of this project is staggering. It will bring $20.5 billion in total economic benefits and create 2,000 jobs during construction. It will generate enough wind power for 3 million homes. And it includes major wins for local communities, private landholders, and stakeholders. I’m incredibly proud of this milestone, especially after so many years of hard work with stakeholders and local communities — and _many_ objections from former Republican New Mexico Governor Susana Martinez. But the truth is, it shouldn’t have taken so long. _The Wall Street Journal_ even pointed out that Taylor Swift released her first album and George W. Bush was president when work on this project began. In other words, _it’s been a minute_. And it wasn’t for a lack of trying on advocates’ part. We need more clean, renewable power on the grid to take on the climate crisis with the urgency it demands. We can do that while also creating good-paying jobs, and save millions for families across the nation. But first we need to bring more major transmission projects online, faster. That’s why I will soon introduce a bill to reform the long and convoluted permitting process and make way for a wave of clean energy projects. With the threat of climate change growing by the minute, we can’t afford to wait this long to approve clean energy projects. **We couldn't have made it this far without grassroots supporters powering the campaigns of leaders like me and my colleagues in New Mexico who are committed to building a clean energy future.** [**If you're able, can you chip in any amount to my re-election campaign so I can keep fighting in the Senate to advance clean energy projects that will help take on climate change and grow our economy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63544109/407157060/2144451450?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230519_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjhhOWNjOS05MGY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WsaLO3zXhbu7jZvNNOksRZ9YZGmo2t1gVBlTYQI_Nnc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63544110/407157061/2144451450?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230519_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjhhOWNjOS05MGY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WsaLO3zXhbu7jZvNNOksRZ9YZGmo2t1gVBlTYQI_Nnc=)

clean_body: This is a historic week for our clean energy future. I’ve been working to make the SunZia Transmission and Wind Project a reality for most of my congressional career. The SunZia project will be the largest renewable energy infrastructure project in our country’s history. Yesterday, it finally advanced thanks to a Record of Decision issued by the U.S. Bureau of Land Management. The magnitude and importance of this project is staggering. It will bring $20.5 billion in total economic benefits and create 2,000 jobs during construction. It will generate enough wind power for 3 million homes. And it includes major wins for local communities, private landholders, and stakeholders. I’m incredibly proud of this milestone, especially after so many years of hard work with stakeholders and local communities — and many objections from former Republican New Mexico Governor Susana Martinez. But the truth is, it shouldn’t have taken so long. The Wall Street Journal even pointed out that Taylor Swift released her first album and George W. Bush was president when work on this project began. In other words, it’s been a minute. And it wasn’t for a lack of trying on advocates’ part. We need more clean, renewable power on the grid to take on the climate crisis with the urgency it demands. We can do that while also creating good-paying jobs, and save millions for families across the nation. But first we need to bring more major transmission projects online, faster. That’s why I will soon introduce a bill to reform the long and convoluted permitting process and make way for a wave of clean energy projects. With the threat of climate change growing by the minute, we can’t afford to wait this long to approve clean energy projects. We couldn't have made it this far without grassroots supporters powering the campaigns of leaders like me and my colleagues in New Mexico who are committed to building a clean energy future. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This was a long time coming, but it is only the beginning of what we can do together. Thank you. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Sarah Godlewski (via Emerge)
subject: Now is not the time to be quiet, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63544138/407157095/-412134825?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1215-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzOThhZDgzLTkwZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lkQXbL39dR4PArNba9CuRMLX3kQkeh5ONJfIs4mnjgg=)
---
Peter, I’m Sarah Godlewski, Secretary of State in battleground Wisconsin – and I’m also a proud Emerge alum.
I’m so grateful to all of our community members who joined Emerge online and in person in San Francisco at the Defenders of Democracy celebration. In case you missed it, I want to share my story with you to show just how much Emerge’s work matters right now. [**It will only take a few minutes, and you can watch the video right here.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63544139/407157096/-412134825?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1215-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzOThhZDgzLTkwZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lkQXbL39dR4PArNba9CuRMLX3kQkeh5ONJfIs4mnjgg=)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63544140/407157097/-412134825?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1215-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzOThhZDgzLTkwZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lkQXbL39dR4PArNba9CuRMLX3kQkeh5ONJfIs4mnjgg=)
| | [WATCH THE VIDEO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63544141/407157098/-412134825?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1215-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzOThhZDgzLTkwZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lkQXbL39dR4PArNba9CuRMLX3kQkeh5ONJfIs4mnjgg=)
---
Growing up, I didn’t see a career in politics in my future. But I’m the daughter of two public school teachers, and my parents always said that when you see something wrong, you’ve got to stand up and do something about it.
**Those words led me to my Emerge moment:** **I realized I didn’t have to ask permission to run for office.** Instead, I could join an ambitious and powerful women-led movement to make a difference in politics. From fighting for affordable child care to protecting the right to vote, that difference is sorely needed at every level of public office.**But there are still too many voices telling bold women leaders to sit down and be quiet.**** **
**We can’t be quiet when our essential rights and our democratic institutions are under attack.** That’s why I’m so proud to be a part of the Emerge community and to stand with my fellow alums at this crucial moment for our country. **[I hope you’ll watch my short video to learn more now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63544142/407157099/-412134825?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1215-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzOThhZDgzLTkwZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lkQXbL39dR4PArNba9CuRMLX3kQkeh5ONJfIs4mnjgg=)** and take some encouragement with you.
Thank you for being a part of this community,
Sarah Godlewski
Wisconsin Secretary of State _P.S. If you’d like to view the full event, including speeches from more of my fellow Emerge alums, you can do so[here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63544143/407157100/-803653937?v=MLYmx9xKagI&t=3319s&refcode=jtk1215-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzOThhZDgzLTkwZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lkQXbL39dR4PArNba9CuRMLX3kQkeh5ONJfIs4mnjgg=&emci=5279d681-e6f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1398ad83-90f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=920818) on our YouTube channel._
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: Calling out a white supremacist doesn’t = the n word…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear:
In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me.
**Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.** It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.”
Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs – which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw.
This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change.
[**We must ALL continue to speak truth to power, and I’ll keep standing up to right-wing extremists. If you’re with me, will you split a donation between Cori Bush and my campaign today?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230519-split.obC6Ts&refcode=em20230519-2725&t=1&akid=2725%2E1082990%2EOI2eS-)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230519-split.obC6Ts&refcode=em20230519-2725&t=20&akid=2725%2E1082990%2EOI2eS-)**
Thank you for being on our side in this fight.
Peace and love,
Jamaal Bowman
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230519-split.obC6Ts&refcode=em20230519-2725&t=21&akid=2725%2E1082990%2EOI2eS-)

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-footer?refcode=em20230519-2725-footer&t=22&refcode2=2725_1082990_OI2eS-&akid=2725%2E1082990%2EOI2eS-) **

However, Republicans are raising a LOT of money off of that chaos. Their base loves when they grind the government to a halt - so that's exactly what the GOP will continue to do.

We wanted to check in with you:

**Are you committed to helping Democrats take back the House in 2024?******

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Public Enemy #1
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2264%2E5257348%2ELvZWUw ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Our campaign is doing a lot of prep work to win this U.S. Senate race in
the country’s most populous state. Today, I wanted to pull back the
curtain a bit.

Unlike many other states, California has a jungle primary. That means that
millions of new voters who have never seen me on their ballot before will
go to choose among dozens of candidates — and my name will appear
alongside Republicans, Independents, and other Democrats.

With this being an open seat for the first time in more than 30 years, the
stakes are higher too. That’s why Republicans are focusing their attention
on this race — starting by branding me as Public Enemy #1.

Kevin McCarthy kicked it off by unilaterally removing me from the
Intelligence Committee — where I served as a permanent member for the past
decade. Matt Gaetz then introduced legislation to try and bar me from
receiving classified information.

Even George Santos’ former treasurer set up a new Super PAC aimed directly
at me, calling it the STOP ADAM PAC. (I know what you’re thinking. Yes,
the congressman who was just indicted by the Department of Justice on 13
criminal charges. I wish I was joking.)

With them throwing out every dirty trick in the book to defeat me, it’s
critical that I reach every voter possible to share the truth about our
campaign and ensure every voter knows I’ve got their back.

In order for us to reach them, we need to build the largest grassroots
campaign in the history of California — and that won’t come easily.

That’s why I’m asking you to make a monthly recurring contribution of just
$5 from now until Election Day. Knowing we can count on your monthly
contribution — even just $5 — will help us open offices, knock on doors,
mobilize voters, and so much more.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2138?c0=may2023_abs_em_recurring.9zicq5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230519_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2264%2E5257348%2ELvZWUw ]Derek, can you make a monthly recurring contribution of $5 to our
campaign? Your support is the fuel for our people-powered movement to
stand up for our democracy.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
monthly recurring donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1041?c0=may2023_abs_em_recurring.SdkLTK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230519_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2264%2E5257348%2ELvZWUw ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

Thank you for everything you do.

All the best,

Adam

subject: 3 new supermajorities
body:
With a supermajority, Republicans don’t have to worry about compromise – they have almost unlimited power and can override the Governor’s veto on almost any issue... | | |
---
| | Republicans have gained _three_ new supermajorities in states with Democratic Governors. When the GOP has full supermajorities, it means that they can pass whatever legislation they want – banning books, disenfranchising voters, and outlawing abortion – _and Democratic Governors don’t have the veto power to stop them._ With supermajorities, Republicans don’t have to worry about compromise – they have almost unlimited power. **These GOP supermajorities are dangerous, and will lead to harmful laws and an erosion of our democracy.** [This cycle, we have a chance to reverse the GOP’s gains and end their stranglehold on power in states like Wisconsin and North Carolina. But to do it, we need your help. Can you donate $7 right now to help the DLCC defeat GOP candidates in the states? >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrplTq_6v4_7gQisubd1A2bN5ZVZY0YBIk65Pu1rAWcRhn1a7ROngv2LJrPokKjJ9j8IT_TCQMcWTlr5U4Cpwcr1qP7n9HjfCsVd0DXuUXZGkk4F-GLsRiZ3pWcqULoOeOk-nFa8q7v-W3nmh1E2eXAMyTaGNOMo1ZyPBbHwljFLHj98YVLAVrnWTGlZzkBWcpKFN8i5crY3lUtS0NIc9oc6FZmTVXnLCAAKkMqlLIVr3K-QErKk7x2qCzR3bO_ofG01oK5TXhMqK-Vb0msBGQdnOKSBfKhMUFLPv35MWIVOsux3_xXE3qaAX8HxfuRdnawvwzRsFPPbwWGRXQvBvxaaKldaBz0a0RBCToAqZsu88/3wb/YVmOET6uT7iOimkzKcKgIg/h0/JuA5FXB8WKzpC4gs1CHXOmBfC8kTgY1pYaDVv9oItHc) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Winning won’t be easy. Just last month, Democrats were narrowly defeated in a state Senate special election in Wisconsin.
Wisconsin and North Carolina’s legislatures have been swamped by Republicans in power for years, and we need to give Democratic Governors Tony Evers and Roy Cooper allies to help them deliver for their communities.
State Democrats are our best line of defense against the MAGA agenda, and investments to dismantle the GOP’s supermajorities will help build back power, protect the path to the presidency, and ensure Democratic governors can veto extreme Republican legislation.
**Our strategic plan relies on a strong team of grassroots supporters that includes you. Without you and tens of thousands of advocates joining in, our party can’t accomplish any of our goals.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: May e-newsletter 2023
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# 2023 May e-newsletter
News and information for District 5 in San Mateo County.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=c15cdd20a6&e=c0babbc643)
---
| **Navigation Center for the unhoused officially opens**
---
| Dear friends, San Mateo County’s goal of reaching functional zero homelessness took a great leap forward April 18 when it opened its first Navigation Center April 18. The $55 million shelter in Redwood City will provide temporary housing for 240 individuals that will be a big step forward to attaining permanent housing. The Navigation Center is unique as it allows couples to room together, pet owners to bring their animals and clients to store many of their belongings unlike traditional homeless shelters which are cramped and provide little privacy. Simply put, it’s a home-like setting that provides in-unit bathrooms, outdoor gardening and recreational opportunities on site.
---
On-site services include individualized care plans designed to link residents/clients with the full range of County services and partnerships; two-room medical clinic staffed six days a week and designed to provide basic/comprehensive/urgent medical care; two-chair dental clinic staffed five days a week with specialists available weekly; and behavioral health professionals on-site seven days a week to provide mental health and substance use disorder services. It’s a great environment and I’m thankful to the state’s Homekey program for helping our county become a leader in California by providing dignified housing and intensive services such as job training and counseling for those in need.
---
|
---
| **Bike to Work Day draws thousands across the Bay Area**
---
| I was delighted to join bicyclists across the Bay Area to ride their bikes to work Thursday, May 18 as part of a joint effort by the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, Silicon Valley Bicycle Coalition and the San Mateo County Office of Sustainability to get people out of their cars, get some exercise and socialize with others.
---
I was super excited to get on my bike and take a long ride from scenic Palo Alto through to Redwood City. A huge part of Silicon Valley Bicycle Coalition’s Bike to Wherever Days fun May 18-20 will be the many Energizer Stations, staffed by volunteers, across San Mateo and Santa Clara counties. The full event listing is here: [https://bikesiliconvalley.org/events/btwd](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=d917b445fa&e=c0babbc643)
---
|
---
|
# **District 5 Citizens of the Year named at ‘Connecting Communities’ resource fair at Serramonte**
---
| Thank you for all who attended my office’s ‘Connecting Communities’ resource fair at Serramonte Shopping Center, Saturday April 29. Special thanks to Serramonte’s marketing and events manager Marie Villarosa for assisting our office to put together a fair with singing, dancing and more than 40 vendor tables from a wide range of county departments and nonprofits detailing the many resources the county offers to its residents. Special thanks also to KOIT radio personality Freska Griarte for emceeing the event. I was honored to name District 5’s 15 Citizens of Year at the fair for their accomplishments and commitments to the cities and communities they live in. This year’s honorees are from Brisbane Beth Grossman and Michelle Salmon. Beth has been a dedicated community arts and environmental activist for 35 years who collaborates with local governments, universities and nonprofits to raise awareness around the arts and its relationship and value to our environment. Michelle is also honored for her environmental work as she has served on the board of directors for San Bruno Mountain Watch for over 15 years and on Brisbane's Open Space and Ecology Committee for 11 years. In San Bruno, this year’s honorees are Mark Benton and Marco Durazo. Mark is a former senior deputy with the San Francisco Sheriff’s Office and former director on the Daly City/Colma Chamber of Commerce. Mark and his wife Kim are also founding partners of New Beginnings Community Church who are both dedicated to the communities they live and work in. Durazo is a respected professor of politics at the University of San Francisco who serves on the San Bruno Planning Commission. In South San Francisco, the honorees this year are Bob Richardson, Hermes Monzon, Brittany Burgo and Dana Abarca. Bob is married to South San Francisco Unified School District Trustee Mina Richardson and was honored for his unwavering commitment to protecting and serving our nation coupled with his commitment to assisting fellow residents during the pandemic. Hermes has shown exceptional commitment to South San Francisco by serving on the city’s Traffic and Safety Commission who is tasked with improving city street conditions for pedestrians, bicyclists and motorists. Brittany has made exceptional contributions to the Old Town Neighborhood who is known for providing food and toys to families and children in need and advocating for improved transportation accessibility and safety. Dana is co-founder of Friends of Old Town and has served on the city’s Traffic Safety and Parking Place commissions and is the CEO of California Spice Basket.
---
In Daly City, honorees this year are Susanna Choe and Vice Mayor Juslyn Manalo. Susanna is the franchise owner of the new Chick-Fil-A and Serramonte Shopping Center. She has created job opportunities for 140 residents mostly in the surrounding neighborhoods mentors high school student employees, teaching them valuable skills such as responsibility, leadership and community building. Juslyn’s passion is for improving the quality of life for all Daly City residents who is a committed public servant with deep roots in Daly City. As a community engagement manager, she works tirelessly to build partnerships and create development opportunities, especially for women and the AAPI community. Rebecca Husted, Christine Talivaa-Aguerre and Marcos Gutierrez are this year’s honorees in Broadmoor Village. Rebecca is a 36-year real estate professional and serves as treasurer for the Broadmoor Property Owners Association (BPOA). Her commitment to Broadmoor Village is shown by her extensive service to the community. Christine is the current president of the BPOA and an ardent supporter of the Broadmoor Police Protection District who organizes many community events for families and children in Broadmoor Village. Marcos is a 40-year veteran broadcaster and hosts Hecho in California on KIQI-AM radio who illuminates the major issues the Latino community faces. His work has profoundly impacted countless lives. Our final honorees representing the town of Colma this year are Olga Garcia and Brian Dossey. Olga is honored for her exceptional contributions as the president of the Northern Region Chapter of the California Moving and Storage Association and for her work as a board member on the Golden Gate Business Association. Her exemplary leadership, knowledge and expertise have greatly benefitted both organizations and its membership. Brian is the current City Manager of Colma who announced he is retiring in August. He has strengthened the business community, partnered with the county to build affordable housing for veterans and has always ensured that public safety was a priority for all who live, work and travel through Colma. Thanks for the contributions of all of this year’s honorees and thanks to all the residents, county and nonprofit staff, musicians and dance troupes who made this resource fair a true success.
---
|
---
| **County imposes stiff fines on retailers who sell tobacco to kids**
---
| The tobacco epidemic is not just a statistic, it's a tragedy. It's robbing us of millions of lives every single year, including our youth. We must take a harsh stand against this deadly addiction that has killed more than 8 million people a year! In response, the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors May 9 passed one of the strictest anti-to tobacco ordinances in California to combat this epidemic by imposing stiff fines to retailers who sell tobacco products to children or banned products such as e-cigarettes and flavored vape cartridges. Big Tobacco has preyed on our youth with flavored products like bubblegum and cotton candy for years. The ordinance is a message to our retailers that if you are caught selling to minors or selling banned flavored tobacco products you will be fined heavily.

Because we know tobacco is a highly-profitable killer, the county will now conduct two mandatory compliance checks every year at every retail establishment that sells tobacco products.
---

This is another huge step toward saving lives and creating a world free from harmful tobacco products that are purely poison.
The new ordinance restricts where new retailers may be located: no new Tobacco Retailer Permit will be issued to a location within 1,000 of a Youth-Populated Area, or within 500 feet of a location already occupied by another tobacco retailer. “Youth-Populated Areas” is updated to include college campuses. It also increases fines up to $500 for the first violation, and up $1,000 for all subsequent violations within a 60-month period and requires that a permit be suspended if a business is found to have sold tobacco products to persons under the age of 21. This is about public health and keeping Big Tobacco products out of the hands of children. Enforcement must be prioritized if we want to reach the ultimate goal of having a tobacco free San Mateo County.
---
|
---
| **Public health can’t wait three years to reopen Mickelson warm water therapy pool**
---
| Sutter executives have indicated that newly appointed Sutter Health CEO Warner L. Thomas’s recent decision to reopen the Mickelson Arthritis and Rehabilitation Center therapy pool located at the Sutter Health Mills Medical Center in San Mateo would take at least three years. Those in pain and need of this therapy pool have been locked out for three years already during the pandemic and cannot afford to be locked out for another three years. Sutter can surely afford to reopen the therapy pool. For a nonprofit, it seems to be putting profits before public health especially considering it had a bottom-line gain of $194 million during the first quarter of this year, according to financial filings.
---
On May 8, state and local elected leaders joined my office in writing a letter to Sutter CEO Thomas asking him to commit to reopening the pool by July 1, 2023. The letter writers included Assemblymember Marc Berman, Assemblymember Diane Papan, Assemblymember Phil Ting, State Sen. Josh Becker, State Sen. Scott Wiener, San Mateo County Supervisor David Canepa, San Mateo County Supervisor Noelia Corzo, Peninsula Health Care District Director Dennis Zell, Esq, Sequoia Healthcare District CEO Pamela Kurtzman and Sequoia Healthcare District Director Kimberly Griffin, RN. The letter I and other elected officials sent to Sutter Health CEO Warner Thomas on May 8, 2023 is below: [Joint letter to Sutter Health CEO Thomas](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=0a0837dc2c&e=c0babbc643)
---
|
---
| **County to proclaim May AANHPI Heritage Month**
---
| May is Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander Heritage Month and the theme for 2023 is “Advancing Leaders through Opportunity.

This proclamation I am sponsoring at the Board of Supervisors May 23 calls upon San Mateo County residents, public and private institutions, and the collective community to commit to purposefully, with cultural humility, address the behavioral health inequities and needs of our AANHPI community in San Mateo County through financial, legal, social and political measures.

In addition, the Board of Supervisors commits to providing a seat at every table for the Asian American voice and presence, the Native Hawaiian voice and presence, and the Pacific Islander voice and presence to be heard, seen, and consulted in all matters related to our AANHPI community locally, nationally and globally.
---
The San Mateo County Behavioral Health & Recovery Services Office of Diversity and Equity’s Health Equity Initiatives, the Chinese Health Initiative, Filipino Mental Health Initiative and Pacific Islander Initiative, are working together to unify and amplify voices of our respective and collective communities toward wellness and equity, while imploring county officials to have intentional dialogue with stakeholders about creating policies and funding opportunities that address the increased health disparities among AANHPI communities.

The overall AANHPI population in San Mateo County is 32.1% of residents and in District 5 which I represent its over 56% of the population. I’m proud to represent one of the most diverse culturally vibrant county supervisor districts in California.
---
| **Battling food insecurity **
Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: **CalFresh:**
Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: [https://www.cdss.ca.gov/food-nutrition/calfresh](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=8e2dee30d5&e=c0babbc643) Contact: (650) 802-6576, [antorres@smcgov.org](mailto:antorres@smcgov.org) **Daly City Partnership:**
DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: [https://www.dcpartnership.org/covid19/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=287e5616a1&e=c0babbc643) **Second Harvest Food Bank:**
Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: [https://www.shfb.org/get-food/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=edd62315b0&e=c0babbc643) Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 **Interns wanted to join our team **

We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9. You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at mrichardson@smcgov.org

**Follow the Office on Social Media**
If you want to get more insight into our office please connect with us on social media. It’s also a great way to interact with the office and to get notifications on upcoming events. Click the icons below and like us on Facebook and follow us on Twitter.** ** In friendship, David J. Canepa
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=a7c4db3427) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=a7c4db3427).

clean_body: | | | | | | | 2023 May e-newsletter News and information for District 5 in San Mateo County. | | | Navigation Center for the unhoused officially opens | Dear friends, San Mateo County’s goal of reaching functional zero homelessness took a great leap forward April 18 when it opened its first Navigation Center April 18. The $55 million shelter in Redwood City will provide temporary housing for 240 individuals that will be a big step forward to attaining permanent housing. The Navigation Center is unique as it allows couples to room together, pet owners to bring their animals and clients to store many of their belongings unlike traditional homeless shelters which are cramped and provide little privacy. Simply put, it’s a home-like setting that provides in-unit bathrooms, outdoor gardening and recreational opportunities on site. On-site services include individualized care plans designed to link residents/clients with the full range of County services and partnerships; two-room medical clinic staffed six days a week and designed to provide basic/comprehensive/urgent medical care; two-chair dental clinic staffed five days a week with specialists available weekly; and behavioral health professionals on-site seven days a week to provide mental health and substance use disorder services. It’s a great environment and I’m thankful to the state’s Homekey program for helping our county become a leader in California by providing dignified housing and intensive services such as job training and counseling for those in need. | | Bike to Work Day draws thousands across the Bay Area | I was delighted to join bicyclists across the Bay Area to ride their bikes to work Thursday, May 18 as part of a joint effort by the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, Silicon Valley Bicycle Coalition and the San Mateo County Office of Sustainability to get people out of their cars, get some exercise and socialize with others. I was super excited to get on my bike and take a long ride from scenic Palo Alto through to Redwood City. A huge part of Silicon Valley Bicycle Coalition’s Bike to Wherever Days fun May 18-20 will be the many Energizer Stations, staffed by volunteers, across San Mateo and Santa Clara counties. clean_body: Hello Friend, Members of the U.S. Congress are accusing me of buying and paying for FBI whistleblowers. Here 's the full story: Congressman Dan Goldman, aka Silverspoon, aka Schiff Jr., is lying when he says I bought and paid for FBI whistleblowers. This is FALSE, and he knows it. Only Adam Schiff could have taught him lying is the best way to make a living. We will not stand idly by. Here is a post that about sums it up: Breaking: Congressman Dan Goldman (D) claims the FBI whistleblowers were bought and paid for by Kash Patel. The reality is the witnesses had their lives destroyed and Patel set up a fund for them to they could feed their families after the FBI suspended them without pay and left them unable to afford groceries... These brave patriots decided to put their lives and careers on the line for their country by exposing the truth about corruption within the FBI. I did not coach them, instruct them to do this, or buy them in any way. They provided critical information to Congress, exposing massive corruption at the FBI. Then, our foundation heard about their bravery and entered the fray. The Kash Foundation, my America-First non-profit organization, helped provide financial assistance through a donation so these patriots wouldn't lose everything after the great sacrifice they made for their country. I am declaring a FUNDRAISING EMERGENCY. Members of the U.S. Government are effectively accusing me of being a felon and destroying the lives of patriots. My goal is to raise $100,000 to immediately double down on the Kash Foundation's efforts to support whistleblowers and continue exposing the Deep State. Please use one of these links to donate ANY Amount: You and I cannot let these government gangsters destroy more lives and silence our voices. I am proud of The Kash Foundation and all of the America-First supporters who have stepped up to donate and support whistleblowers and others in need- victims of government overreach. I consider these FBI whistleblowers to be superheroes. Please help me FIGHT big government bullies that destroy our system of justice. Thank you for everything, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zak=20Malamed?=
subject: This is how we defeat George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zak for Congress
body:
#
I don’t need to tell you why George Santos is unfit for office. You already know.
But his outrageous lies, his recent indictment, and his out-of-touch, MAGA-inspired agenda don’t just make him unfit for Congress — they also show he’s completely out of step with our district. For that matter, so are all of the other extreme MAGA Republican leaders who stood with him, endorsed him and campaigned for him.
**What a lot of people don’t know is that NY-03 is a swing district** , and that right now Santos and his MAGA cronies are especially vulnerable. In fact, just the other day we saw a wave of significant, local election wins for Democrats right here in the district.
[I’ll get into what these local elections mean for our race and our plans to defeat George Santos in just a moment — but if you’re already on board with our campaign to flip NY-03, can I count on you to chip in $5 now?](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=dd691c45f2&e=15d98230e6)
**[Chip in $5»](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=23770bf1e7&e=15d98230e6)**
Alright, let’s get into it.
Earlier this week, Long Island held a bunch of local elections. They ranged from school board seats to school budget approvals. I was at my town’s election certification hearing until 4 AM because the MAGA madness led to hours of unfounded challenges to the election results. In the end, the results were clear: **Democrats can, and do, win in NY-03.**
When scrappy, local campaigns can pull off wins like these on important, but recently, contentious issues like education, that proves just how much potential there is here in New York’s Third.
**But like I’ve said before, winning this race won’t be easy.** Republicans are going to pour tons of money and resources into holding on to this seat and protecting the MAGA Republicans. Still, I’ve seen what this grassroots team is capable of — and **I know we’re up to the task.**
[If you believe in our campaign to flip NY-03 blue, will you chip in $5 now?/a>](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=9f361f3148&e=15d98230e6)
**[Chip in $5»](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=f2c7d36306&e=15d98230e6)**
In partnership,
**Zak Malamed
** Candidate for NY-03
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=e068993441&e=15d98230e6)
**[Donate](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=49647f0ba6&e=15d98230e6)**
---

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=9bec16b14b&e=15d98230e6&c=601f206953). Mail us: Zak for Congress, PO Box 220421, Great Neck, NY 11022.

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: May is Mental Health Awareness Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
My personal struggle with mental health drives the work that I do in Congress every day

| Hi Peter,

In case you missed it, this month I joined the bipartisan Congressional Mental Health Caucus to introduce a resolution to recognize May as National Mental Health Awareness Month.

I’ve always been open about my personal struggle with mental health and my experience receiving mental health care – I would not be alive, _let alone in Congress,_ without it.

**Mental health care is a necessity, not a luxury.** But right now, we live in a country where countless Americans face deeply rooted barriers and stigma to accessing mental health care.

My personal struggle with mental health drives the work that I do in Congress every day. I vow to _always_ fight for expanded access to affordable mental health care.

[Can you chip in $3 so I can keep fighting for all those in need of support? I can’t bust the stigma surrounding mental health alone. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63544977/407160324/-922949292?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230519_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGM1NDcxNS05NmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hlNbkZiJRWFxrQCrwORWlkFATk-ewgHvKDWDGtG2iAw=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63544983/407160330/-922949292?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20230519_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGM1NDcxNS05NmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hlNbkZiJRWFxrQCrwORWlkFATk-ewgHvKDWDGtG2iAw=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Protect Lauren Boebert’s right to divorce—and the right of all of us not to live in a theocracy—by making sure she loses her seat in Congress, where she has tirelessly worked to break down separation of church and state.
body:
Protect divorce rights for all
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb51af29e-e426-4e61-bb02-9ea28cce9be2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **" I'm Tired Of This Separation Of Church And State Junk"** _That's what Lauren Boebert said in a speech to the Cornerstone Christian Church in CO. Attacking our Constitution, which provides for separation of church & state, while looking to Saudi Arabia as a governing model._ **_Boebert's a self-proclaimed Christian Nationalist who believes her Bible should determine how we live. And Cornerstone believes the Bible's the written word of God, and must be followed as written._** _So it must have been a bummer for the church when the hypocrite, Boebert, filed for divorce from her husband this past week. It_ _wouldn't seem to fit the part where Matthew quotes Jesus saying divorce makes one an "adultress._" _To be clear: I think divorce is a healthy part of a free society where we all have choices. _**_But, _****_Boebert's tired of that "junk." She wants to tell us who to marry, when to marry and how we must remain married. Except Boebert doesn't count, because she's special. Her theocracy's only for us._** [**_Boebert's a moral abomination & hypocrite. Adam Frisch only lost to her by 546 votes in '22. Since then, she's grown more unhinged, he's gotten stronger: With a real presence on the trail and great fundraising. Will you join us in giving Frisch $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can, NOW, because freedom of (and from) religion is not, and has never been, negotiable._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf6cb1b2-b8ad-4d36-a65c-c41dd53a1111/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your dedication to freedom for all Americans. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3cb670a7-75da-4b34-9155-232f5c05a77f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Rick Scott
subject: This is what I’m fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | I know you get a lot of emails from me, but this one is different.

I want to tell you a little bit about my story, and why fighting for the American Dream is so important to me.
I grew up in public housing. My father was a truck driver and my mother worked many jobs to provide for me and my siblings. We struggled to make ends meet, and it wasn’t easy.
_But every day, they instilled in me the values of hard work, trust, and faith, and that set the foundation for the rest of my life._
**I know the American Dream is real - because as someone who went from public housing to a United States Senator, I’ve lived it.**
**But right now, the Democrats want to destroy that dream and trade it for their woke, socialist agenda.**
_I won’t let them get away with it, but I can’t do it alone._

body:
Here's what delivering for New Mexico looks like. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63545078/407160686/-1912557965?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230519bipartisan_gv_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGQ0MzNjYy05NmY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pa9aU8kZ_tzQBY3K4ItjJM966HR2K0gcVDhcX7lTz_s=)

Friends, big news! I’ve introduced a bipartisan package of bills aimed at strengthening New Mexico’s economy. 👷 **Economic Opportunity for Border Communities Act**
Instructs the Department of Commerce to create a national strategy focused on **increasing job opportunities in border communities** in the trades, agriculture, manufacturing, and transportation industries. 🌽 **Farm Workforce Support Act**
Has the government report on the **H-2A visa program** so we can find solutions that work for New Mexico farmers and ensure farmworkers have adequate housing and fair wages. ✈️ **Expanding Regional Airports Act**
Creates a grant program to **help smaller regional airports like Las Cruces** **promote tourism** and attract commercial airlines. The voters of New Mexico’s 2nd District elected me to _get things done_ and that’s exactly what I plan to do.******Unfortunately, this makes me an even bigger target for McCarthy and the GOP.****** The more I deliver for my district, the more money McCarthy is going to pour into attack ads against me. **[Team, my race is one of a handful of true TOSS UPs in the country. I only flipped this seat blue by 1,350 votes. To win re-election in 2024 and keep delivering for New Mexico, I need your help. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: I’m personally asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=308%2E35263%2Ep1Iw6y ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-brown.JYBKxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230519_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=308%2E35263%2Ep1Iw6y ]Sherrod Brown

Hi, Peter, it’s
Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity
of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a
badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an
aging parent, I’ll fight for you.

I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families
in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide
Democrat in Ohio, analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable
senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching
attack ads against me.

The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m
personally asking: [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-brown.JYBKxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230519_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=308%2E35263%2Ep1Iw6y ]Will you give $10 or more right now – split between

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters,
autoworkers and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live

the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by
investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every
American.

But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8
points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and
competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be
“even nastier and more expensive.”

onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots

[**May 19, 1994:** First Lady Jackie Kennedy passed away leaving a legacy of American class and culture. Notably married to JFK and widowed after his assassination, Jackie Kennedy went on to marry Greek shipping magnate Aristotle Onassis. After being twice widowed, she began a successful career in publishing. She will always be remembered for her exceptional commitment to her country, her iconic fashion, and work preserving America’s cultural heritage.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6638874cde444669ac67d218b260c186&_e=AG1FLTnUbV0GP53eE52OdCIowfjiWLYdw_yeEFvcX3zZtYQcKZYT_JBV3WeKpTffb7bYEDiOOq1vKIHPJMdnQEPtXGOniWdf5sdllusfPE-hi-05-LJBxe7Gztu_LIJBlhK1cqcXGVNfzqYVhNGa5fc36mgOGM8YxntvByHw_0V2noNz1ama2bwJyTcIJBRUm2NBj0GJzW7n2s_1np4KoYLa4Ps9JtGqLgL_KgI5ibql0fxFFo2kUhqxwEUJ6z5VnXcjtyQtkpRcEJkVerqlVw%3D%3D) **Source -[jfklibrary.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6638874cde444669ac67d218b260c186&_e=AG1FLTnUbV0GP53eE52OdCIowfjiWLYdw_yeEFvcX3zZtYQcKZYT_JBV3WeKpTffb7bYEDiOOq1vKIHPJMdnQEPtXGOniWdf5sdllusfPE_oOd69AAq3HqKpfDpACBDbDcqVMzasC0A13eI4KlFAybPbOtOpN2EkkyqKJP9BNY9eQmqy4Qx4LPJTvzqmtvKm5lyKGN6_QuAkS_l_ZGY6yaafRDJg0SxfPLULIv-mFErdXbQ-LfUQb7n9-FWujDSXFTC4JxYQKknT8psQtgvbAg%3D%3D)**

[**May 19, 2018:** Prince Harry, the second son of King Charles III (then the Prince of Wales) married American actress Meghan Markle at St George’s Chapel, Windsor Castle. Queen Elizabeth II, his grandmother, granted him the title Duke of Sussex on the morning of his wedding. Following the ceremony Markle became Her Royal Highness The Duchess of Sussex. The couple has come under scrutiny following their departure from being working members of the royal family.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6638874cde444669ac67d218b260c186&_e=AG1FLTnUbV0GP53eE52OdC1I9-ZZfmgwL7H2U3AylQvBfnnDUdVDNs2eE5cjyESPFrbjDvwQUR1yQbbX9g_qqn17PeLucgMzZkbEUuiAJa-byfEe9yUpWLJqBRRQjqLpmfJGhRNZ-9gbMZ6stMni8M8GaJvLJ-4uQyobOlTKPTBJmDYw3UlLBWoQf0dWVi2f9G0S3sqavatJk-T7WpQgueh8pjCZesSVMOsaCE2OwCQ%3D) **Source -[royal.uk](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6638874cde444669ac67d218b260c186&_e=AG1FLTnUbV0GP53eE52OdC1I9-ZZfmgwL7H2U3AylQvBfnnDUdVDNs2eE5cjyESPFrbjDvwQUR1yQbbX9g_qqgfSfA_ZG7VMnhFnKP9UKTXiMIk8M7QDyK2qNwFad54DzlONa2LeZn-rqStU9pwiYsJhOCE3zpzCCLp2sun6UOLy4g1RUjgqnYWEXC-fBKEj8ovjhcUbDOcFrGQZCzcm3Ei6GjVg64zn9UqPyoZhtgc%3D)**

**_Roll Call_ just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024.**

That’s why Mitch McConnell has made this race his top target and national Republicans are already hammering me with attacks. I know we can win in Montana, _but it won’t be easy._

Look—I’m not panicking, but I am sounding the alarm. A wave of outside money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be the most important Senate election in the country, and it’s up to us to build a team strong enough to win.

**Montana is a top battleground and could decide whether or not Democrats hold our narrow majority. That’s why I’m personally counting on you to make a donation today.**

name: S. Brown
subject: Can I tell you a story about my canary pin?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63545625/407162965/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk111-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTRkMzA5OC05OWY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cgqNkN0deV6OhsnQtl8X39OHiy21djBODb71CTRw3jg=)
Friend,

On the lapel of my suits (suits that I admit are sometimes rumpled), I wear a pin depicting a yellow canary in a birdcage. It was given to me decades ago by a Lorain steelworker at a Workers' Memorial Day rally – and to this day**, I wear this canary instead of the official Senate pin. Let me tell you why:**
In the early days of the 20th century, coal miners would bring canaries deep into the mines to warn them of poisonous gasses. Back then, workers didn't have a union strong enough or a government that _cared enough_ to protect them.
Together, we changed that. We passed worker safety laws and overtime pay. We banned child labor. We passed clean air and safe drinking water laws. We enacted Social Security and Medicare, and workers’ rights and women’s rights and civil rights. Because when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work, friend.
**I wear my canary pin as a symbol of all the progress we've made and as a reminder that our fight for the Dignity of Work – _all_ work – is far from over. ****This fight is why I'm running for reelection.**
**To defend my seat and keep up this important fight, I need grassroots support from folks like you. That's why I'm personally asking: **[Please, friend, will you give $5 or more now so we can win in Ohio, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue making progress for workers and families across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63545626/407162966/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk111-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTRkMzA5OC05OWY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cgqNkN0deV6OhsnQtl8X39OHiy21djBODb71CTRw3jg=)
Thank you. I'm humbled to have folks like you standing alongside me in this fight.

In solidarity,

Sherrod
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63545627/407162967/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk111-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTRkMzA5OC05OWY2LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cgqNkN0deV6OhsnQtl8X39OHiy21djBODb71CTRw3jg=)

name: Right Wing Watch (via the NDRC)
subject: NYT reports on the GOP’s latest anti-choice strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, after the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , voters made their position abundantly clear. In states like Michigan and Vermont, voters approved protections for reproductive freedom. And in red states like Kansas, Kentucky, and Montana, voters soundly defeated proposed anti-abortion measures.

**Republicans know voters will _reject_ their extreme, anti-choice agenda if given the opportunity. So now, the GOP is trying to take that opportunity away:** | _New York Times:_

**“Losing Ballot Issues on Abortion, G.O.P. Now Tries to Keep Them Off the Ballot”

_“Republicans were surprised by how forcefully voters turned out to reject anti-abortion laws last year, even in red states.”_**
| [FIGHT BACK!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63545731/407163442/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230518_FR_5W_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhNzZmMGZkLTlhZjYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KjeUovaNr7nNeksk605Sw0V6jW1fA-nmVeyJFFk5C9Y=)
